photos.location_detail: Taiwan — multiple locations including a traditional temple, the Changhua Great Buddha (彰化大佛), and urban street scenes
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing approximately 11 black-and-white photographs arranged together, documenting what appears to be a young couple's life i
photos.description_zh: 一張相簿頁面的掃描，包含約十一張黑白照片，記錄了一對年輕夫婦在台灣的生活點滴——包括在傳統廟宇前和大佛像（可能是彰化大佛）前的旅遊照、一張正式的婚紗照（新娘手持捧花）、婚禮合照、風景照、繁忙街景，以及日常合影。這些照片似乎記錄了從交往、旅行到結婚的過程。
photos.location: Taiwan — multiple locations including a traditional temple, the Changhua Great Buddha (彰化大佛), and urban street scenes

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — military base/installation
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing eight black-and-white photographs documenting military service in Taiwan. The collection includes what appears to be C
photos.description_zh: 一頁掃描的相簿頁面，包含八張黑白照片，記錄了在台灣服兵役的經歷。照片包括疑似蔣介石在講台上演講的畫面、軍車閱兵場景、一位年輕軍人的兩張個人肖像照、多張軍中同袍合影，以及幾張可能包含家人的非正式合照。整頁相簿記錄了一位年輕人在中華民國國軍服役期間的珍貴回憶。
photos.location: Taiwan — military base/installation

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A black-and-white portrait photograph of a young Taiwanese boy, likely a junior high or high school student, with a regulation shaved head and wearing
photos.description_zh: 一張黑白肖像照，拍攝對象是一位年輕的台灣男孩，可能是國中或高中學生，留著當時規定的平頭，穿著標準的雙口袋制服襯衫。正面端正的構圖顯示這可能是學生證件照或正式肖像照。照片是從相簿頁面掃描而來，可以看到旁邊其他照片的邊緣。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing approximately 10 black-and-white and early color photographs. The dominant image is a formal wedding portrait on the l
photos.description_zh: 這是一張相簿頁面的掃描，包含約十張黑白及早期彩色照片。最大張的照片是一張正式婚紗照，新娘身穿白色婚紗手捧花束，新郎著深色西裝，前方有兩位小花童，背景為花卉布幕。其餘照片包括婚禮團體照、疑似台灣風景區的河景與洞穴照片、年輕男子的合照、一場有中華民國國旗的大型軍事典禮、軍用直升機，以及一張年輕男子的肖像
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing approximately 15-16 black-and-white family photographs arranged in a collage on a dark album background. The photos sp
photos.description_zh: 一張掃描的相簿頁面，深色底紙上排列了約十五至十六張黑白家庭照片。照片涵蓋不同場合與時期，包括不同年齡的孩童照、家族合照、戶外風景、疑似婚禮或正式聚會的合影，以及個人肖像。照片之間可見一張寫有中文字的黃色小標籤。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely a photo studio or school
photos.description_en: A black-and-white portrait of a young boy, approximately 12-15 years old, wearing a khaki-style school uniform with button-down pockets and shoulder e
photos.description_zh: 一張黑白肖像照，照片中是一位約十二至十五歲的少年，穿著卡其色學生制服，制服有鈕扣口袋和肩章。他留著平頭，面對鏡頭，表情端正。這張照片看起來像是在素色背景前拍攝的學校或證件照。
photos.location: Taiwan — likely a photo studio or school

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - university classroom
photos.description_en: A black and white photograph of a young man wearing glasses and a jacket, standing in front of a large chalkboard covered with mathematical equations
photos.description_zh: 一張黑白照片，一位戴眼鏡、穿夾克的年輕男子站在大學教室的黑板前，黑板上寫滿了數學公式。他手持粉筆或板擦，姿態自然地在黑板前留影。此照片是從相簿頁面掃描而來，上下方可見其他彩色照片的邊緣。
photos.location: Taiwan - university classroom

photos.location_detail: Taiwan mountain area (possibly Hehuan Mountain/合歡山) or United States
photos.description_en: A young man slides down a snowy slope, sitting and grinning with evident enjoyment. He wears sunglasses, a dark cap, a jacket, and slacks. In the back
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕男子坐在雪坡上開心地滑下，戴著墨鏡和深色帽子，穿著外套和長褲，笑容滿面。背景中有兩個人站在雪地上，遠處可見積雪覆蓋的山坡，零星露出一些植物。
photos.location: Taiwan mountain area (possibly Hehuan Mountain/合歡山) or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing approximately 10 photographs arranged on gray album paper, mixing black-and-white and early color prints. The photos d
photos.description_zh: 一張掃描的相簿頁面，灰色相紙上排列了約十張照片，包含黑白及早期彩色沖印照片。照片內容涵蓋多種場景：家人到海邊岩石區出遊、在台灣寺廟及建築前的團體合照、在寫有中文字的黑板前留影，以及在開花樹木旁的戶外合影。從服裝風格、沖印品質及彩色照片的褪色程度判斷，這些照片大約拍攝於一九六〇至七〇年代初期。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - high mountain, likely Central Mountain Range (合歡山 Hehuan Mountain area or similar alpine zone)
photos.description_en: A young man poses on a snow-covered mountain, standing on rocky terrain with dramatic snow-capped peaks behind him. He wears sunglasses, a cap, a dark
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕男子站在積雪的山頂岩石上，背後是壯麗的雪山景色。他戴著太陽眼鏡和帽子，穿著深色夾克，胸前別有圓形徽章，搭配深色長褲和皮鞋。這張黑白照片記錄了一次高山之旅，地點可能是台灣中央山脈一帶。
photos.location: Taiwan - high mountain, likely Central Mountain Range (合歡山 Hehuan Mountain area or similar alpine zone)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hillside, likely a cemetery area
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing eight photographs, mostly black-and-white with one color print. The photos appear to document a family outing to a hil
photos.description_zh: 一頁相簿掃描，包含八張照片，大多為黑白照，其中一張為彩色。這些照片記錄了一次家族掃墓活動，多張照片可見家人撐著雨傘行走在山坡小徑上，周圍是茂密的亞熱帶植被。其中一張團體照顯示家人聚集在墓前，擺放了鮮花。唯一的彩色照片是兩位女性在路邊的合影。
photos.location: Taiwan - hillside, likely a cemetery area

photos.location_detail: indoors - home, likely Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: A young couple sits on a floral-patterned couch opening wedding gifts in a living room. The man wears a white dress shirt with a dark tie and thick-fr
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦坐在花紋沙發上拆結婚禮物。男方穿著白色襯衫打深色領帶，戴著粗框眼鏡；女方穿著珊瑚粉色無袖洋裝，正在看一盒玻璃杯組禮品。旁邊的桌上擺著包裝好的禮物和裝飾性包裝紙。
photos.location: indoors - home, likely Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountainous or scenic park area with pine trees
photos.description_en: A young couple poses outdoors among pine trees, likely in a park or scenic area. The man wears thick-framed glasses and a light blue polo shirt, while
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕情侶在松樹林間的戶外合影。男方戴著粗框眼鏡，穿著淺藍色polo衫；女方穿著粉紅色短袖針織上衣。兩人看起來約二十出頭，親密地站在一起，似乎是交往或訂婚時期拍攝的紀念照。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountainous or scenic park area with pine trees

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - church
photos.description_en: A Christian wedding ceremony captured at the moment of the ring exchange. The groom, a young Asian man in a dark suit with glasses and a white boutonn
photos.description_zh: 一場基督教婚禮儀式，拍攝於交換戒指的時刻。新郎是一位戴眼鏡的年輕亞洲男子，身穿深色西裝，胸前別著白色胸花，正面對著主持儀式的西方牧師。新娘身著傳統白色婚紗，頭戴蕾絲邊長頭紗，手持花束站在新郎身旁。教堂長椅上坐滿了賓客，左側站著一位同樣戴著黑框眼鏡的伴郎。
photos.location: Taiwan - church

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — wedding banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A joyful Taiwanese wedding reception photo showing the bride and groom seated at the head table, both laughing. The bride wears a white Western-style
photos.description_zh: 一張充滿歡笑的台灣婚宴照片，新郎新娘坐在主桌前，兩人笑容滿面。新娘穿著白色西式婚紗，搭配蕾絲頭紗與珍珠項鍊；新郎身著深色西裝，戴著粗框黑色眼鏡，胸前別著白色胸花。背後掛著傳統紅色囍字布幔，繡有金色鳳凰與花卉圖案。
photos.location: Taiwan — wedding banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Indoors - wedding reception venue, likely Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: A wedding reception scene showing the bride and groom seated at the head table alongside their wedding party. The bride wears a white lace wedding dre
photos.description_zh: 婚宴上新郎新娘與伴郎伴娘坐在主桌旁的合影。新娘穿著白色蕾絲婚紗，頭戴花飾面紗；新郎身穿深色西裝，胸前別著白色胸花。桌上擺著三層白色結婚蛋糕，前方有餐盤和飲料，背後掛著粉紅色的喜慶布幕。
photos.location: Indoors - wedding reception venue, likely Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - scenic waterfall tourist site
photos.description_en: Two men in white short-sleeve dress shirts pose together in front of a large waterfall at a busy tourist spot. The man on the right wears a tie and bo
photos.description_zh: 兩位穿著白色短袖襯衫的男士在一處熱門瀑布景點前合影，右邊的男士繫著領帶，兩人都戴眼鏡。背景可見其他遊客，包括帶著孩子的家庭，在瀑布旁的岩石和樹木間遊覽。
photos.location: Taiwan - scenic waterfall tourist site

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall
photos.description_en: A formal Chinese banquet dinner with approximately 8-9 people seated around a large round table with a lazy susan. A younger man standing is toasting
photos.description_zh: 一場正式的中式宴席，約八到九人圍坐在大圓桌旁。一位年輕男子站著與一位年長的男士敬酒，兩人手持小杯。桌上擺滿了中式菜餚、筷子和多個杯子，看起來像是一場慶祝聚會或商務宴請。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant banquet room
photos.description_en: A lively banquet dinner scene at a Chinese restaurant with a large group of adults seated around a round table with a lazy Susan. Several men are stan
photos.description_zh: 一場熱鬧的中式宴席聚會，一大群成年人圍坐在一張有轉盤的大圓桌旁。幾位男士站著互相敬酒寒暄，其他人則坐在位子上談笑風生。場地有木質護壁板牆面和球形吊燈，桌上擺著中式菜餚，看起來是一場家庭或社交慶祝聚餐。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant banquet room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A joyful wedding reception moment where the bride, wearing a white lace wedding dress with veil and white gloves, laughingly feeds cake to the groom i
photos.description_zh: 婚宴上溫馨歡樂的一刻，新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴面紗、手戴白手套，笑著餵新郎吃蛋糕。新郎穿深色西裝、戴眼鏡，胸前別著白色胸花。背景掛著傳統粉紅色金繡鳳凰圖案的喜幛。右側坐著一位可能是伴郎的男士，同樣戴著眼鏡、穿深色西裝，面帶微笑。
photos.location: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A group of adults seated around a dining table at what appears to be a restaurant or banquet gathering. A middle-aged man in a dark suit with a wide p
photos.description_zh: 一群成年人圍坐在餐桌旁，場景像是在餐廳或宴會聚餐。一位穿著深色西裝、繫著寬版花紋領帶的中年男士坐在一位穿著旗袍式花卉上衣的女士旁邊，右側有一位年長女士正在喝飲料。牆上掛著一幅佛像或古典人物的裝裱畫作，角落放著一個銅製衣帽架。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, bedroom
photos.description_en: Two young women pose together in a bedroom, standing close with their arms around each other. The woman on the left wears a coral-pink sleeveless doub
photos.description_zh: 兩位年輕女性在臥室中合影，彼此親密地站在一起。左邊的女性穿著珊瑚粉色無袖雙排扣洋裝，配有白色鈕扣；右邊的女性穿著深藍色圓點上衣搭配橫條紋裙子。背景可見雕花木製床頭板、金色緞面床罩及淡黃色薄紗窗簾。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, bedroom

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall
photos.description_en: A lively banquet scene at a formal Chinese dinner gathering. Three people stand at center—two men in suits and a woman in glasses wearing a patterned
photos.description_zh: 一場熱鬧的中式宴會場景。三位站立的賓客正在愉快交談——兩位穿西裝的男士和一位戴眼鏡、穿著花紋洋裝、手持酒杯的女士。前方桌邊坐著幾位年長女性，桌上擺放著餐盤、茶杯和啤酒杯。木質牆面裝潢的宴會廳裡，還可見其他桌次的賓客。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor banquet or restaurant setting
photos.description_en: A group of approximately eight women seated around a round banquet table with a dark purple tablecloth, engaged in conversation during what appears to
photos.description_zh: 約八位女性圍坐在一張鋪著深紫色桌布的圓桌旁，正在聚餐交談。場景為室內餐廳，背景是木質折疊隔板牆，椅子為棕色皮面。女士們穿著七零年代初期典型的彩色花卉印花上衣，桌上可見茶杯和碗碟。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor banquet or restaurant setting

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely airport terminal (possibly Taipei Songshan Airport)
photos.description_en: A group of approximately ten people, mostly men in suits, gathered in what appears to be an airport terminal or public building with distinctive louve
photos.description_zh: 約十人的團體合照，多為身穿西裝的男士，背景為有百葉窗的建築，可能是機場航廈或公共場所。其中一位男士抱著穿紅色中式童裝的幼童，左側站著一位小女孩。從正式的穿著和團體合照的氣氛來看，這可能是一場迎接或送別的場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely airport terminal (possibly Taipei Songshan Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor wedding reception venue
photos.description_en: A wedding cake-cutting moment captured at a reception. The bride, wearing a white lace wedding dress with a floral headpiece and veil, cuts a three-ti
photos.description_zh: 婚禮上切蛋糕的溫馨時刻。新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗，頭戴花飾與頭紗，與戴著粗框眼鏡、身穿深色西裝的新郎一同切下三層白色婚禮蛋糕。一位女性長輩在旁觀禮，右側紅色花卉布幔帶有台灣傳統婚禮的氛圍。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor wedding reception venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A formal group photo of approximately 25 adults posed in three rows inside what appears to be a banquet hall or restaurant private room with wood-pane
photos.description_zh: 約二十五人在宴會廳或餐廳包廂內拍攝的正式團體照，背景為木質牆板及球型吊燈。合影者分三排站坐，年長者坐於前排中央位置，較年輕的成員站立於後方。眾人衣著正式、排列整齊，應為家族聚會、宗親會或社團活動的紀念合影。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - church interior
photos.description_en: A wedding ceremony inside a modern church with colorful decorative window panels. The groom, wearing a dark suit and thick-rimmed glasses, stands besi
photos.description_zh: 一場在現代教堂內舉行的婚禮儀式，教堂窗戶鑲有紅、黃、綠色裝飾玻璃。新郎身著深色西裝、戴著粗框眼鏡，與身穿白色婚紗、頭戴蕾絲頭紗的新娘並肩站立，牧師正在朗讀經文。賓客們坐在後方的長椅上，伴郎和伴娘分立兩側。
photos.location: Taiwan - church interior

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely church or wedding venue
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait of a young couple. The bride wears a white lace wedding gown with a high neckline, pearl choker necklace, and a veil adorned
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕新人的正式結婚照。新娘身穿白色蕾絲高領婚紗，佩戴珍珠項鍊，頭戴白色花飾頭紗。新郎穿著深色西裝、打深色領帶，戴著粗框眼鏡，兩人在素色牆前合影留念。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, likely church or wedding venue

photos.location_detail: Scenic overlook or observation deck above a city, possibly in Taiwan or the western United States
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together at a scenic overlook or observation deck with a panoramic view of a sprawling city behind them. The woman wears a pink d
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在觀景台上合影，身後是城市的全景。女士穿著粉紅色洋裝搭配橘色針織外套，手提深色手提包；男士穿著藍灰色西裝、打領帶，戴著厚框眼鏡。照片帶有七零年代底片特有的暖色調與輕微褪色。
photos.location: Scenic overlook or observation deck above a city, possibly in Taiwan or the western United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States — suburban setting visible in background
photos.description_en: A newlywed couple sits in a decorated cream-colored car, likely departing their wedding ceremony. The groom wears a dark suit with thick-framed glasse
photos.description_zh: 一對新婚夫婦坐在一輛裝飾過的米色轎車內，準備離開婚禮現場。新郎穿著深色西裝，戴著粗框眼鏡，胸前別著白色康乃馨胸花；新娘身穿高領蕾絲白色婚紗，佩戴珍珠項鏈及蕾絲頭紗。車頂上裝飾著黃色和粉紅色的彩帶。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States — suburban setting visible in background

photos.location_detail: United States or Taiwan - indoors, likely a wedding venue or home
photos.description_en: A wedding group portrait featuring the bride in a white lace dress with veil and pearl necklace, standing beside the groom in a dark suit with glasses
photos.description_zh: 一張婚禮合照，新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴頭紗並配戴珍珠項鍊，新郎穿著深色西裝、戴眼鏡並佩戴胸花。兩人身旁圍繞著六位賓客，其中一位女士抱著一名幼兒。背景可見紅色裝飾布幔與木質牆板，呈現中式婚禮的喜慶氛圍。
photos.location: United States or Taiwan - indoors, likely a wedding venue or home

photos.location_detail: Urban plaza or civic center, possibly Japan or Taiwan
photos.description_en: A young woman poses outdoors in front of a modern architectural structure featuring an exposed steel tower and landscaped concrete plaza. She wears a
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性站在一座現代建築前方的廣場上拍照留念。她穿著紅橘色迷你裙搭配同色長外套，頭戴黃色髮飾，腳踩高跟鞋，手提皮包，展現七零年代的時尚風格。背景可見鋼構高塔與整齊的景觀設計，看起來是公共場所或觀光景點。
photos.location: Urban plaza or civic center, possibly Japan or Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant
photos.description_en: A group of young women and other diners gathered around round tables at a Chinese restaurant banquet. The foreground table shows three young women fac
photos.description_zh: 一群年輕女性和其他賓客圍坐在中式餐廳的圓桌旁用餐。前景桌上可見三位面對鏡頭的年輕女子及兩位背對鏡頭的人，桌上擺有茶杯、茶水和碗碟，鋪著暗紅色桌布。背景中另一桌客人正在用餐，牆上掛有傳統字畫卷軸。
photos.location: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hillside cemetery
photos.description_en: A young man in his 30s wearing glasses and a white short-sleeve shirt stands beside an older woman in her 60s-70s wearing a traditional dark Chinese-s
photos.description_zh: 一位三十多歲戴眼鏡、穿白色短袖襯衫的年輕男子，與一位六七十歲、身穿深色傳統中式服裝的年長女性，在台灣的山坡墓地合影。他們站在一座刻有「彭」姓的花崗岩墓碑前，碑文提及民國五三年春（1964年）。背景是長滿雜草的山坡，應是一次家族掃墓探訪。
photos.location: Taiwan - hillside cemetery

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely a photo studio or wedding venue
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait of a young couple posed against a plain light-colored backdrop. The bride wears a white high-collared dress with delicate fl
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦的正式婚禮合照，背景為素色牆面。新娘穿著白色高領蕾絲花卉刺繡禮服，搭配珍珠項鍊，髮型為當時流行的肩上捲髮。新郎穿著深色西裝、繫深色領帶，戴著粗框眼鏡，兩人正面面對鏡頭。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely a photo studio or wedding venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A wedding reception cake-cutting moment where the groom, wearing a dark suit and glasses, feeds cake to the bride, who is in a white lace wedding dres
photos.description_zh: 婚宴上切蛋糕的溫馨時刻，新郎穿著深色西裝、戴著眼鏡，正將蛋糕餵給身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴花飾頭紗的新娘。背景是紅色布幔搭配金色裝飾，桌上擺著多層結婚蛋糕。左側坐著一位女性，可能是新娘的母親，帶著溫暖的笑容注視著這一幕。
photos.location: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Likely United States or Taiwan — indoor venue (church or community hall) with Chinese decorative elements and American-style wood paneling
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait showing the bride and groom flanked by an older couple, likely parents. The bride wears a white high-collar lace wedding dre
photos.description_zh: 一張正式的婚禮合照，新郎新娘與一對年長夫婦合影，應為父母。新娘身穿白色高領蕾絲婚紗，頭戴花飾與面紗；新郎穿深色西裝，胸前別著白色胸花。右側年長女士身穿粉紅色花紋旗袍，手提藤編手袋；左側年長男士穿灰色西裝。背景可見紅色刺繡布幔與金色裝飾，場地似為教堂或宴會廳，牆面為木質護板。
photos.location: Likely United States or Taiwan — indoor venue (church or community hall) with Chinese decorative elements and American-style wood paneling

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States - wedding banquet venue
photos.description_en: A wedding reception photo showing the bride feeding cake to the groom. The bride wears a white wedding dress with a lace veil and floral headpiece, sm
photos.description_zh: 這是一張婚宴上切蛋糕的照片。新娘穿著白色婚紗、戴著蕾絲頭紗和花飾，笑容滿面地餵新郎吃蛋糕。新郎身穿深色西裝，胸前別著白色胸花，微微前傾接受餵食。右側坐著一位戴眼鏡的男士，可能是伴郎或親友。背景是粉紅色花布搭配金色裝飾，桌上可見婚禮蛋糕，充滿喜慶氣氛。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States - wedding banquet venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain scenic area
photos.description_en: Three people pose together at a scenic mountain overlook with misty, forested hills in the background. A younger man in glasses and a patterned shirt
photos.description_zh: 三人在山景觀景處合影，背景是雲霧繚繞的翠綠山巒。左邊是一位戴眼鏡、穿花襯衫的年輕男子，中間是一位穿著深色傳統中式上衣的年長女性，右邊是一位穿著花紋上衣搭配紅色外套的年輕女子。拍攝地點看似台灣的山區風景區。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain scenic area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely a home or banquet setting
photos.description_en: Two women pose together indoors during what appears to be a longevity birthday celebration (壽宴). An elderly woman wearing glasses and a dark leaf-patt
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在室內合影，背景為一場壽宴慶祝活動。年長的女性戴著眼鏡，穿著深色花紋上衣，坐在前方；年輕女性身穿紅綠格紋背心搭配紅色高領毛衣，站在身後。旁邊可見粉紅色大型壽字裝飾及紅色禮盒，顯示這是一場重要的祝壽場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, likely a home or banquet setting

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A wedding reception scene showing the bride in a white dress with floral veil and pearl necklace seated beside the groom in a dark suit and glasses. A
photos.description_zh: 婚宴場景，新娘身穿白色婚紗、頭戴花卉頭紗、佩戴珍珠項鍊，與戴眼鏡、穿深色西裝的新郎並肩而坐。新娘左側坐著一位女性，新郎右側坐著一位戴眼鏡的男性。桌上擺著一座三層白色婚禮蛋糕，點綴粉紅色裝飾。背後木板牆上掛著紅底金字的囍字布幔。
photos.location: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - airport terminal (likely Taipei Songshan Airport)
photos.description_en: A group of formally dressed men and their family members pose together in what appears to be an airport terminal or institutional building with large
photos.description_zh: 一群穿著正式的男士與家人在疑似機場航廈或公共建築內合影，背景為大片百葉窗。四位穿西裝大衣的男士並肩站立，其中一人抱著一名穿紅色衣服的幼兒。前方站著一位約五、六歲的小女孩，後方隱約可見幾位女性。
photos.location: Taiwan - airport terminal (likely Taipei Songshan Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A bride and groom pose behind a three-tiered wedding cake at their wedding reception. The bride wears a white lace gown with a veil and pearl necklace
photos.description_zh: 新娘與新郎在婚宴上坐在三層結婚蛋糕後方合影。新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴白紗、配戴珍珠項鍊，新郎則穿著深色西裝、戴著粗框眼鏡，胸口別著白色胸花。背景是紅色布幕搭配金色裝飾，左側隱約可見中文字樣的布條，呈現典型的台灣或華人婚宴場景。
photos.location: Taiwan - wedding banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - church interior
photos.description_en: A wedding portrait taken at the altar of a church, showing the bride and groom flanked by a bridesmaid and best man. The bride wears a white gown with
photos.description_zh: 一張在教堂聖壇前拍攝的婚禮合照，新娘與新郎站在中間，兩旁分別是伴娘與伴郎。新娘身穿白色婚紗、頭戴蕾絲頭紗，手捧一束雛菊花束；新郎與伴郎則穿著深色西裝並佩戴胸花。背景牆上可見十字架，右側立有中華民國國旗，顯示這可能是一間台灣的教會。
photos.location: Taiwan - church interior

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — studio portrait
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait of a young couple posed against a plain studio background. The bride wears a white high-collared lace dress with sheer sleev
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦的正式婚紗照，以素色背景拍攝。新娘身穿白色高領蕾絲禮服，配戴珍珠項鍊，袖子為透明薄紗材質；新郎穿著深色西裝搭配領帶，戴著大框眼鏡。兩人看起來約二十多歲，照片偏暖的色調顯示為七零年代的沖印風格。
photos.location: Taiwan — studio portrait

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - church interior
photos.description_en: A wedding portrait taken in a church, showing the bride and groom posing with a third man, likely a best man or close relative. The bride wears a whit
photos.description_zh: 一張在教堂拍攝的婚禮合照，新娘與新郎和一位男士（可能是伴郎或近親）合影留念。新娘身穿高領蕾絲白色婚紗，頭戴花飾頭紗，手持雛菊瀑布式捧花。新郎站在中間，戴著眼鏡，身穿深色西裝並佩戴胸花，右邊的男士則穿著一套顯眼的條紋西裝。
photos.location: Taiwan - church interior

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States - indoors, wedding venue or photo studio
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait of a young couple. The bride wears a white high-collar lace wedding gown with an elaborate lace-trimmed veil adorned with fl
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕新人的正式婚禮合照。新娘身穿白色高領蕾絲婚紗，頭戴精緻的蕾絲花邊頭紗，配戴珍珠項鏈。新郎穿著深色西裝、白襯衫與深色領帶，戴著大框眼鏡。兩人在素色背景前合影留念，可能攝於婚禮會場或攝影棚。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States - indoors, wedding venue or photo studio

photos.location_detail: Church, likely in Taiwan or the United States
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait of a young couple standing at the altar of a Christian church. The bride wears a white lace wedding gown with a long veil ad
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕新人在基督教堂聖壇前的正式婚紗合照。新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗，頭戴綴有花飾的長頭紗，手捧雛菊瀑布型花束。新郎身著深色西裝，佩戴胸花，戴著粗框眼鏡。兩人身旁擺放著粉紅與白色的大型花藝裝飾，背後可見十字架。
photos.location: Church, likely in Taiwan or the United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States - indoors, banquet hall or church hall
photos.description_en: A decorated wedding reception table with an elaborate floral display. The table is covered with a pink patterned tablecloth and features a wedding cak
photos.description_zh: 婚禮宴會的佈置桌面，桌上鋪著粉色花紋桌布，擺放著婚禮蛋糕、杯盤，以及由劍蘭、康乃馨和菊花組成的精緻花藝裝飾，花朵從桌面垂落而下。牆上掛有紅色的裝飾布幔。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States - indoors, banquet hall or church hall

photos.location_detail: Observation deck overlooking a coastal city, possibly in Taiwan or the western United States
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together at an observation deck or elevated viewpoint overlooking a sprawling cityscape with the ocean visible in the distance. T
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在高處觀景台合影，背後可見廣闊的城市景觀及遠方的海洋。女方身穿粉紅色洋裝搭配紅橘色針織外套，手提深色手提包；男方穿著灰色西裝打領帶，戴著大框眼鏡。從照片的暖色調褪色效果和服裝風格來看，推測拍攝於1970年代中期，可能是蜜月旅行或與婚禮相關的旅程。
photos.location: Observation deck overlooking a coastal city, possibly in Taiwan or the western United States

photos.location_detail: Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店), Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A young woman stands on the front steps of the Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店) in Taipei, Taiwan, wearing a dark sweater with a large sunflower appliqué design an
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子站在台北圓山大飯店前方的階梯上，身穿深色毛衣，上面有大朵向日葵貼花圖案，肩背手提包。背景可見飯店標誌性的紅色廊柱、中國宮殿式建築與華麗的金色琉璃瓦屋頂，入口處停放著幾輛七〇年代的轎車。
photos.location: Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店), Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outside a hotel (酒店)
photos.description_en: A family of four poses in front of a hotel (酒店) in Taiwan. A young woman in plaid bell-bottoms stands beside a middle-aged woman who holds a toddler i
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在台灣一間酒店前合影。左邊的年輕女子穿著格紋喇叭褲，中間的中年婦女抱著一個穿紅色花衣的幼兒，右邊的中年男子身穿深色西裝外套。背景可見酒店門口及裝飾用的假山石。
photos.location: Taiwan - outside a hotel (酒店)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — temple or traditional garden/park
photos.description_en: A young woman in a pink blouse holds a toddler girl in a floral dress, posing in front of an ornate traditional Chinese temple or garden complex. The
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿粉色上衣的年輕女子抱著一個穿碎花洋裝的小女孩，在一座色彩繽紛的傳統廟宇或園林建築前合影。背景可見綠色琉璃瓦屋頂的亭閣、紅粉相間的牆面，以及典型的假山造景。
photos.location: Taiwan — temple or traditional garden/park

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoors near institutional or government building
photos.description_en: Three people pose outdoors in front of a large modern building, likely in Taiwan. A young man in a pinstripe suit and wide tie stands on the left, a y
photos.description_zh: 三人在一棟現代建築前合影，地點可能在台灣。左邊是一位穿著條紋西裝、打寬版花紋領帶的年輕男子，中間是一位穿著黑色上衣搭配彩色條紋裙的年輕女子，正撥弄著頭髮，右邊是一位穿著深色中式立領外套、戴眼鏡的年長女性。身後隱約可見一輛汽車。
photos.location: Taiwan - outdoors near institutional or government building

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential living room
photos.description_en: A young Asian woman in her 20s stands smiling in a living room, wearing a coral/salmon-colored sleeveless button-front dress with a white flower corsa
photos.description_zh: 一位約二十多歲的年輕女性站在客廳中微笑，身穿珊瑚粉色無袖排扣洋裝，胸前別著白色花朵胸花。室內可見花紋壁紙、花布沙發、蕾絲窗簾及牆上的裝飾面具。從胸花及照片歸檔於婚禮資料夾來看，這應是與婚禮相關的場合所拍攝。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential living room

photos.location_detail: indoors - bedroom, likely Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: A young Asian woman leans over an ornate wooden vanity, gazing at her reflection in a carved mirror as she prepares herself. The vanity is covered wit
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕的亞洲女性俯身在一張雕花木製梳妝台前，凝視著鏡中的自己，正在梳妝打扮。梳妝台上擺滿了化妝品、香水瓶和各式美容用品。她身穿一件無袖的綠色佩斯利花紋洋裝，背景可見黃色荷葉邊窗簾，似乎是在臥室中為婚禮或特別場合做準備。
photos.location: indoors - bedroom, likely Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A woman holds a baby dressed in a white gown and white bonnet, posing in front of a large decorative tapestry depicting deer in a forest scene. The se
photos.description_zh: 一位女性抱著一個穿著白色洋裝、戴著白色帽飾的嬰兒，背景是一幅鹿群森林圖案的大型掛毯。室內陳設為典型的七〇年代風格，掛毯下方是一台木製音響櫃，上面擺著一盆小型盆栽。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan — entrance gate of the East-West Cross-Island Highway
photos.description_en: A couple poses in front of the iconic gate of the East-West Cross-Island Highway (東西橫貫公路) at the entrance to Taroko Gorge in Hualien, Taiwan. The man
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在花蓮太魯閣東西橫貫公路牌樓前合影留念。男子戴眼鏡，穿著棕色花紋襯衫搭配寬領帶；女子身穿深藍色外套。身後是傳統中式牌樓，紅柱琉璃瓦，山巒雲霧繚繞，周圍可見其他遊客。
photos.location: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan — entrance gate of the East-West Cross-Island Highway

photos.location_detail: Taipei, Taiwan — likely near the Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店) area or Martyrs' Shrine (忠烈祠), based on the red paifang gate and white marble balustrades
photos.description_en: Two women pose on a large stone-paved plaza in front of a traditional Chinese paifang (ornamental gate) with red pillars. The woman on the left wears
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在一座傳統中式牌坊前的石板廣場上合影。左邊的女性穿著淺色外套、紅色領巾和喇叭褲，右邊的女性穿著繡有向日葵圖案的黑色衣裳。背景可見幾位遊客，遠處是朦朧的城市景觀與山丘。
photos.location: Taipei, Taiwan — likely near the Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店) area or Martyrs' Shrine (忠烈祠), based on the red paifang gate and white marble balustrades

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - residential or institutional courtyard
photos.description_en: Two adults, likely grandparents, stand outside a building holding hands with a toddler between them. The child wears a traditional red patterned padde
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦牽著一個約兩三歲的小孩站在建築物外面。小孩穿著傳統的紅色花棉襖，可能是農曆新年期間拍攝的。背景是有假山造景的庭院，看起來像是台灣的住宅或機構建築。
photos.location: Taiwan - residential or institutional courtyard

photos.location_detail: Northeast coast of Taiwan, possibly near Yehliu (野柳) or Keelung (基隆) area
photos.description_en: A large family group of 11 people — seven adults and four children — poses together at a scenic rocky coastline, likely along Taiwan's northeast coast
photos.description_zh: 一個大家庭共十一人——七位大人和四個小孩——在台灣東北角海岸的岩石景點前合影。大人們站成一排，孩子們在前方，其中一位穿著鮮紅色衣服的小女孩站在正中間。背景可見一座突出的岬角岩石與灰濛濛天空下的海面。
photos.location: Northeast coast of Taiwan, possibly near Yehliu (野柳) or Keelung (基隆) area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - northern coastal area (possibly Northeast Coast or similar rocky shoreline)
photos.description_en: Three young women pose together at a rocky coastal pier, with the ocean, rocky shoreline, and green hillside behind them. The woman on the left wears
photos.description_zh: 三位年輕女性在海邊的石造碼頭上合影，背景可見海洋、岩岸與翠綠山丘。左邊的女性穿著紫色花洋裝，中間的女性穿著黑底大向日葵圖案的上衣，右邊的女性穿著花襯衫搭配紅色絲巾與淺藍色喇叭褲。右側背景可見一名小男孩。
photos.location: Taiwan - northern coastal area (possibly Northeast Coast or similar rocky shoreline)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - public landmark or memorial building
photos.description_en: A woman in a coral-red outfit stands at the top of an outdoor staircase in front of a striking modernist structure featuring tall white pillars with t
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿珊瑚紅色服裝的女子站在戶外階梯頂端，身後是一座造型獨特的現代主義建築，有著高聳的白色樹形柱子、波浪紋裝飾圍欄和蓮花造型路燈。階梯左下方可見一名小孩。建築風格看似台灣的某處知名公共建築或地標。
photos.location: Taiwan - public landmark or memorial building

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - scenic lake or reservoir area (possibly a popular tourist destination such as a reservoir park)
photos.description_en: A young woman in her 20s-30s poses outdoors at a scenic lakeside or reservoir area. She wears a pink ribbed turtleneck sweater under a red jacket, wit
photos.description_zh: 一位約二三十歲的年輕女性在湖邊或水庫的風景區拍照留念。她穿著粉紅色高領毛衣，外搭紅色外套，胸前別著一枚編號徽章（似乎寫著「66」），可能是旅行團的識別標誌。背景可見湖水、樹林、遠處的山丘，以及岸邊的其他遊客和腳踏車。
photos.location: Taiwan - scenic lake or reservoir area (possibly a popular tourist destination such as a reservoir park)

photos.location_detail: Airport terminal, likely Taiwan (CKS/Songshan Airport)
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family group poses at what appears to be an airport terminal, with large floor-to-ceiling windows visible behind them. An elderly
photos.description_zh: 一家多代人在機場航廈合影，身後可見大片落地窗。一位穿著深色大衣的年長女性站在一旁，旁邊是穿灰色西裝戴眼鏡的男士，他抱著一個穿紅色花衣的幼兒，另一個穿花上衣的小孩站在前方。背景中還可見幾位家人和旁觀者，場景像是接機或送機的聚會。
photos.location: Airport terminal, likely Taiwan (CKS/Songshan Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor wedding banquet venue
photos.description_en: A candid moment at a wedding reception showing the groom in a dark suit with large-frame glasses and a boutonniere greeting a guest in a brown suit, w
photos.description_zh: 婚宴上的溫馨一刻，新郎穿著深色西裝、戴著大框眼鏡，胸前別著胸花，正與一位穿棕色西裝的賓客寒暄。新娘身穿白色緞面婚紗，頭戴蕾絲邊紗和花飾，手持餐盤站在新郎身旁。周圍賓客面帶微笑，右側一位女士穿著鮮豔的花卉洋裝，場面熱鬧喜慶。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor wedding banquet venue

photos.location_detail: Observation tower — possibly Tokyo Tower (Japan) or a tower in Taiwan; popular honeymoon destinations for Taiwanese couples in the 1970s
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together at what appears to be an observation tower or high-rise viewing deck, with a geometric metal and glass lattice structure
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在觀景台或高樓觀景層合影，身後可見幾何造型的金屬與玻璃格狀結構，遠方是朦朧的城市景觀。男方戴著粗框眼鏡、穿著白色花紋短袖襯衫，女方穿著深橄欖色圓領上衣，戴著小耳環。從「婚禮」資料夾的分類推測，這可能是蜜月或婚後旅行時所拍攝的照片，地點或許是日本或台灣的觀景塔。
photos.location: Observation tower — possibly Tokyo Tower (Japan) or a tower in Taiwan; popular honeymoon destinations for Taiwanese couples in the 1970s

photos.location_detail: Taroko Gorge entrance (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A couple poses in front of the iconic entrance gate to the East-West Cross-Island Highway (東西橫貫公路) at Taroko Gorge in Hualien, Taiwan. The man wears g
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在花蓮太魯閣「東西橫貫公路」牌樓前合影留念。男士戴眼鏡、穿花紋襯衫配領帶，女士穿深色外套。背景可見雲霧繚繞的山巒和其他遊客，是典型的太魯閣國家公園入口景象。
photos.location: Taroko Gorge entrance (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan — near the Eternal Spring Shrine (長春祠)
photos.description_en: A family group of six poses at Taroko Gorge in Taiwan, with the iconic Eternal Spring Shrine (Changchun Shrine) and its waterfall visible in the backg
photos.description_zh: 一家六口在台灣太魯閣峽谷合影，背景可見著名的長春祠及瀑布，壯麗的大理石峭壁環繞四周。後排站著四位大人，前方有兩個孩子——一個穿牛仔外套的男孩和一個穿黃色背心的小女孩。翠綠的山景與紅色護欄構成了這張旅遊紀念照的美麗背景。
photos.location: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan — near the Eternal Spring Shrine (長春祠)

photos.location_detail: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien County, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A couple poses together at what appears to be Taroko Gorge in Taiwan. Behind them, dramatic marble cliff walls rise up, with lush vegetation and a tra
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在太魯閣峽谷合影留念。身後是壯觀的大理石峭壁，綠意盎然的植被中可見一座傳統中式涼亭。步道旁有裝飾性的動物雕塑與岩石河床，遠處還有其他遊客的身影。
photos.location: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien County, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - costume photo studio
photos.description_en: A family of three poses in traditional Chinese opera costumes at what appears to be a costume photo studio, a popular attraction in Taiwan. The woman
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在台灣常見的古裝照相館中拍攝紀念照。左邊的女士穿戴華麗的戲曲鳳冠與戲服，右邊的男士身著傳統官帽袍服，中間坐著一位年幼的小女孩。背景是充滿龍紋裝飾的紅金色傳統布景，氣氛喜慶。
photos.location: Taiwan - costume photo studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor street or market area
photos.description_en: A toddler girl, approximately 1-2 years old, sits on a concrete ledge outdoors, wearing a pink long-sleeved shirt with a yellow floral bib or vest and
photos.description_zh: 一個大約一到兩歲的小女孩坐在戶外的水泥矮牆上，穿著粉紅色長袖上衣、黃色花紋圍兜和紅色褲子。左側有一位穿著花紋裙子的女性站在旁邊，只拍到局部。背景是典型的台灣街景，停放著多輛摩托車和腳踏車。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor street or market area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — amusement park (possibly in northern Taiwan given the mountainous backdrop)
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man in a dark suit holds a toddler girl wearing a red floral outfit in a crowded parking lot outside an amusement park in Taiwan. A roll
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深色西裝的中年男子抱著一個穿紅色花衣的小女孩，站在台灣某遊樂園外的停車場。背景可見雲霄飛車和摩天輪，周圍停滿了七〇年代的汽車，人潮擁擠，看起來是假日出遊的熱鬧場景。
photos.location: Taiwan — amusement park (possibly in northern Taiwan given the mountainous backdrop)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - residential home courtyard
photos.description_en: An older couple stands outdoors holding the hands of a toddler between them, in front of what appears to be a Taiwanese residential building. The woma
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦站在台灣住宅建築前的庭院中，兩人各牽著中間一個幼兒的手。女士穿著深藍色鋪棉外套搭配白色高領衫和酒紅色長褲，男士穿著深藍色西裝。小孩約一到兩歲，穿著紅色花紋外套和粉紅色褲子，由兩位大人牽手站立，畫面溫馨。
photos.location: Taiwan - residential home courtyard

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — temple or cultural tourist attraction photo studio
photos.description_en: A family of three poses in an ornate traditional Chinese setting, likely a tourist photo studio at a temple or cultural attraction in Taiwan. The woma
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在華麗的傳統中式佈景前合影，可能是台灣某寺廟或觀光景點的紀念照攝影棚。母親戴著傳統鳳冠頭飾，父親穿灰色西裝、戴眼鏡，頭上也戴有傳統帽飾。一名穿紅色衣服的幼兒坐在父母中間，背景是精雕細琢的龍柱和金碧輝煌的傳統裝飾。
photos.location: Taiwan — temple or cultural tourist attraction photo studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A young mother sits on an ornately carved dark wooden sofa, holding a toddler on her lap while cradling a teacup in her other hand. The child, wearing
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕母親坐在雕花木製沙發上，膝上抱著一個活潑的幼兒，另一手端著茶杯，面帶微笑地看著孩子。小孩穿著粉紅色衣服和黃色圍兜，正揮著小手。客廳裡擺設著玻璃展示櫃、花卉壁紙和檯燈，呈現出1970年代末台灣家庭典型的溫馨居家氛圍。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - park or scenic area with old banyan tree
photos.description_en: A couple poses together in front of a massive banyan tree with sprawling exposed roots, likely at a park or scenic spot in Taiwan. The man wears glass
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在一棵巨大的老榕樹前合影，樹根盤根錯節，場景可能是台灣某處公園或風景區。男士戴眼鏡、穿深色外套搭配格紋襯衫，女士穿著醒目的紅色洋裝。樹幹旁隱約可見一塊小告示牌。
photos.location: Taiwan - park or scenic area with old banyan tree

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — multiple scenic and cultural tourist sites, possibly including Taroko Gorge or similar mountainous/coastal areas
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing ten black-and-white photographs documenting a group sightseeing trip in Taiwan. The photos show young adults visiting
photos.description_zh: 一頁掃描的相簿，共有十張黑白照片，記錄了一群年輕人在台灣各風景名勝的旅遊活動。照片中可見傳統拱橋、中式廟宇、岩石步道及原住民獨木舟展示等景點。左下角另有一張小型人像照。
photos.location: Taiwan — multiple scenic and cultural tourist sites, possibly including Taroko Gorge or similar mountainous/coastal areas

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — recreational lake (possibly Sun Moon Lake / 日月潭 or similar tourist lake)
photos.description_en: A family group of seven poses at a lakeside boat dock during a recreational outing. Four adults stand on the dock behind a small motorboat numbered 48
photos.description_zh: 一家七口在湖邊碼頭合影留念。四位大人站在碼頭上，三個小孩坐在編號48的小遊艇裡。湖面上有許多遊船，遠方可見青翠的山丘，應為台灣著名的湖泊風景區。
photos.location: Taiwan — recreational lake (possibly Sun Moon Lake / 日月潭 or similar tourist lake)

photos.location_detail: Moon World (月世界) badlands, Tianliao, Kaohsiung, Taiwan
photos.description_en: Two men in their 30s-40s pose together outdoors in front of a dramatic badlands landscape of eroded mudstone hills. The man on the left wears a short-
photos.description_zh: 兩位約三、四十歲的男性在荒涼的惡地地形前合影。左邊的男士穿著短袖格紋襯衫和喇叭褲，右邊的男士穿著棗紅色針織外套、打領帶，手持相機。背景中被侵蝕的泥岩山丘非常像是高雄田寮的「月世界」惡地景觀，應為一次觀光旅遊時所拍攝。
photos.location: Moon World (月世界) badlands, Tianliao, Kaohsiung, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — hilltop scenic overlook, possibly southern or central Taiwan near aquaculture areas
photos.description_en: A man in his 30s wearing glasses and a patterned shirt holds a toddler (approximately 1-2 years old) in a floral outfit at a scenic hilltop overlook.
photos.description_zh: 一位戴眼鏡、穿著花紋襯衫的三十多歲男子，抱著一個約一至兩歲、穿著碎花衣服的幼兒，在一處高處的觀景點合影。背景是開闊的平地景觀，可見魚塘、河流與綠樹，地點疑似在台灣。畫面上方有松樹枝條入鏡。
photos.location: Taiwan — hilltop scenic overlook, possibly southern or central Taiwan near aquaculture areas

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older man in traditional dark Chinese clothing sits on a sofa alongside a young woman holding a toddler in a pink outfit on her lap. The child is c
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深色傳統中式服裝的長輩與年輕女性坐在沙發上，女性懷中抱著一個穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。小孩手裡拿著紅包，看起來像是農曆新年或家庭聚會的場景。室內擺設溫馨，沙發上有白色蕾絲桌巾，旁邊的小桌上放著裝飾品。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hillside scenic overlook, possibly overlooking a river estuary or fish pond area
photos.description_en: A young woman holding a toddler girl at an elevated scenic overlook, with a river, fish ponds or flooded fields, and distant mountains visible in the
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性抱著一個約兩歲的小女孩，站在高處的觀景台上。背景可見河流、魚塭或水田，以及遠方朦朧的山脈。女性穿著粉色上衣，面帶微笑望向鏡頭，小女孩穿著碎花衣服，直視著相機。拍攝地點似乎是台灣某處山丘上的觀景點，俯瞰著河岸或沿海風景。
photos.location: Taiwan - hillside scenic overlook, possibly overlooking a river estuary or fish pond area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older couple sits on a patterned sofa with a young girl (approximately 2-3 years old) between them. The child holds a small beach ball and wears a
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦坐在花紋沙發上，中間抱著一個約兩三歲的小女孩。小女孩穿著紅色衣服，手裡拿著一顆小球。女士穿紅色上衣，男士穿灰色毛衣。牆上掛著一幅日式浮世繪風格的畫作，旁邊有一台壁掛式電話。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoor garden or park
photos.description_en: Two women pose together beneath a large, vibrant pink bougainvillea arch in what appears to be a garden or park setting. The younger woman on the left
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在一座盛開的桃紅色九重葛花拱下合影，地點看似一座花園或公園。左邊較年輕的女性穿著深藍色上衣搭配粉紅色裙子，右邊較年長的女性穿著紫灰色服裝並戴著太陽眼鏡。她們站在低矮的金屬欄杆後方，背景可見熱帶植物與樹木。
photos.location: Taiwan - outdoor garden or park

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - park or scenic area, possibly a location like Chengcing Lake (澄清湖) or a similar popular park with a traditional stone bridge
photos.description_en: A couple poses together at what appears to be a park or scenic lake area in Taiwan. The man wears glasses and a patterned short-sleeve shirt with a ca
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在台灣某處公園或風景區的湖邊合影。男方戴眼鏡，穿著花紋短袖襯衫，肩上背著相機包；女方穿著棕紅色有領上衣，手持小包。背景是一座傳統白色石橋橫跨湖面，橋上遊客眾多，顯示這是一處熱門的休閒景點。
photos.location: Taiwan - park or scenic area, possibly a location like Chengcing Lake (澄清湖) or a similar popular park with a traditional stone bridge

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - temple or public park garden
photos.description_en: A young woman in her early-to-mid twenties poses for a portrait in a landscaped garden featuring a Buddha statue, a pond with rocks, and lush tropical
photos.description_zh: 一位二十出頭的年輕女性在一座有佛像、池塘和熱帶植物的庭園中拍攝肖像照。她穿著深色有領上衣搭配條紋針織背心，別著一枚鉤針編織的花朵胸針，頭髮是及肩的柔和波浪捲。照片溫暖的色調和圓角印刷風格是1970年代末的典型特徵。
photos.location: Taiwan - temple or public park garden

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain scenic area
photos.description_en: Three people pose together at a mountainous scenic overlook with misty, forested hills in the background. A man in glasses and a short-sleeve shirt st
photos.description_zh: 三人在山區景點合影，背景是雲霧繚繞的翠綠山巒。一位戴眼鏡、穿短袖花襯衫的男士站在一位身穿深色衣服的年長女性身後，右邊是一位穿著花紋上衣搭配紅色外套的年輕女性。蒼翠的山景和朦朧的遠山，看起來像是在台灣山區旅遊時拍攝的照片。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain scenic area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A young family of four poses together indoors. The father, wearing glasses and a gray sweater, sits holding an infant in yellow-striped clothing, whil
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在室內合影。父親戴著眼鏡、穿灰色毛衣，坐著抱著一個穿黃色條紋衣服的嬰兒；母親穿深色毛衣站在旁邊，抱著一個穿粉紅色連身衣的小女孩。背景是客廳的窗簾和鐵窗。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family group portrait taken indoors, likely during a gathering to welcome a newborn baby. An older couple sits at center — the gr
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家族合照，拍攝於室內，可能是為了迎接新生兒而聚會。祖父母坐在中央，祖母懷中抱著穿白衣的嬰兒，祖父穿著深色中式外套；旁邊坐著一對年輕夫婦，丈夫抱著穿粉紅色衣服的小女孩。後排站著五位年輕的家人，整體畫面溫馨熱鬧，是典型的家族團聚場景。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential home
photos.description_en: An older couple sits on a patterned sofa with a young girl (approximately 2-3 years old) on the man's lap, likely grandparents with their granddaughte
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦坐在花紋沙發上，男士膝上抱著一個約兩三歲的小女孩，看起來是祖孫三人的合照。小女孩穿著紅色洋裝，手裡抱著一顆球，笑得很開心。背景是台灣住家的客廳，牆上掛著一幅日式浮世繪風格的畫作和一部壁掛式電話。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely family home
photos.description_en: Two young girls sit together on a brown cushioned bench indoors, the older one (around 8-10 years old) wearing a red floral traditional Chinese-style
photos.description_zh: 兩個小女孩坐在室內棕色軟墊長椅上，年紀較大的女孩（約八到十歲）穿著紅色碎花中式上衣，手提一盞粉色小燈籠。年幼的妹妹（約三到五歲）穿著圓點洋裝搭配紅色針織背心，開心地大笑。燈籠和喜慶的紅色服飾顯示這可能是農曆新年或元宵節期間拍攝的照片。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, likely family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A large extended family group photo taken at an indoor banquet hall, featuring approximately 60-70 people spanning at least three generations. An elde
photos.description_zh: 一張大家族合照，攝於室內宴會廳，約有六、七十人，橫跨至少三代。一對年長夫婦端坐中央，周圍環繞著中年親屬、年輕一輩，以及前排眾多幼童。背景可見紅色裝飾（疑似「壽」字），推測為家中長輩的壽宴慶祝場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - northern coast (possibly Yehliu/野柳 or Keelung/基隆 coastal area)
photos.description_en: A woman and a young child pose together at a rocky coastal shoreline. The woman stands behind the child with her arms wrapped affectionately around th
photos.description_zh: 一位女性與一個小孩在海邊岩岸合影。女性站在小孩身後，雙手溫柔地環抱著孩子的肩膀。背景是平靜的海面與裸露的礁石，遠處可見海蝕地形，看起來像是台灣北海岸的風景區。
photos.location: Taiwan - northern coast (possibly Yehliu/野柳 or Keelung/基隆 coastal area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — northern coastal area (possibly Keelung, Yehliu, or northeast coast)
photos.description_en: A young woman poses at a rocky coastal shoreline, wearing a dark brown knitted sweater with a bold sunflower design over an olive turtleneck, with a s

photos.location: Taiwan — northern coastal area (possibly Keelung, Yehliu, or northeast coast)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home living room
photos.description_en: A smiling woman in a red/maroon blouse sits on a colorfully patterned sofa holding a young toddler (approximately 2-3 years old) on her lap. The child
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著紅色上衣的女士面帶笑容坐在色彩繽紛的沙發上，懷中抱著一個約兩三歲的幼兒。小孩穿著粉紅色上衣，手裡拿著一顆紅白相間的小皮球，表情活潑開心。客廳牆上掛著幾幅畫作，包括一幅日式浮世繪風格的版畫，旁邊的茶几上擺著青瓷罐和插有花枝的花瓶。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home or apartment
photos.description_en: An older man wearing a dark beanie and red jacket sits on a couch with a young girl on his lap, both smiling warmly. The girl, approximately 3-5 years
photos.description_zh: 一位戴著深色毛帽、穿著紅色外套的年長男性坐在沙發上，膝上抱著一個約三到五歲的小女孩，兩人都笑得很開心。小女孩穿著紅色的衣服，裡面搭配條紋毛衣。客廳牆上掛著一幅畫作和壁掛式對講機，沙發上鋪著蕾絲桌巾，看起來是溫馨的家庭場景。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoor garden or courtyard

photos.description_zh: 一位身穿深色上衣的年輕女子站在前景微笑，身後是盛開的紅色九重葛。她左側可見一位穿著襯衫、打著寬版花領帶的男子。兩人似乎在一棟淺色建築旁的花園或庭院中。

photos.location_detail: Northern coast of Taiwan, possibly Yehliu (野柳) or Keelung coast area
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together on a seaside walkway along a rocky coastline, likely in northern Taiwan. The woman wears a dark sweater with a large sun
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在海邊步道上合影，背景是岩石海岸線，可能位於台灣北海岸。女方穿著印有大朵向日葵圖案的深色毛衣搭配喇叭褲，男方戴眼鏡，穿著菱格紋V領毛衣與西褲。遠方可見突出的岩石海岬，看起來像是一處風景優美的海岸觀光景點。
photos.location: Northern coast of Taiwan, possibly Yehliu (野柳) or Keelung coast area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoor park or temple grounds

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.description_zh: 一張在室內沙發上拍攝的多代家庭合照。一位年長男性與女性坐在一起，女性膝上坐著一個手拿小彩球的幼兒，旁邊還有一位年輕女性面帶笑容。前方桌上擺著傳統茶具，家中可見青瓷罐等中式裝飾擺設。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely a home or apartment

photos.description_zh: 一群成年人在室內聚會，看起來像是台灣的客廳或公共空間。一位戴眼鏡、穿西裝外套的男士坐在窗邊低頭看手中的東西，旁邊一位穿花紋毛衣的女士坐在椅子上望向鏡頭。左前方可見一位穿粉紅色毛衣的人的背影，右側邊緣隱約可見第四個人。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, possibly home or public building

photos.description_zh: 兩個小孩坐在棕色皮質長椅上開心合影。較大的孩子約六到八歲，穿著紅色碎花上衣和紅褲子；較小的孩子約兩三歲，開心地大笑，手裡拿著一個傳統花燈玩具。長椅旁邊放著一個小手提包和一些小物品。

photos.description_zh: 一位年輕的東亞女性站在湖畔的高處，背景是一片平靜的湖水與遠處的樹林。她穿著磚紅色的有領襯衫搭配粉紅色裙子，肩上背著一個棕色皮革手提包。遠處的湖面上隱約可見小船或建築物。

photos.description_zh: 三位成人在一處山坡土路上合影，背後是裸露的土壁。左邊的女士身穿紅色洋裝、手提深色皮包，兩位男士穿著休閒長褲與上衣站在她旁邊。場景看似山區或風景區，可能是一次郊遊踏青。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely a home or restaurant/banquet venue
photos.description_en: A formal portrait of a young couple, likely taken at their wedding or engagement celebration. The man wears a dark suit with a white shirt, dark tie,
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦的正式合照，可能攝於他們的婚禮或訂婚宴會。男方穿著深色西裝、白襯衫、深色領帶，戴著大框眼鏡；女方身穿白色高領蕾絲禮服，佩戴珍珠項鍊。兩人身後掛著一幅繪有鹿與自然風景的裝飾壁毯，場景看似在家中或宴會廳內。

photos.description_zh: 一位年輕的東亞女性穿著深色上衣，在戶外花園或庭院中被拍攝，身後有鮮紅色的花朵和熱帶植物。她左邊有一位穿灰色西裝、打花紋領帶的男士，似乎正經過。背景看起來像是飯店、餐廳或公共花園的環境。

photos.description_en: A family of three sits together on a couch in their home, all wearing matching red outfits. A woman holds a smiling toddler girl on her lap while a ma
photos.description_zh: 一家三口穿著紅色的運動服，一起坐在家中的沙發上。母親抱著一個笑容燦爛的小女孩，父親戴著深色毛帽坐在旁邊，溫柔地看著孩子。牆上掛著一幅日式浮世繪風格的畫作和一部壁掛式電話。

photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A young Asian family of four poses together indoors, likely in their living room. The father sits in a chair wearing glasses and a gray sweater, holdi
photos.description_zh: 一個年輕的四口之家在客廳裡合照。父親戴著眼鏡、穿著灰色毛衣坐在椅子上，懷中抱著一個穿黃白條紋連身衣的嬰兒；母親站在後方，抱著一個穿粉紅色連身衣的小女孩，小女孩正頑皮地拿著父親的眼鏡。父母兩人都面帶溫暖的笑容望向鏡頭。

photos.location: Taiwan - likely Chengcing Lake (澄清湖) in Kaohsiung or a similar scenic lake/reservoir area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely a scenic lake area such as Sun Moon Lake (日月潭) or a similar reservoir
photos.description_en: A couple poses together on a hillside overlooking a large lake or reservoir. The woman wears a pink turtleneck under a red blazer, and the man wears a
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在湖邊的山坡上合影留念。女方穿著粉紅色高領衫搭配紅色西裝外套，男方穿著灰色西裝配寬版花領帶，兩人胸前都別著小名牌。背景是一片寬闊的湖面，岸邊停泊著幾艘小船，遠處可見起伏的青山。
photos.location: Taiwan — likely a scenic lake area such as Sun Moon Lake (日月潭) or a similar reservoir

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor studio or wedding venue
photos.description_en: A formal wedding portrait of a young couple. The bride wears a white high-neck lace wedding dress with a floral headpiece and lace veil, along with a
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕新人的正式結婚照。新娘身穿白色高領蕾絲婚紗，頭戴花飾頭紗，佩戴珍珠項鍊，笑容溫柔。新郎穿著深色西裝、打深色領帶，戴著粗框黑色眼鏡，兩人在素色背景前合影留念。

photos.description_zh: 兩位女性與一名小女孩在室內合影，應為婚禮場合。右方女性似為新娘，身穿白色緞面立領禮服，上有花卉刺繡及透明蕾絲長袖，佩戴珍珠項鍊。左方女性穿著深藍底白色圓點洋裝，搭配白色大領結，前方站著一位身穿淡紫色洋裝的小女孩。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - scenic lake or coastal area, possibly Sun Moon Lake (日月潭) or similar tourist destination
photos.description_en: A young woman in her late 20s to early 30s stands at a scenic overlook above a lake or bay. She wears a pink ribbed turtleneck sweater under a red car
photos.description_zh: 一位約二十多至三十歲出頭的年輕女性站在湖邊或海灣的觀景台上。她穿著粉紅色高領毛衣搭配紅色外套，胸前別著一枚小徽章，留著當時流行的蓬鬆短髮。背景可見樹林、碧綠的湖水，以及山下的遊憩區。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home living room
photos.description_en: A middle-aged woman holds a newborn baby wrapped in a white blanket in a living room setting. Behind her on the couch, a young girl (perhaps 8-10 year
photos.description_zh: 一位中年婦女在客廳中抱著一個用白色毯子包裹的新生兒。沙發上坐著一位約八到十歲的女孩穿著花紋上衣在旁觀看，最右邊還有一個約五六歲的小孩穿著深色衣服配白領。房間裡有厚重的窗簾、一盞還包著塑膠套的檯燈，以及典型七○年代末的居家擺設。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — possibly a geological or scenic site with eroded badlands terrain, such as the Moon World (月世界) area in Kaohsiung/Tainan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoors, likely a church or wedding venue
photos.description_en: A bride in a white high-neck lace wedding dress and floral veil headpiece stands smiling while holding a cascading bouquet of daisies. She is surround
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿白色高領蕾絲婚紗、頭戴花卉頭紗的新娘微笑著手持雛菊瀑布式捧花。她身旁圍繞著賓客，右側一位女性也手持花束，可能是伴娘或女儐相。室內場景看似教堂或宴會廳，周圍可見數位穿著七〇年代流行印花服飾的女性賓客。

photos.description_zh: 一位短髮年輕女性的側面照，她微笑地望向窗外。她穿著深色上衣，手輕靠在窗台邊，窗旁可見裝飾性的建築元素。照片泛著溫暖的褪色色調，散發出懷舊而沉思的氛圍。

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely Taipei, possibly near a government or institutional building from the Japanese colonial era (neoclassical architecture)

photos.location: Taiwan — likely Taipei, possibly near a government or institutional building from the Japanese colonial era (neoclassical architecture)

photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在幾何造型的玻璃金屬結構前合影，看起來像是某座觀景台或地標建築。男子戴著大框眼鏡，穿著白色印花襯衫；女子穿著深橄欖綠上衣，戴著小耳環。背景的三角形玻璃窗後方隱約可見天空，兩人似乎正在觀光旅遊中。
photos.location: Observation deck or tower — possibly a landmark in Taiwan or the United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — amusement park, likely in the Taipei area based on license plate
photos.description_en: A family outing at a Taiwanese amusement park, with a young woman in a plaid coat, a middle-aged woman, and a toddler she is holding, posing in front
photos.description_zh: 一家人在台灣遊樂園的合影，一位穿格子外套的年輕女性、一位中年女性抱著一個幼兒，三人站在一輛深色福特Cortina 1.6L轎車前。背景可見摩天輪和綠色山丘，以及遊樂園建築上的中文招牌。

photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深色西裝的年長男子抱著一個身穿紅色花紋冬裝的幼兒女孩，站在一輛深色福特Cortina轎車旁。背景是一棟標有「ALAND」字樣的建築物（可能是遊樂園或休閒場所的部分名稱），遠處可見青山。這看起來是在台灣某個觀光景點的家庭出遊照片。
photos.location: Taiwan - recreational/tourist venue (building sign partially reads "ALAND", possibly a theme park or resort area, with mountains in background)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor parking area near a building, with cypress trees and misty mountains in background
photos.description_en: A family photo taken outdoors in a parking area, likely in Taiwan during winter. A toddler in a red floral Chinese-style jacket is held by the hands b
photos.description_zh: 一張冬天在台灣戶外停車場拍攝的家庭照。一個穿著紅色花棉襖的幼兒被一位穿深色西裝外套的中年男士和一位穿傳統棉襖的年長女士牽著雙手站在中間。左邊站著一位穿格紋大衣、面帶微笑的年輕女子。背景可見朦朧的山丘和柏樹。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor parking area near a building, with cypress trees and misty mountains in background

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoors, family home or apartment
photos.description_en: A large multi-generational family group portrait taken indoors, likely during a Chinese New Year gathering. An older couple sits at center — the patri
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家族合照，攝於室內，可能是農曆新年的家庭聚會。年長的夫婦坐在中央，父親身穿藍色中式外套懷抱新生嬰兒，周圍圍繞著家人。後排站著五位成人，前排坐著四位成人及兩名幼童（一名嬰兒和一名穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒），三代共十一人齊聚一堂。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoors, family home or apartment

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older man in a traditional dark blue Chinese robe sits beside a younger woman holding a toddler in a pink outfit on her lap. The child clutches wha
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿深藍色長袍的年長男士與一位年輕女子並肩而坐，女子懷中抱著一個穿粉紅色衣服的幼童。小孩手中拿著疑似紅包的物品，顯示這可能是農曆新年的家庭聚會。背景是典型的台灣家庭客廳，木架上擺有青瓷花瓶，沙發上鋪著蕾絲桌巾和花布靠墊。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - amusement park, likely in a mountainous area
photos.description_en: A couple holds a young toddler girl between them at what appears to be an amusement park, with a Ferris wheel and forested hillside visible in the bac
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在遊樂園合照，兩人之間抱著一個小女孩。背景可見摩天輪和翠綠的山丘。男士穿著深色條紋西裝，女士穿著深藍色中式外套搭配粉色上衣和酒紅色長褲。小女孩身穿紅色碎花上衣和粉色褲子，腳穿小球鞋，直視鏡頭。
photos.location: Taiwan - amusement park, likely in a mountainous area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential apartment or home
photos.description_en: An indoor family scene showing a laughing toddler (around 2-3 years old) in a pink and green striped sweater reaching toward someone off-camera, with
photos.description_zh: 室內家庭場景，一個約兩三歲的幼兒穿著粉紅色條紋毛衣，開心地笑著伸手向鏡頭外的人。後方坐著一位戴深色帽子、穿紅色外套的中年男子，左側可見一位女性的背影。場景為台灣住宅的客廳，牆上掛有對講機電話、日式風格畫作，茶几上擺著碗碟。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential apartment or home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — scenic overlook at a dam/reservoir (possibly Shihmen Dam 石門水庫 or similar)
photos.description_en: A young woman in a black-and-white plaid coat over a yellow turtleneck holds a smiling toddler at a scenic overlook above a dam facility in Taiwan. Th
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著黑白格紋外套搭配黃色高領毛衣的年輕女子，在台灣某水庫的觀景台上抱著一個笑容滿面的幼兒。小女孩穿著紅色花紋衣服，頑皮地把大人的太陽眼鏡架在頭上。下方可見水庫設施、園區建築及綿延的翠綠山巒。
photos.location: Taiwan — scenic overlook at a dam/reservoir (possibly Shihmen Dam 石門水庫 or similar)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family gathering in a living room during winter, likely around Lunar New Year. A young woman holds a toddler in padded winter clothing on the left,
photos.description_zh: 冬季的家庭聚會，可能是農曆新年前後。一位年輕女性抱著穿棉襖的幼兒站在左側，其他家人圍坐在客廳的茶几旁，桌上擺著茶壺、茶杯和水果盤，包括橘子。氣氛溫馨自然，像是過年期間的家族團聚。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — mountainous scenic overlook, possibly near a reservoir or industrial area
photos.description_en: A family of four poses at a scenic overlook with red metal railings, high above a valley with industrial buildings and green hillsides below. Two midd
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在一處有紅色欄杆的高處觀景台合影，背景是山谷中的工業建築和翠綠山丘。兩位中年長輩、一位穿著黑白格紋大衣的年輕女性，以及一個穿紅色花紋冬衣的幼兒，在冬日裡緊靠在一起，笑容溫暖。
photos.location: Taiwan — mountainous scenic overlook, possibly near a reservoir or industrial area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - residential area, likely a family home
photos.description_en: An older couple stands outdoors holding the hands of a toddler between them, posed in front of a residential building with decorative rocks and a smal
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦站在住宅建築前，牽著中間一個約一歲半到兩歲的幼兒。背景可見庭院造景石和小花園。女士穿著深藍色棉襖配淺色高領毛衣和酒紅色長褲，男士穿著深色條紋西裝。小孩穿著紅色碎花棉襖和粉紅色褲子，可能是為了農曆新年而打扮。
photos.location: Taiwan - residential area, likely a family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel entrance (酒店)
photos.description_en: A family of three adults and a toddler pose in front of a hotel (酒店) in what appears to be Taiwan or China. A young woman in a distinctive black-and-w
photos.description_zh: 一家人在一間酒店前合影留念。一位穿著黑白格子大衣的年輕女性站在左邊，中間是一位中年婦女抱著一個穿紅色花外套的小女孩，右邊是一位穿深色西裝外套的中年男性。大家穿著厚重冬衣，背景可見酒店招牌及裝飾假山石。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel entrance (酒店)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family of four poses together on a patterned sofa in a cozy living room. An older man in a gray V-neck sweater sits beside a middle-aged woman in a
photos.description_zh: 一家四口坐在客廳的花紋沙發上合影。左邊的年長男士穿著灰色V領毛衣，中間的中年女士穿著紅色上衣，懷中抱著一個穿紅色吊帶褲、手拿彩色球的幼童，右邊是一位穿條紋衫的年輕女子，笑容溫暖。客廳擺設有青瓷擺件、茶杯組，牆上掛著轉盤式電話，充滿七零年代的家庭氛圍。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family gathering in a living room, likely during winter. Two young women sit on a sofa with crocheted doilies — one holding an in
photos.description_zh: 一家人在客廳裡的冬日聚會。兩位年輕女性坐在鋪著鉤花桌巾的沙發上，一位抱著嬰兒，另一位抱著穿黃色花上衣的幼兒，旁邊戴眼鏡穿深色毛衣的男性正在逗弄小孩。畫面兩側可見一對年長夫婦，前方茶几上擺放著茶具。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational Taiwanese family group photo taken indoors during winter, likely around Chinese New Year. An older couple sits in the center — th
photos.description_zh: 一張攝於冬季室內的多代台灣家庭合照，可能是農曆新年期間。年長的夫婦坐在中央，祖父抱著一個穿黃色條紋連身衣的熟睡嬰兒，旁邊一位年輕女性膝上坐著一個穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。五位年輕成人站在後排，穿著七〇年代末典型的毛衣和高領衫。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family group portrait taken indoors in a living room, likely during a winter gathering. An older couple sits at center — the patr
photos.description_zh: 一張在客廳拍攝的多代家庭合照，可能是冬季的家族聚會。中間坐著的年長夫婦中，父親穿著傳統中山裝，懷中抱著一名穿黃色條紋連身衣的熟睡嬰兒，旁邊的年輕女性抱著一名穿粉紅色衣服的小女孩。後排站著五位年輕的家庭成員，都穿著七零年代末期典型的高領毛衣。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family portrait of four people taken indoors. An elderly woman is seated in front wearing a dark navy coat and scarf, with three adults standing beh
photos.description_zh: 一張室內家庭合照，四位家人合影留念。一位年長女性坐在前方，身穿深藍色大衣圍著暗紅色圍巾；後方站著三位成年人——左邊是穿棕色高領毛衣的女性，中間是穿深色上衣圍著圍巾的男性，右邊是穿粉紅色針織衫的年輕女性。背景看起來是住家室內，可見素色牆面和深藍色布幔。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A smiling middle-aged woman holds a toddler (approximately 1-2 years old) in her arms inside a warmly lit home. The child wears a yellow floral top ov
photos.description_zh: 一位面帶笑容的中年女性在家中抱著一個約一到兩歲的幼兒。孩子穿著黃色花紋上衣、紅色褲子和白色襪子，女性則穿著灰色針織毛衣。背景可見木製餐櫃上擺放著裝飾品，窗戶掛著深色窗簾。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home or apartment
photos.description_en: A young woman in a pastel color-block turtleneck sweater holds a toddler dressed in a red outfit with white socks. They are standing in a living room
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性穿著粉彩色塊高領毛衣，抱著一個穿紅色衣服白襪子的幼兒。她們站在客廳裡，牆上掛著一幅日式浮世繪風格的畫作，旁邊有花布沙發和蕾絲桌巾。右側另有一人坐在桌旁。室內溫馨的佈置和厚重的衣著顯示是冬季時節。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home or apartment

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: Two young couples pose together on a couch in a living room, each family with a small child. The woman on the left holds a toddler girl (approximately
photos.description_zh: 兩對年輕夫婦帶著各自的小孩在客廳沙發上合影。左邊的女士抱著一個約一兩歲、穿著黃色花上衣的小女孩，右邊的男士則抱著一個熟睡的嬰兒。茶几上擺著茶具，牆上掛著傳統仕女圖和壁掛式電話。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: An older couple and a young toddler (around 2-3 years old) sit together on a couch in a living room, all smiling warmly. The adults wear matching mage
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦與一名約兩三歲的幼童坐在客廳沙發上，三人面帶笑容。兩位長輩穿著相配的桃紅色拉鍊外套，小孩穿著彩色條紋毛衣。牆上掛著一幅日式浮世繪風格的畫作，旁邊是壁掛式電話，沙發扶手上鋪著蕾絲桌巾。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older couple sits on a patterned sofa with a young girl (around 3-5 years old) on the woman's lap, all wearing matching red/magenta tracksuits. The
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦坐在花紋沙發上，女方懷中抱著一個約三到五歲的小女孩，三人都穿著紅色運動套裝。小女孩開心地笑著舉起雙手，祖父母慈祥地看著她。客廳牆上掛著壁掛式電話和一幅浮世繪風格的畫作，沙發上鋪著鉤針蕾絲巾——紅色衣著配合冬季時節，應是農曆新年期間的家庭合照。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older man in a traditional dark blue Chinese jacket sits beside a young woman holding a toddler on her lap in a warmly lit living room. The child,
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深藍色中式外套的年長男性與一位年輕女性並坐於客廳中，女性懷中抱著一名穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。小孩手中握著紅包，顯示這張照片應攝於農曆新年期間。背景中可見青瓷罐及蕾絲桌巾等傳統台灣家庭的擺設。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home or hotel/restaurant lobby
photos.description_en: Two young girls sit side by side on a brown tufted leather bench, both dressed in red for what appears to be a Lunar New Year celebration. The older g
photos.description_zh: 兩個小女孩並肩坐在棕色皮革長椅上，身穿紅色衣服，看起來正在慶祝農曆新年。年紀較大的女孩（約六到八歲）穿著傳統花布棉襖配紅色長褲，年紀較小的女孩（約兩到三歲）穿著紅色背心和色彩繽紛的衣服，開心地拿著一個傳統花燈。兩個孩子都對著鏡頭露出燦爛的笑容，拍攝地點似乎是在家中或大廳。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home or hotel/restaurant lobby

photos.location_detail: Cheng Ching Lake (澄清湖), Kaohsiung, Taiwan
photos.description_en: Two women pose together in front of the Cheng Ching Lake (澄清湖) sign in Kaohsiung, Taiwan on February 8, 1978. Both are wearing stylish 1970s clothing
photos.description_zh: 1978年2月8日，兩位女性在高雄澄清湖的標示牌前合影留念。兩人穿著七零年代流行的紅色與粉色系服裝，背景可見湖景及白色橋樑，遊客點綴其間。
photos.location: Cheng Ching Lake (澄清湖), Kaohsiung, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店), Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A woman stands on the grand white stone staircase in front of the iconic Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店) in Taipei, Taiwan. She wears a dark outfit with a promine
photos.description_zh: 一位女士站在台北圓山大飯店前方的寬闊白色石階上，身穿深色服裝，上面有醒目的向日葵圖案，自信地站在畫面中央。身後是圓山大飯店標誌性的中國宮殿式建築，紅色廊柱與華麗的傳統屋頂氣勢恢宏，背景中可見幾位遊客和停放的車輛。
photos.location: Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店), Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A multigenerational family group poses together on a sofa in a warmly decorated living room. Three adult women, an elderly man partially visible behin
photos.description_zh: 一個多代家庭在裝潢溫馨的客廳沙發上合照。三位成年女性、一位半隱在孩子身後的年長男性、一個約兩三歲笑容滿面的幼兒坐在女性膝上，以及一位穿著紅色花上衣約五到七歲的小女孩齊聚一堂。房間有花紋壁紙、桌燈、紅花花瓶和掛曆，充滿七〇年代末台灣家庭的典型風格。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - amusement park (possibly a park in a mountainous area)
photos.description_en: An older couple, likely grandparents, hold a toddler girl between them at what appears to be a Taiwanese amusement park. A Ferris wheel and a large de
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦在台灣遊樂園中合力抱著一名約兩三歲的小女孩合影。背景可見摩天輪和大型裝飾拱門，遠方是鬱鬱蔥蔥的青山。男士身穿深色西裝打領帶，女士穿著藍綠色中式立領外套配酒紅色長褲，小女孩則穿著紅色碎花上衣和粉色長褲。
photos.location: Taiwan - amusement park (possibly a park in a mountainous area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall
photos.description_en: A man in a gray suit with a red corsage stands and raises a glass in a toast at what appears to be a wedding banquet or formal celebration. Several wo
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿灰色西裝、胸前佩戴紅色胸花的男士站起來舉杯敬酒，場景看似婚宴或正式慶祝活動。幾位女士坐在圓桌旁，手持酒杯面帶笑容，右邊一位女士笑得掩住了嘴。背景是有花紋壁紙的餐廳宴會廳，歡樂的氣氛顯示這是一場婚宴或重要的慶祝場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Kaohsiung, Taiwan — likely Shoushan (壽山) overlook above Kaohsiung Harbor
photos.description_en: A young woman in her 20s-30s poses at a scenic overlook above a bustling harbor city, likely Kaohsiung, Taiwan. She wears a burgundy blouse with a tie
photos.description_zh: 一位二、三十歲的年輕女性在高處觀景點留影，背景是繁忙的港口城市，很可能是高雄港。她穿著酒紅色蝴蝶結領襯衫搭配粉紅色裙子，笑容滿面。身後可見港灣中停泊著許多貨船，城市街景延展開來，山路上有公車和行人來往。
photos.location: Kaohsiung, Taiwan — likely Shoushan (壽山) overlook above Kaohsiung Harbor

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - airport terminal (likely CKS/Taoyuan International Airport or Taipei Songshan Airport)
photos.description_en: A large multi-generational family group of approximately 17 people poses together inside an airport terminal, likely in Taiwan. The group spans three
photos.description_zh: 一個約十七人的大家族在機場航廈內合影，涵蓋三代人，從穿著深色大衣的年長女性到穿著紅色中式棉襖的幼兒。背景的大片玻璃帷幕牆和航廈走廊燈光，顯示這是在國際機場的送行或接機場景，這在當年台灣家庭出國移民時相當常見。
photos.location: Taiwan - airport terminal (likely CKS/Taoyuan International Airport or Taipei Songshan Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor apartment
photos.description_en: A casual indoor gathering at night in what appears to be a Taiwanese apartment living room. A woman in a pink top sits with her back to the camera in
photos.description_zh: 夜晚在台灣公寓客廳中的輕鬆聚會。前景一位穿粉紅色上衣的女性背對鏡頭而坐，中間一位戴眼鏡、穿灰色西裝外套的男性手持小物品，右側一位穿花紋上衣的女性正在比手畫腳地交談。整體氛圍溫馨自然，像是親友間的聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor apartment

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A toddler (approximately 1.5-2.5 years old) with a bowl-cut hairstyle stands behind a wooden crib or playpen railing, gripping the top rail and lookin
photos.description_zh: 一個約一歲半到兩歲半的幼兒站在木製嬰兒床的欄杆後方，雙手抓著欄杆上緣，面朝鏡頭望去。孩子留著齊瀏海的短髮，穿著粉色上衣，外面罩著一件鮮黃色的花卉圍兜。背景是佈置溫馨的家中客廳，木製家具上鋪著白色鉤針蕾絲桌巾，牆上掛著幾幅畫框。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — scenic or tourist area, possibly mountainous region
photos.description_en: A family group poses outdoors in what appears to be a parking area near a building, likely at a scenic or tourist spot in Taiwan. An older couple stan
photos.description_zh: 一家人在停車場附近的戶外合影，背景可見柏樹與霧氣繚繞的山丘，可能是台灣某處風景區。一對年長夫婦與一位年輕女性站在一起，中間一個約一歲半到兩歲的幼兒穿著紅色花紋外套，被祖父母牽著雙手站立。
photos.location: Taiwan — scenic or tourist area, possibly mountainous region

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — lakeside scenic area, possibly a reservoir (e.g., Sun Moon Lake or Tsengwen Reservoir)
photos.description_en: A family group of five poses at a lakeside scenic overlook, likely at a reservoir or lake in Taiwan. The group includes a young girl (around 5-7), two
photos.description_zh: 一家五口在湖畔風景區合影留念，背景可見湖水與遠山，應為台灣某水庫或湖泊景點。前排有一名約五至七歲的小女孩、兩名穿著相配牛仔外套與喇叭褲的男孩，以及兩位穿著時髦的女性。左後方另有一位穿著粉紫色洋裝的女子背對鏡頭站立。
photos.location: Taiwan — lakeside scenic area, possibly a reservoir (e.g., Sun Moon Lake or Tsengwen Reservoir)

photos.location_detail: Airport terminal, likely Taiwan (Taipei Songshan or early CKS/Taoyuan Airport)
photos.description_en: A large extended family group of approximately 12 people poses together in what appears to be an airport terminal corridor. Two elderly individuals st
photos.description_zh: 一個大家庭約十二人在機場航廈走廊合影留念。兩位長輩站在中間——一位戴眼鏡的老先生和一位穿深色大衣、手提皮包的老太太——周圍是數位穿著紅色與酒紅色衣服的中年女性、幾位男性，以及右側一位小孩。場景看似機場接機或送機，是那個年代台灣家庭常見的重要場合。
photos.location: Airport terminal, likely Taiwan (Taipei Songshan or early CKS/Taoyuan Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - northern or northeast coast (possibly Keelung, Yehliu, or northeast coast area)
photos.description_en: A young woman poses at a rocky seaside coastline, wearing a dark sweater with a large cross-stitch sunflower pattern over a turtleneck, with a shoulde
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子在海邊岩岸前留影，身穿深色高領毛衣，胸前有大朵十字繡向日葵圖案，肩上背著側背包。左後方一位年輕男子坐在水邊的岩石上。背景是綠色的丘陵海岸線，遠處可見突出的海岬。
photos.location: Taiwan - northern or northeast coast (possibly Keelung, Yehliu, or northeast coast area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — coastal scenic area, possibly northeast coast (Keelung/Yehliu area) or southern coast (Kenting)
photos.description_en: Two men in their 30s-40s pose together at a rocky coastal location with a prominent headland visible in the background. The man on the left wears glas
photos.description_zh: 兩位約三、四十歲的男士在海邊合影，背景可見突出的海岬和岩石海岸。左邊戴眼鏡的男士穿著菱格紋毛衣，手持小型相機或皮夾；右邊的男士穿著紅色開襟毛衣，內搭襯衫領帶。場景看似台灣海岸線上的觀景點，身後有混凝土防波堤，海浪拍打岩石。
photos.location: Taiwan — coastal scenic area, possibly northeast coast (Keelung/Yehliu area) or southern coast (Kenting)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoor wedding banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: A wedding reception scene showing the bride in a white lace wedding gown with veil and floral headpiece greeting guests alongside the groom, who wears
photos.description_zh: 婚宴上，新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴花飾頭紗，正與賓客寒暄。新郎戴眼鏡、穿深色西裝並佩戴白色胸花，站在一旁。兩人之間站著一位身穿粉色旗袍的女士，可能是新人的母親。背景可見其他賓客與宴會桌席。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoor wedding banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or Taiwanese-American home, indoors - living room
photos.description_en: An indoor family gathering in a living room decorated with Chinese art, including a prominent plum blossom ink painting with calligraphy. Two women an
photos.description_zh: 一張在客廳拍攝的家庭聚會照片，牆上掛著一幅梅花國畫與書法。照片中有兩位女性和一位年輕女子，右邊的女性抱著一個穿紅色衣服的幼兒。室內擺設有木雕擺件、玉樹盆栽和傳統裝飾品，呈現出典型的台灣家庭風格。
photos.location: Taiwan or Taiwanese-American home, indoors - living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor wedding reception venue
photos.description_en: A bride in a white lace wedding dress with a veil and floral headpiece stands smiling at her wedding reception, surrounded by guests. Two men in dark
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴花飾頭紗的新娘，在婚宴上面帶微笑地站在賓客中間。兩位穿深色西裝的男士分立兩側，桌旁坐著幾位賓客，桌上擺放著紙杯和餐盤。室內場地樸素溫馨，照片色調偏暖，為典型的七零年代末期婚禮場景。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor wedding reception venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — possibly Taroko Gorge or a similar geological scenic area
photos.description_en: Two women stand together posing in front of a large, dramatic rock formation or cliff face. Both are dressed in coordinating red/burgundy outfits — on
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性站在壯觀的岩壁前合影留念。兩人穿著相近的紅色系服裝——一位穿著及膝裙搭配襯衫，另一位穿著長褲套裝並繫著領巾。她們似乎正在進行觀光旅遊，站在看似地質景觀區的岩石地面上。
photos.location: Taiwan — possibly Taroko Gorge or a similar geological scenic area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A lively indoor gathering with a large group of people, likely a family or community celebration. Three women stand at the front, smiling with their h
photos.description_zh: 一場熱鬧的室內聚會，可能是家族或社區慶祝活動。三位女士站在前方，面帶笑容、雙手合十，像是在玩遊戲或表演節目。場地看似餐廳或宴會廳，背景中可見至少十五位不同年齡的賓客，包括一位穿西裝的年長男士和一個小孩。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A group of seven adults gathered around a dining table in what appears to be an enclosed patio or sunroom of a home. An elderly person sits at the far
photos.description_zh: 七位成人聚集在住家陽台或日光室的餐桌旁。一位年長者坐在最左邊，兩人站在桌後，其餘四人坐在藤椅上。桌上擺著茶杯、小碟和點心，看起來是一場輕鬆的家庭或社交聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Indoors — family home, likely Taiwan or Taiwanese-American home in the United States
photos.description_en: An indoor family gathering in a living room, with four people visible. Two women are seated — one resting her chin on her hand, the other holding a to
photos.description_zh: 一張在客廳拍攝的家庭聚會照片，畫面中有四個人。兩位女性坐在前方——一位以手托腮，另一位抱著約一至兩歲的幼兒。背景中一位戴眼鏡、穿白色高領毛衣的年輕女性站立著。房間裡有玻璃展示櫃，擺放著亞洲風格的裝飾品和傳統人偶，顯示這是一個台灣家庭的居家環境。
photos.location: Indoors — family home, likely Taiwan or Taiwanese-American home in the United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely church office or registration venue
photos.description_en: A bride and groom during their wedding signing ceremony. The bride, wearing a white dress with veil, floral headpiece, and white gloves, leans over a
photos.description_zh: 一對新人在婚禮簽署儀式上的照片。新娘身穿白色婚紗，頭戴面紗和花飾，手戴白色手套，俯身在桌上簽署結婚證書或登記文件。新郎站在她身旁，身著深色西裝，戴著眼鏡，胸前別著白色胸花，注視著新娘簽字。畫面右下角可見第三人的身影，可能是證婚人或見證人。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, likely church office or registration venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoor park or natural scenic area
photos.description_en: A landscape photograph of a rocky outcrop with a tree growing among large boulders, surrounded by dense green foliage and vegetation. The photo has si
photos.description_zh: 一張風景照片，拍攝的是岩石露頭與生長在大石之間的樹木，四周環繞著茂密的綠色植被。照片因年代久遠而嚴重褪色，帶有1970年代彩色沖印典型的粉紅色調。這似乎是一處自然風景區，可能是在與婚禮或蜜月相關的旅行中所拍攝。
photos.location: Taiwan - outdoor park or natural scenic area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - photo studio
photos.description_en: A professional studio family portrait of a young Taiwanese family of four. The father stands behind in a cream polo shirt, while the mother sits in a
photos.description_zh: 一張專業攝影棚拍攝的全家福照片，年輕的四口之家合影。父親穿著米白色polo衫站在後方，母親身穿黑白幾何圖案洋裝，懷中抱著一名穿綠色衣服的嬰兒。一旁坐著一位笑容燦爛、穿著彩色吊帶裙的小女孩。照片背景為經典的棕色攝影棚布幕。
photos.location: Taiwan - photo studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — hillside cemetery
photos.description_en: Two women pose together in front of a traditional Chinese gravestone in a hillside cemetery in Taiwan. The younger woman (around 30s) wears a white bl
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在台灣山坡墓園中的傳統墓碑前合影。年輕女子約三十多歲，穿著白色上衣與花裙；年長女子約六十多歲，身著深色旗袍式洋裝。墓碑上刻有「彭」姓，立於民國五十三年（1964年），應為家族掃墓時所攝。
photos.location: Taiwan — hillside cemetery

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential home
photos.description_en: An elderly woman and a middle-aged man pose together seated indoors in what appears to be a traditional Taiwanese home. The woman wears a dark traditi
photos.description_zh: 一位年長女性與一位中年男性在傳統台灣住宅內合影。女性穿著深色中式上衣，男性戴眼鏡、穿白色短袖襯衫。背景可見花紋沙發床及木框玻璃隔間，為當時台灣家庭常見的室內格局。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoor park or family outing area
photos.description_en: An outdoor family gathering or picnic under leafy trees, with an older woman (likely a grandmother) seated at center-right, smiling warmly as several
photos.description_zh: 一張戶外家庭聚會的照片，在茂密的樹蔭下，一位年長的女性（可能是祖母）坐在右側中央，面帶慈祥的笑容，周圍圍繞著好幾個小孩。左側站著一位穿白色短袖襯衫的男士，還有至少一位女性部分可見。孩子們年齡從幼兒到學齡不等，其中一位穿著花紋襯衫，另一位戴著小帽子。
photos.location: Taiwan - outdoor park or family outing area

photos.location_detail: Kenting Forest Recreation Area (墾丁森林遊樂區), Pingtung County, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of seven people poses for a photo at the entrance of the Kenting Forest Recreation Area (墾丁森林遊樂區) in southern Taiwan. The group includes two a
photos.description_zh: 七人在台灣南部墾丁森林遊樂區入口處合影留念，背景可見林務局的直式招牌。團體中有兩位成年男性、兩位成年女性、兩位男孩及一位小女孩，身後九重葛盛開，充滿南國熱帶風情。
photos.location: Kenting Forest Recreation Area (墾丁森林遊樂區), Pingtung County, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — temple courtyard, likely a local community or town temple
photos.description_en: A young family poses in front of a traditional Taiwanese temple during what appears to be a festival or community event. The father holds a toddler wh
photos.description_zh: 一個年輕家庭在台灣傳統廟宇前合影，看起來正逢廟會或社區活動。父親抱著一個幼兒，母親穿著花紋洋裝站在一旁，一個小男孩站在前方竹籃旁。廟柱上掛著紅色對聯，背景中可見其他參拜或遊覽的民眾。
photos.location: Taiwan — temple courtyard, likely a local community or town temple

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — amusement park or recreational area, mountainous backdrop
photos.description_en: Two women and a toddler pose in front of a dark blue Ford Cortina 1.6 L at what appears to be an amusement park in Taiwan, with a Ferris wheel and mou
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性與一名幼兒在一輛深藍色福特Cortina 1.6 L轎車前合影，背景可見摩天輪及山丘，地點疑似台灣的遊樂園區。一位穿著格紋大衣，另一位身穿深色外套，懷中抱著穿紅色花衣的幼兒坐在車尾，小朋友表情活潑開心。從台灣車牌及周圍環境判斷，這是一次家庭出遊的留影。
photos.location: Taiwan — amusement park or recreational area, mountainous backdrop

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor street or sidewalk
photos.description_en: A toddler (approximately 1–2 years old) sits cross-legged on a concrete ledge outdoors, wearing a pink long-sleeve top with a floral bib and red pants
photos.description_zh: 一個約一到兩歲的幼兒盤腿坐在戶外的水泥台階上，穿著粉紅色長袖上衣搭配花朵圖案的圍兜和紅色褲子，表情可愛地嘟著嘴。左邊有一位大人的局部身影，穿著花紋裙子。背景是典型的台灣街景，停放著多輛機車，旁邊有種在水泥花圃裡的行道樹。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor street or sidewalk

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor scenic area or park with a large golden fish sculpture, possibly near a reservoir or lakeside tourist attraction
photos.description_en: A family group of seven poses in front of a large golden carp sculpture at what appears to be a scenic tourist attraction in Taiwan, with green hills
photos.description_zh: 一家七口在台灣某風景區的大型金色鯉魚雕塑前合影，背景可見翠綠的山丘。合照中有兩對成年夫婦、兩個男孩（一位青少年、一位較年幼）以及前方一位穿吊帶裙的小女孩。看起來是一次家庭出遊，部分成員手中拿著小點心或冰品。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor scenic area or park with a large golden fish sculpture, possibly near a reservoir or lakeside tourist attraction

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — university or institutional campus
photos.description_en: Three men in semi-formal attire pose together in front of a large institutional building with Chinese characters (輕工大樓, "Light Industry Building") abo
photos.description_zh: 三位身穿半正式服裝的男士在一棟寫有「輕工大樓」的建築物前合影。前方有一座長滿荷葉的水池，左側有一棵松柏。場景看似台灣某大學或機關園區，拍攝時為秋冬季節。
photos.location: Taiwan — university or institutional campus

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — a major temple or cultural site, possibly a large Buddhist temple or cultural landmark with traditional palatial architecture
photos.description_en: A couple poses together on ornate white marble steps in front of a grand traditional Chinese-style building with red pillars and multi-tiered eaves. T
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在一座宏偉的中式傳統建築前合影，建築有紅色廊柱與多層飛簷。兩人站在雕飾精美的白色大理石欄杆旁的台階上，女方身穿黑色太陽花圖案上衣，男方穿著格紋襯衫與棕色長褲。從華麗的建築規模來看，此處應為台灣的一座大型寺廟或文化古蹟。
photos.location: Taiwan — a major temple or cultural site, possibly a large Buddhist temple or cultural landmark with traditional palatial architecture

photos.location_detail: Fo Guang Shan (佛光山), Kaohsiung, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A couple poses together in front of the towering Great Buddha statue at Fo Guang Shan (佛光山) monastery in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. The large golden standing
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在高雄佛光山大佛前合影留念。金色的大佛像矗立在背景中，基座旁排列著一排排較小的佛像，周圍還有其他遊客。女士穿著酒紅色洋裝，男士戴著眼鏡穿著花紋襯衫，兩人笑容溫暖。
photos.location: Fo Guang Shan (佛光山), Kaohsiung, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — temple complex or traditional cultural park
photos.description_en: A young woman holds a toddler while posing outdoors at a traditional Taiwanese temple complex. The background features ornate temple architecture with
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性抱著幼兒在台灣傳統廟宇建築群前合影。背景可見綠色琉璃瓦屋頂的廟宇、石雕及裝飾性的神話人物。女性身穿粉紅色上衣，手提橘色皮包，小孩則穿著深色碎花衣服。
photos.location: Taiwan — temple complex or traditional cultural park

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - tourist attraction or temple with costume photo opportunity
photos.description_en: A family of three poses on ornate throne-like chairs at what appears to be a Taiwanese tourist attraction or temple offering traditional costume photo
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在台灣的觀光景點或廟宇中，坐在華麗的龍椅上拍攝紀念照。夫妻倆戴著傳統戲曲風格的頭飾，中間坐著一個穿著彩色傳統服飾的幼兒。背景是精緻的木雕、紅金色龍紋裝飾，充滿傳統廟宇風格。
photos.location: Taiwan - tourist attraction or temple with costume photo opportunity

photos.location_detail: Fo Guang Shan (佛光山), Kaohsiung, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A family group of six poses in front of rows of golden Buddha statues at what appears to be Fo Guang Shan monastery in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. The group in
photos.description_zh: 一家六口在佛光山寺的金色佛像前合影留念。兩位穿著紅色服裝的女士、一位穿深藍色西裝的男士、一名青少年男孩、一名穿紅色毛衣的男孩，以及一位站在寺廟圍牆上的小女孩一同入鏡。背景可見其他遊客正在參觀。
photos.location: Fo Guang Shan (佛光山), Kaohsiung, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor venue, possibly a community center or cultural performance hall
photos.description_en: A group of young women perform a Taiwanese Indigenous (likely Amis/Pangcah or similar tribe) traditional dance on a polished stone floor, wearing colo
photos.description_zh: 一群年輕女性在室內場地的石板地上表演台灣原住民傳統舞蹈，可能是阿美族或類似族群的舞蹈。她們穿著色彩鮮豔的傳統服飾，包括紅色上衣、彩色條紋短裙、羽毛頭飾、串珠項鏈及腳鈴，赤腳持木製道具列隊起舞，四周觀眾席地而坐觀賞表演。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor venue, possibly a community center or cultural performance hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family of five poses together on a couch in a warmly decorated Taiwanese home. Two adult women sit on either side of an older family member (likely
photos.description_zh: 五位家人在台灣住家的客廳沙發上合影。兩位成年女性分坐在一位年長長輩的兩側，一位女性膝上坐著一個幼童，另一位年幼的女孩依偎在長輩身旁。客廳擺設溫馨，可見雕花木製展示架、樓梯，以及牆上掛著的中文日曆。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor park, temple grounds, or public market area
photos.description_en: A young child, approximately 2-3 years old, stands in an outdoor public area wearing a traditional Chinese-style outfit with a floral patterned top, p
photos.description_zh: 一位約兩三歲的幼童身穿傳統中式花紋上衣、紅色長褲和白色球鞋，站在一處戶外公共場所，似乎正在吃東西。背景可見一座傳統中式涼亭的紅色飛簷屋頂，周圍有其他遊客及攤販，冬日的樹木大多已落葉。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor park, temple grounds, or public market area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoors, family living room
photos.description_en: A young woman in a red V-neck top and patterned skirt sits on an ornately carved wooden sofa, holding a toddler on her lap while cradling a cup in her
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子穿著紅色V領上衣和花紋長裙，坐在雕花木沙發上，膝上抱著一個約一至兩歲的幼兒，另一手端著杯子。小孩穿著紅色衣服搭配淺色圍兜，一隻小手舉起。客廳內可見玻璃展示櫃、檯燈、花卉壁紙，以及典型的台灣紅木家具擺設。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoors, family living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family portrait taken indoors, likely during a holiday gathering. An older couple sits in the center front row — the patriarch in
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家庭合照，拍攝於室內，可能是節日聚會時所攝。前排中央坐著一對年長夫婦，老先生身穿深色中式外套，身旁有一名嬰兒；兩側各坐著一對年輕夫婦，其中一位年輕女性抱著穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。後排站立五位成年家人。背景為典型的台灣住宅，白色牆壁上掛有日曆，窗戶裝有窗型冷氣機。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely Taipei, possibly the Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店) or a major temple complex, based on the distinctive red-columned pagoda and white marble cloud-motif balustrades
photos.description_en: A couple poses together on the white marble terrace of a traditional Chinese-style building in Taiwan, likely a major temple or the Grand Hotel Taipei
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在台灣一座傳統中式建築的白色大理石欄杆平台上合影，背景可能是圓山大飯店或大型廟宇。女士身穿黑色向日葵圖案洋裝，男士戴眼鏡、穿著花紋毛衣和格子褲。身後是紅柱金瓦的多層寶塔建築。
photos.location: Taiwan — likely Taipei, possibly the Grand Hotel (圓山大飯店) or a major temple complex, based on the distinctive red-columned pagoda and white marble cloud-motif balustrades

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family portrait taken in a living room, likely during a Lunar New Year or holiday gathering. Six people are seated together on a
