photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家庭合照，拍攝於客廳中，可能是農曆新年或節日聚會期間。六人坐在沙發上合影：左邊是一位戴眼鏡的男士，旁邊是穿紅色上衣、懷抱幼兒的女士，中間是一位戴眼鏡、穿深色上衣並佩戴玉墜的年長者（可能是祖母），右側有一位穿紅色碎花中式上衣的小女孩，以及一位穿黃色高領毛衣的女士。背景可見紅色花卉、木雕擺
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — park or scenic garden (traditional Chinese garden architecture with moon gate)
photos.description_en: A family of five or six poses in front of a traditional Chinese moon gate (circular doorway) at a park or scenic garden, likely in Taiwan. The red wal
photos.description_zh: 一家五、六口人在一座傳統中式月洞門前合影，地點可能是台灣的公園或風景園林。紅牆上方題有「逸興滿飛」，兩側圓形石刻分別刻有「萬古」與「長春」。家庭成員包括兩位女性、兩位男性、一位年長者及一名小女孩，穿著七〇年代末至八〇年代初的休閒服裝。
photos.location: Taiwan — park or scenic garden (traditional Chinese garden architecture with moon gate)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — a tourist attraction or amusement park, possibly a site with "Dreamland" or similar name ending in "-aland", set against mountainous terrain
photos.description_en: A middle-aged or older man in a dark blazer poses beside a Ford Cortina sedan while a small child in a red patterned outfit sits on the car's trunk. T
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深色西裝外套的中年男子站在一輛福特乘用車旁，一個穿著紅色花衣的小孩坐在車子後方行李箱蓋上。背景是一座招牌上寫著「ALAND」字樣的建築物，後方有翠綠的山巒，看起來是台灣某處觀光景點或遊樂園。遠處可見中華民國國旗飄揚。
photos.location: Taiwan — a tourist attraction or amusement park, possibly a site with "Dreamland" or similar name ending in "-aland", set against mountainous terrain

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — temple or shrine, possibly a site with name starting "Chung-Hsing" based on partial signage
photos.description_en: Three people — a middle-aged woman in sunglasses, a man in glasses, and a younger woman — pose at the base of stone steps leading up to a traditional
photos.description_zh: 三人在一座傳統中式廟宇或牌坊前的石階下合影——一位戴墨鏡的中年女性、一位戴眼鏡的男性，以及一位年輕女性。身旁可見雕龍石柱，背景中有其他遊客正在拾級而上。右側可見部分英文標示「CHUNG-H...」。
photos.location: Taiwan — temple or shrine, possibly a site with name starting "Chung-Hsing" based on partial signage

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — Buddhist temple site with large golden standing statue, possibly a Guanyin (觀音) statue at a popular tourist temple
photos.description_en: A young woman in a red dress with a striped belt poses smiling in front of a large golden standing Buddhist statue, likely Guanyin (觀音), at a temple t
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子身穿紅色洋裝，繫著條紋腰帶，手提深色皮包，面帶微笑地站在一座大型金色佛教立像前合影。背景可見其他遊客及家庭正朝著佛像與廟宇方向走去，是一處台灣的寺廟觀光景點。
photos.location: Taiwan — Buddhist temple site with large golden standing statue, possibly a Guanyin (觀音) statue at a popular tourist temple

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — southwestern salt fields, likely Qigu (七股) or Beimen (北門) area, Tainan
photos.description_en: A group of seven people — adults and children — pose together in front of a large salt mountain, likely at one of the salt fields in southwestern Taiw
photos.description_zh: 七人合影於台灣西南部的鹽山前，推測地點為台南七股或北門一帶的鹽田景區。看起來是兩個家庭結伴出遊，背景可見遠處有人攀爬鹽山。從衣著風格與照片色調判斷，拍攝時間約在1979至1982年間。
photos.location: Taiwan — southwestern salt fields, likely Qigu (七股) or Beimen (北門) area, Tainan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — northern coast, possibly near Keelung or northeast coast area (Yehliu/Bitou Cape region)
photos.description_en: Two men and two young children pose together on a concrete seawall or pier along a rocky coastline in Taiwan. A green headland and calm bay are visibl
photos.description_zh: 兩位男士與兩名幼童在台灣海岸邊的水泥堤防上合影。背景可見青翠的海岬與平靜的海灣。左邊的男士穿深色毛衣，身旁站著一位小女孩；右邊戴眼鏡的男士穿著花紋毛衣，身旁站著一位穿條紋上衣的小男孩。
photos.location: Taiwan — northern coast, possibly near Keelung or northeast coast area (Yehliu/Bitou Cape region)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family gathering in a living room, with seven people including two small children. A woman holds an infant on the left while a to
photos.description_zh: 一家人在客廳裡團聚的溫馨場景，共有七人，包括兩名幼兒。左側一位女性抱著嬰兒，中間一位穿著鮮黃色花朵圖案衣服的小女孩坐在另一位女性的腿上，周圍的家人們都注視著孩子們。這張照片約攝於1980年前後，記錄了一個台灣家庭親密的日常聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — Buddhist temple site, possibly coastal area (e.g., Changhua or similar temple with large standing statue)
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together at a Buddhist temple site in Taiwan, standing against a low concrete wall with a large standing Guanyin (or Buddha) stat
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在台灣的佛教寺廟景點合影，背靠矮水泥牆，身後可見一座大型觀音（或佛像）立像。背景中有傳統中式廟宇建築，帶有紅橘色裝飾及涼亭式閣樓，遠處可見平坦的海岸或平原景觀。畫面右側有一位路人經過。
photos.location: Taiwan — Buddhist temple site, possibly coastal area (e.g., Changhua or similar temple with large standing statue)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family gathering in a living room, likely in Taiwan. A young woman holds a toddler in red overalls while other family members sit
photos.description_zh: 一個多代同堂的家庭聚會場景，地點可能在台灣的家中客廳。一位年輕女性抱著穿紅色吊帶褲的幼兒，其他家人圍坐在茶几旁，桌上擺放著傳統茶壺、茶杯和點心。畫面中可見至少六人，從幼兒到右側邊緣的年長者，呈現溫馨的家庭團聚氛圍。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A family birthday celebration for a young toddler (around 2-3 years old) in a living room setting. Several women and a young girl are gathered around
photos.description_zh: 一場在客廳舉辦的幼兒生日慶祝會，約兩三歲的小女孩是主角。幾位女性和一位小女孩圍坐在茶几旁，桌上擺著一個已經切開的白色生日蛋糕。小壽星開心地坐在蛋糕旁，被家人們環繞著，桌上還有紅色鍋具和飲料。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home or apartment
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family portrait taken indoors during what appears to be a grandmother's birthday celebration. An elderly woman wearing glasses si
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家庭合照，拍攝於祖母壽辰慶祝場合。戴眼鏡的祖母坐在中央抱著幼兒，周圍環繞著五個孩子和一位成年女性，背景可見大型金色「壽」字和紅色床鋪。孩子們年齡從幼兒到青少年不等，數人穿著傳統中式花紋服飾，顯示這是一個喜慶場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home or apartment

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoor dining room or restaurant private room
photos.description_en: A group of adults share a Chinese dinner around a round table laden with multiple dishes including fish, fried rice, and other home-style courses. The
photos.description_zh: 一群成年人圍坐在圓桌旁享用中式晚餐，桌上擺滿了魚、炒飯等多道家常菜餚。場景看似家中餐廳或餐館包廂，背景可見玻璃酒櫃。至少五人入座，大家用筷子用餐，氣氛輕鬆融洽。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoor dining room or restaurant private room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family living room
photos.description_en: A smiling woman in a red blouse holds a toddler on her lap while sitting on a floral-patterned couch in a warmly decorated living room. The child, app
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著紅色上衣的女士面帶微笑，抱著一個約兩三歲的幼兒坐在繡花沙發上。小女孩穿著粉紅色上衣，兩人一起拿著一顆紅白相間的小皮球，神情愉快。客廳牆上掛著幾幅畫作，旁邊的茶几上擺著一個青花瓷瓶，充滿溫馨的居家氛圍。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - park or botanical garden
photos.description_en: Two women pose together behind a heart-shaped or circular metal trellis covered in vibrant pink bougainvillea flowers in what appears to be a landscap
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在一座花園中，站在一個長滿盛開紫紅色九重葛的圓形金屬花架後方合影。左邊的女性穿著深藍色上衣搭配珊瑚紅色裙子，右邊的女性穿著條紋襯衫並戴著墨鏡。背景是熱帶植物茂盛的公園或花園景觀。
photos.location: Taiwan - park or botanical garden

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multigenerational family portrait taken indoors, featuring an elderly grandmother wearing glasses and dark clothing, seated and holding a toddler in
photos.description_zh: 一張在室內拍攝的多代家庭合照，戴眼鏡的祖母坐在中央，懷中抱著一個穿白衣的幼兒，周圍環繞著五個不同年齡的孩子。幾位小朋友穿著喜氣的紅色或傳統中式花布上衣，看似農曆新年或節日團聚的場景。後排站著一位穿藍色外套搭白色高領的青少年男孩。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - scenic rocky tourist site, possibly Taroko Gorge or similar geological attraction
photos.description_en: A family group of seven poses together at what appears to be a scenic rocky tourist site, likely in Taiwan. The group includes two adult men, two adul
photos.description_zh: 一家七口在台灣的岩石風景區合影留念。後排有兩位男士、兩位女士和兩個男孩，前方站著一位穿著淺藍色洋裝和紅色靴子的小女孩。背景是壯觀的岩壁和石階，看起來像是熱門的自然景點。
photos.location: Taiwan - scenic rocky tourist site, possibly Taroko Gorge or similar geological attraction

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — northern coast, possibly Yehliu (野柳) or northeast coast area
photos.description_en: A couple poses together at a rocky coastal scenic spot, standing on a concrete seawall with the ocean and a distinctive rocky headland visible in the
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在海邊風景區合影，站在水泥護欄前，背景可見海洋與突出的岩石海岬。女士穿著印有大朵向日葵圖案的深色毛衣和深色長褲，男士戴眼鏡，穿著花紋V領毛衣和淺色長褲。海岸地形與台灣北部海岸線相似，可能是野柳或東北角一帶。
photos.location: Taiwan — northern coast, possibly Yehliu (野柳) or northeast coast area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - public park or botanical garden
photos.description_en: Two women pose together behind a circular bougainvillea arch in full magenta bloom at what appears to be a park or garden. The woman on the left wears
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在一座盛開的九重葛花拱門後合影，花朵呈鮮豔的桃紅色，背景是茂密的熱帶植物園景。左邊的女性穿著深藍上衣搭配紅色裙子，右邊的女性戴著墨鏡，穿著條紋上衣和深色裙子。畫面左側可見一位男性正在花盆旁彎腰。
photos.location: Taiwan - public park or botanical garden

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - scenic park with traditional stone bridge, possibly a popular recreational area
photos.description_en: A couple poses together outdoors at a scenic park by a lake. Behind them, a traditional Chinese-style white stone bridge with ornate balustrades is cr
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在湖畔公園合影留念。背景可見一座中式白色石橋，橋上遊客眾多。男方戴眼鏡、穿花紋襯衫，肩上背著相機包；女方穿紅棕色襯衫，手持一台小型相機。
photos.location: Taiwan - scenic park with traditional stone bridge, possibly a popular recreational area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — Chinese restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: Three women are seated at a round banquet table in what appears to be a Chinese restaurant, enjoying a meal together. The woman on the right holds up
photos.description_zh: 三位女性坐在中式餐廳的圓桌旁一起用餐。右邊的女士舉杯敬酒，中間的女士正在開心地說話或唱歌。桌上擺滿了菜餚和飲料，看起來是一場家庭聚餐或慶祝活動。
photos.location: Taiwan — Chinese restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant banquet hall
photos.description_en: A group of approximately nine adults gathered around a banquet table at a Chinese restaurant, posing for a photo during what appears to be a celebrato
photos.description_zh: 約九位成年人在中式餐廳的宴席桌旁合影留念，看起來是一場慶祝聚餐。後排站著三人，前排坐著六人，桌上擺著飲料、茶杯、碗筷等餐具。坐在中間的兩位年長女性身穿典雅的絲質上衣，佩戴珍珠與金項鍊，顯示這可能是生日或節慶等特別場合的聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, bedroom or dressing room
photos.description_en: A young woman poses in her white wedding dress in front of a wooden vanity mirror, likely while getting ready for her wedding ceremony. She wears a hi
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子身穿白色婚紗，站在木製梳妝鏡前，似乎正在為婚禮做準備。她穿著高領蕾絲刺繡婚紗，佩戴珍珠項鏈，頭戴花飾與長頭紗，髮型捲曲優雅。身後的梳妝台上擺滿了化妝品和香水瓶，左側可見黃色窗簾。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, bedroom or dressing room

photos.location_detail: Airport, likely Taiwan (possibly Taipei Songshan or early CKS/Taoyuan International Airport)
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family group gathers at an airport, likely greeting or seeing off arriving travelers. An elderly couple stands at the center, sur
photos.description_zh: 一個多代家庭在機場聚集，可能是在迎接或送別旅客。一對年邁的夫婦站在中央，周圍環繞著較年輕的成年人，其中一位穿灰色西裝的男子抱著一個穿紅色衣服的幼兒。背景是機場的到達或出發大廳，天花板上有日光燈，人群熙來攘往。
photos.location: Airport, likely Taiwan (possibly Taipei Songshan or early CKS/Taoyuan International Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely Moon World (月世界) badlands, Tianliao District, Kaohsiung
photos.description_en: Two women pose together at the base of a dramatic eroded mudstone cliff, likely the "Moon World" (月世界) badlands in southern Taiwan. Both are dressed i
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在壯觀的泥岩惡地地形前合影，地點可能是台灣南部的「月世界」。兩人穿著紅色系的搭配服裝——一位穿紅色裙子搭深色上衣並背著肩包，另一位穿紅色長褲配粉色上衣。背景是高聳且溝壑縱橫的地質奇景，氣勢磅礡。
photos.location: Taiwan — likely Moon World (月世界) badlands, Tianliao District, Kaohsiung

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - northern coastline (possibly Keelung or North Coast area)
photos.description_en: A woman stands behind a young girl at a rocky coastal shoreline, her arms wrapped affectionately around the child's shoulders. The ocean stretches out
photos.description_zh: 一位女性站在一個小女孩身後，雙手環抱著孩子的肩膀，兩人在海岸邊合影。背景是開闊的海面，遠處散布著礁石和小島，岸邊可見水泥消波塊。陰天的天空讓整個畫面呈現柔和的色調。
photos.location: Taiwan - northern coastline (possibly Keelung or North Coast area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A group of men in suits raise beer glasses in a cheerful toast at what appears to be a banquet or formal dinner gathering. The setting is a restaurant
photos.description_zh: 一群穿著西裝的男士在宴會場合開心地舉杯敬酒，每人手持一杯啤酒。場景看起來是一間有木質牆面裝潢的餐廳或宴會廳，桌上可見小花飾。眾人笑容滿面，似乎是在慶祝某個特別的場合，可能是商務聚餐、同學會或其他喜慶活動。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely a home or apartment
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family portrait taken indoors, likely during a festive occasion such as Chinese New Year. Three adults stand in the back row — a
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家族合照，拍攝於室內，可能是農曆新年等節慶場合。後排站著三位成人——一位穿格紋外套的男士、一位中年女士，以及一位戴眼鏡、穿淡紫色外套的年輕女士。年邁的祖母坐在中間，身旁圍繞著三個小孩。右邊的女孩穿著粉紅色中式棉襖，前方的幼兒穿著紅色格紋外套，旁邊可見紅色禮盒，顯示這是一次節日團聚。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, likely a home or apartment

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - university campus
photos.description_en: A young woman in graduation cap and gown poses for a portrait photo outdoors, likely on a university campus. She wears a black academic gown with a go
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性身穿畢業袍，在戶外拍攝畢業紀念照，背景看似大學校園。她穿著黑色學士袍，搭配金色V型披肩，頭戴傳統方帽與流蘇，表情溫柔自信，背景可見建築物階梯與綠樹。
photos.location: Taiwan - university campus

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - public park, possibly Taipei
photos.description_en: A young woman in her late 20s to early 30s poses by a lake in what appears to be a public park. She wears a rust-red blouse with a bow tie at the neck
photos.description_zh: 一位約二十多至三十歲出頭的年輕女性在公園湖畔留影。她穿著一件磚紅色領結襯衫，短髮燙捲，是當時流行的髮型。背景可見其他遊客在橋上漫步，湖面倒映著樹影，景色怡人。
photos.location: Taiwan - public park, possibly Taipei

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home or restaurant
photos.description_en: A formal family portrait of five people posed indoors, likely during a holiday or special occasion. An elderly woman is seated in the front center, wi
photos.description_zh: 一張正式的家庭合照，共五人在室內合影，可能是節慶或特殊場合。一位年長女性坐在前方中央，身後站著四位成人：一位穿灰色外套的年輕女性、一位戴眼鏡穿毛衣背心的年輕男性、一位身穿亮桃紅色旗袍並佩戴玉墜的中年女性，以及一位穿灰色條紋西裝打領帶的中年男性。拍攝地點似為住家或餐廳內部，背景可見木質牆面及掛鐘。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family of four poses together on a floral-patterned couch in a cozy living room. An older man and woman sit with a toddler in red overalls holding a
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在溫馨的客廳沙發上合影。一位年長的男士和女士與一個穿著紅色吊帶褲、手拿彩色球的幼兒坐在一起，旁邊一位穿條紋上衣的年輕女性面帶笑容。桌上擺著茶杯和裝飾瓷罐，看起來是一次輕鬆的家庭聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family of four poses together on a couch in a living room: a young woman in a yellow turtleneck, a middle-aged woman and man in matching red outfits
photos.description_zh: 一家四口坐在客廳沙發上合照：左邊是一位穿著黃色高領毛衣的年輕女子，中間是一對穿著紅色套裝的中年夫婦，婦人懷中抱著一個約兩三歲的幼兒。牆上掛著一幅日式人物畫，旁邊是壁掛式電話，前方茶几上放著玻璃杯。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational Taiwanese family group photo taken indoors, likely during a gathering to welcome a newborn baby. An older couple sits at center —
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的台灣家庭合照，攝於室內，可能是為了迎接新生兒而聚會。年長的夫婦坐在中間——祖母抱著嬰兒，祖父穿著深色傳統中式外套——旁邊是一對年輕夫婦和一個穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。五位成年子女站在後排，穿著七零年代末至八零年代初的休閒服裝，包括高領毛衣和花紋毛衣。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, private home or dining room
photos.description_en: A group of six adults — three women and three men — pose together at a dinner gathering around a table laden with Chinese dishes, drinks, and bottles.
photos.description_zh: 六位成人——三女三男——圍坐在擺滿中式菜餚與飲料的餐桌旁合影。背景可見酒櫃與木門，場景像是在家中或私人餐廳。氣氛溫馨融洽，應是家族或好友間的聚餐。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, private home or dining room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor wedding reception venue
photos.description_en: A wedding photo featuring a bride in a white lace gown with veil and cascading bouquet, flanked by the groom in a dark suit with glasses and boutonnie
photos.description_zh: 一張婚禮合照，新娘身穿白色蕾絲婚紗、頭戴白紗，手持瀑布型捧花，站在中間。右側為戴眼鏡、穿深色西裝並別著胸花的新郎，左側為穿淺藍色襯衫搭配紅色領帶的男性友人或親屬。三人站在木質牆面的室內場地，背後有紅色布幔及金色裝飾。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor wedding reception venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - church or chapel
photos.description_en: A man, likely the bride's father, escorts the bride down the aisle of a church during a wedding ceremony. The bride wears a traditional white Western-
photos.description_zh: 一位男士（可能是新娘的父親）挽著新娘走過教堂走道，正進行婚禮儀式。新娘身穿傳統白色西式婚紗，戴著長蕾絲頭紗，手持由雛菊和粉色花朵組成的瀑布式捧花。男士穿著格紋西裝並配戴胸花，背景可見木製長椅上坐著少數賓客。
photos.location: Taiwan - church or chapel

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, likely home or wedding venue preparation room
photos.description_en: A candid and playful close-up of a young bride making a funny face — mouth wide open, tongue out — while wearing a traditional white wedding dress wit
photos.description_zh: 一張新娘在婚禮當天的趣味特寫照片，她張大嘴巴、伸出舌頭，做出搞怪的表情。她穿著高領蕾絲白色婚紗，佩戴珍珠項鍊和珍珠耳環，頭戴花飾與薄紗頭紗。背景掛著一幅繡有鹿和自然風景的裝飾壁毯。這張照片捕捉了婚禮當天一個自然歡樂的瞬間。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, likely home or wedding venue preparation room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: An indoor family portrait of four people: an elderly woman seated in front wearing a dark navy coat, flanked by three standing adults — a woman in a b
photos.description_zh: 一張室內家庭合照，共四人。前方坐著一位穿深色大衣的年長女性，後方站著三位成年人——左邊是穿酒紅色高領毛衣的女性，中間是穿深色外套圍圍巾的男性，右邊是穿粉紅色毛衣的年輕女性。四人在素色牆壁前合影，看起來是冬天的家庭聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older couple stands at the center of a family gathering indoors. The man wears a pinstripe suit with glasses and a striped tie, while the woman bes
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦站在家庭聚會的中心位置。男士穿著條紋西裝、戴眼鏡並繫著領帶，身旁的女士穿著深色花卉圖案上衣。背景中有數位家人與小孩圍在擺有食物的桌旁，看起來像是節日聚餐或特別的家庭聚會場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor banquet hall or community event venue
photos.description_en: A group of performers in traditional Taiwanese indigenous (likely Amis/阿美族) costumes dance with arms raised at an indoor banquet or community event. T
photos.description_zh: 一群身穿台灣原住民（疑為阿美族）傳統服飾的表演者，在室內宴會廳或社團活動中跳舞，雙手高舉。舞者穿著以紅色為主的鮮豔傳統服裝，頭戴精緻頭飾。四周坐滿觀眾，場地設有舞台燈光，氣氛熱鬧。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor banquet hall or community event venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, bedroom
photos.description_en: A young woman smiles radiantly in a bedroom while wearing a white wedding dress with delicate lace overlay, a high mandarin collar, and sheer three-qu
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子身穿白色婚紗，笑容燦爛地站在臥室中。婚紗上覆有精緻的蕾絲，立領設計搭配七分袖的花卉刺繡。她戴著珍珠項鏈，黑色頭髮燙成柔美的捲髮。看起來正在為婚禮做準備，身後可見梳妝台和金色窗簾。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, bedroom

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together indoors, smiling at the camera, with the man's arm around the woman's shoulder. They stand beside a chair piled with wra
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫婦在室內合影，男方搭著女方的肩膀，兩人面帶笑容。旁邊的椅子上堆放著包裝精美的禮物，看起來像是在慶祝節日或生日。背景有木質壁板、裝飾掛鐘和中式幾何花格屏風，場景像是在家中的客廳。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: Two women pose indoors holding a newborn baby wrapped in white cloth. The older woman on the left wears a floral blouse while the younger woman on the
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在室內合影，共同抱著一位裹著白色包巾的新生兒。左邊年長的女性穿著碎花上衣，右邊年輕的女性穿著黑白鋸齒紋無袖洋裝。背景是條紋窗簾，旁邊有紙燈籠、小盆栽和粉色面紙盒。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Hospital maternity ward, likely Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: A young mother lies in a hospital bed, smiling warmly while cradling her newborn baby wrapped in a white blanket. The setting is clearly a maternity w
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕母親躺在醫院病床上，面帶溫暖的笑容，懷中抱著用白色毯子包裹的新生嬰兒。場景明顯是產房，可以看到醫院的床單、床頭櫃和醫療設備。母親穿著碎花病號服，戴著手錶，抱著熟睡的嬰兒，神情喜悅而自豪。
photos.location: Hospital maternity ward, likely Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - lake, possibly Sun Moon Lake or similar scenic lake area
photos.description_en: A smiling toddler, approximately 2-3 years old, stands on what appears to be a tour boat or ferry on a lake. The child is wearing a light pink or whit
photos.description_zh: 一個大約兩三歲的幼童站在遊船上，開心地笑著。孩子穿著淡粉色交叉肩帶的上衣，雙手抓著船的欄杆。背景可見湖岸的樹林和低矮建築物，畫面右下角隱約可見另一個人的頭頂。
photos.location: Taiwan - lake, possibly Sun Moon Lake or similar scenic lake area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational Taiwanese family portrait taken indoors, likely during a gathering to welcome a new baby. An older couple sits at center — the gr
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的台灣家庭合照，在室內拍攝，可能是為了迎接新生兒而聚會。年長的夫婦坐在中間，祖父穿著深藍色中式外套，懷中抱著一個穿黃色條紋衣服的新生嬰兒，旁邊一位年輕女性抱著穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。五位成人站在後排，穿著七〇年代末至八〇年代初的休閒服飾，包括高領毛衣和幾何圖案毛衣。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: indoors - home, likely United States or Taiwan
photos.description_en: A formal family portrait with nine people — an elderly matriarch seated in the center wearing glasses and a dark patterned top, surrounded by eight st
photos.description_zh: 一張正式的家庭合照，共九人——一位戴眼鏡、穿深色花紋上衣的年長女性坐在正中央，周圍站著八位成年人（四男四女），看起來是她的子女及其配偶。照片攝於室內，背景為木質壁板牆面，牆上掛有時鐘，應是家族聚會或節日團圓時所拍攝。
photos.location: indoors - home, likely United States or Taiwan

photos.location_detail: University campus or memorial site, possibly in the United States or Taiwan
photos.description_en: A woman stands at the base of a tall, modernist white stone or concrete tower with narrow vertical slit windows, emphasizing its imposing height. The
photos.description_zh: 一位女性站在一座高聳的現代主義白色石塔底部，塔身設有狹長的直向窗口，突顯其雄偉高度。塔的周圍有修剪整齊的錐形常綠樹木、石欄杆，看起來像是校園或紀念園區。這張照片似乎是旅遊觀光時拍攝的紀念照。
photos.location: University campus or memorial site, possibly in the United States or Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - home interior
photos.description_en: Three people are gathered around a dining table in what appears to be a home setting, sharing a meal together. The scene shows an intimate family gath
photos.description_zh: 三個人圍坐在家中餐桌旁一起用餐。這是一個溫馨的家庭聚會場景，桌上擺著碗盤菜餚，牆上掛著顯示「29」的日曆。
photos.location: Taiwan - home interior

photos.location_detail: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A family of four poses for a photo in front of what appears to be the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall in Taipei, Taiwan. The parents are dressed formall
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在台北中正紀念堂前合影留念。父親穿著灰色西裝，母親抱著幼兒，前方站著一個穿紅色外套的較大孩子。
photos.location: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A young child in a dark winter coat stands next to a traditional Chinese shrine or temple structure with religious figurines inside. The photo has a w
photos.description_zh: 一個穿著深色冬衣的小孩站在傳統中式神龛或廟宇建築旁，裡面有宗教神像。照片右側有橙色光斑或重複曝光效果，呈現出復古膠卷攝影的夢幻質感。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A formal family portrait of five people standing on a brick-paved path in what appears to be a public park or plaza. The family includes parents and t
photos.description_zh: 一張五人家庭合照，站在磚石鋪成的小徑上，背景似乎是公園或廣場。家庭成員包括父母和三個不同年齡的孩子，都穿著冬季服裝和正式服飾。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or Taiwanese community center/temple
photos.description_en: A family of four poses in front of what appears to be a memorial or shrine with Chinese text and crosses visible above. The parents stand with two you
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在一個看似紀念碑或神龕前合影，背景可見中文字和十字架。父母與兩個年幼的孩子合照，兩側擺放著花束。
photos.location: Taiwan or Taiwanese community center/temple

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — office or formal reception room
photos.description_en: Three men in their 30s–40s sit together at a large dark wooden table in what appears to be a Taiwanese office or formal living room. A traditional Chi
photos.description_zh: 三位約三、四十歲的男士圍坐在一張深色大木桌旁，背景是木質護牆板與一幅傳統山水畫，左側可見整排書籍的書架。桌上擺放著茶壺、茶杯及小點心，看起來像是在台灣的辦公室或正式客廳中進行茶敘聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan — office or formal reception room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A formal family portrait of five people taken indoors, likely in a Taiwanese home. An elderly woman wearing glasses and a dark floral top is seated at
photos.description_zh: 一張在室內拍攝的家庭合照，可能攝於台灣的家中。一位戴眼鏡、穿深色花紋上衣的年長女性坐在中間，身旁站著四位家人：一位穿亮桃紅色中式立領上衣、佩戴翡翠墜飾的女性，一位站在後方的男性，一位穿卡其色外套與拼色毛衣的青少年男孩，以及一位穿灰色西裝外套的年幼男孩。背景可見紅色桌布與牆上的時鐘。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A family group of five people posed together on a floral-patterned sofa in a Taiwanese home. An older couple sits on the left with a toddler girl (aro
photos.description_zh: 五位家人在台灣家中的花紋沙發上合影。左邊的年長夫婦懷中抱著一位約兩三歲的小女孩，小女孩手拿彩色小球；右邊坐著一對較年輕的夫婦。室內擺設溫馨，牆上掛著電話和相框，茶几上擺放著零食和飲料。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — hilltop overlook in southern Taiwan, possibly Shoushan (壽山) in Kaohsiung or similar viewpoint overlooking aquaculture ponds
photos.description_en: A young woman holds a toddler at a scenic hilltop overlook, with a panoramic view of fish ponds, waterways, and low-lying coastal terrain stretching i
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性在山頂觀景台抱著一個幼兒，背景是廣闊的魚塭、水道與低窪的沿海地形，遠方隱沒在薄霧之中。女性穿著淺粉色上衣，面帶微笑望向鏡頭，幼兒身穿碎花衣服，直視相機。蔥綠的植被與養殖池塘的景觀顯示這是在台灣南部拍攝的。
photos.location: Taiwan — hilltop overlook in southern Taiwan, possibly Shoushan (壽山) in Kaohsiung or similar viewpoint overlooking aquaculture ponds

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — elevated scenic overlook, possibly overlooking aquaculture ponds or coastal wetlands in southern or western Taiwan
photos.description_en: A young woman holds a toddler at an elevated scenic overlook, with a panoramic view of water bodies, fish ponds, and green hills stretching into the h
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕母親在高處觀景台抱著幼兒，背後是開闊的水域風景，可見魚塭、河流與綠色丘陵在遠方朦朧延伸。母親身穿粉色碎花上衣，頭上架著太陽眼鏡，小女孩穿著碎花小衣裳。場景應為台灣某處知名風景區的觀景平台。
photos.location: Taiwan — elevated scenic overlook, possibly overlooking aquaculture ponds or coastal wetlands in southern or western Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A young family of four poses together in a cozy living room. The father, wearing large dark-framed glasses, sits on a chair holding an infant in a yel
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在溫馨的客廳裡合照。父親戴著大框黑色眼鏡，坐在椅子上抱著穿黃色條紋衣服的嬰兒；母親穿著深色毛衣站在旁邊，懷裡抱著一個穿粉紅色連身衣、開心地拿著太陽眼鏡玩耍的小女孩。照片捕捉了溫暖自然的家庭日常時光。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A toddler in a pink cardigan and red pants playfully reaches up to feed cake to a woman at what appears to be a birthday celebration. The table is cov
photos.description_zh: 一個穿著粉色外套和紅色褲子的幼兒，正開心地拿著叉子餵一位女士吃蛋糕，看起來是在慶祝生日。桌上鋪著花布，擺著切開的蛋糕、杯子和一個紅色容器。幾位女性和孩子圍坐在桌旁，室內有木質牆面裝潢，氣氛溫馨。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A woman, a toddler (approximately 2-3 years old), and an older man sit together on a couch in a home interior. All three are dressed in red or magenta
photos.description_zh: 一名女性、一位約兩三歲的幼兒和一名年長男性一同坐在家中沙發上，三人都穿著紅色或桃紅色的衣服，可能正值農曆新年期間。牆上掛著一幅浮世繪風格的畫作，旁邊是一部早期八〇年代常見的壁掛式有線電話。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — airport terminal (possibly Taipei Songshan or early CKS/Taoyuan Airport)
photos.description_en: A family group poses in what appears to be an airport terminal or large public building, likely in Taiwan. A man in a gray suit holds a toddler in a r
photos.description_zh: 一群家人在機場航廈或大型公共建築內合影，地點可能在台灣。中間穿灰色西裝的男子抱著一個穿紅色花衣的幼兒，左邊是兩位年長男性親戚，右邊是兩位年邁的女性長輩，背景可見其他旅客。這個場景像是接機或送機的家庭聚會，在當時的台灣家庭中十分常見。
photos.location: Taiwan — airport terminal (possibly Taipei Songshan or early CKS/Taoyuan Airport)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - amusement park or playground
photos.description_en: A father and young child at what appears to be an amusement park or playground. The child is sitting in a small ride-on boat while the father stands b
photos.description_zh: 一位父親和小孩在遊樂園或遊樂場。小孩坐在小船遊樂設施上，父親穿著圖案毛衣站在旁邊。
photos.location: Taiwan - amusement park or playground

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A young woman with curly dark hair sits outdoors wearing a red blouse and grey sweater vest, smiling at the camera. Behind her appears to be a street
photos.description_zh: 一位留著捲髮的年輕女性坐在戶外，穿著紅色上衣和灰色毛衣背心，對著鏡頭微笑。她身後可以看到街景，有建築物和一些招牌。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States - petting zoo/farm
photos.description_en: A family scene at what appears to be a petting zoo or farm, showing children and adults interacting with several goats on a gravel ground. The people
photos.description_zh: 在動物園或農場的家庭場景，可見兒童和成人在碎石地上與幾隻山羊互動。人們穮著冬季服裝，顯示參觀時天氣較為涼爽。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States - petting zoo/farm

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - amusement park or playground
photos.description_en: Two young children riding on a colorful toy train at what appears to be an amusement park or playground. The train is painted in bright red and green
photos.description_zh: 兩個小孩子坐在色彩鮮豔的玩具火車上，看起來像是在遊樂園或遊樂場。火車漆成鮮紅色和綠色，車號是R-6042，兩個孩子都穿著外套，笑得很開心。
photos.location: Taiwan - amusement park or playground

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or East Asia - petting zoo/farm attraction
photos.description_en: A family of three poses at what appears to be a petting zoo or farm attraction, with the mother holding a young child while the father stands beside t
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在似乎是動物園或農場景點合影，母親抱著小孩，父親站在旁邊。背景可見各種農場動物包括山羊和綿羊，還有一個茅草屋頂的涼亭。
photos.location: Taiwan or East Asia - petting zoo/farm attraction

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A family group photo taken at what appears to be an outdoor tourist location or attraction, with a modern concrete structure in the background. The gr
photos.description_zh: 一張在戶外旅遊景點或景區拍攝的家庭合照，背景是現代混凝土建築結構。照片中有不同年齡的大人和小孩，有些人穿著外套，顯示天氣較涼爽。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: A young Asian child in a dark blue school uniform with a school crest sits on concrete steps. Two adults in formal attire are partially visible standi
photos.description_zh: 一個穿著深藍色校服的亞洲小孩坐在水泥階梯上，校服上有校徽。身後可見兩位穿著正式服裝的大人，可能是學校相關活動或家庭外出的場合。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: Two young children sit together on a brown velvet armchair in front of a burgundy floral curtain. An older girl, around 3-5 years old with a bowl-cut
photos.description_zh: 兩個小孩坐在一張棕色絨布扶手椅上，背後是酒紅色花紋窗簾。年紀較大的女孩約三到五歲，留著齊瀏海的妹妹頭，穿著白紅相間的衣服，笑容燦爛，旁邊是一個約三到六個月大的嬰兒，穿著淺藍與黃色的上衣。畫面捕捉了姊弟（妹）倆在家中客廳的溫馨時刻。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Beach in East Asia, possibly Taiwan or Hong Kong
photos.description_en: A young woman smiles at the camera while holding a toddler on a sandy beach. Mountains or islands are visible across the hazy water in the background,
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性在沙灘上抱著一個幼兒，面帶微笑看向鏡頭。背景可見朦朧的海面及遠方的山巒或島嶼，沙灘上還有幾位遊客。女性身穿淺粉色上衣、戴著細金項鍊，小孩穿著深色碎花衣服，笑容燦爛。
photos.location: Beach in East Asia, possibly Taiwan or Hong Kong

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - outdoor scenic or geological site
photos.description_en: A couple poses together outdoors in an arid, sandy area with a dirt embankment or cliff face behind them. The woman wears a red blouse and pink skirt
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在戶外的沙地上合影，身後是一面土質山壁。女方穿著紅色上衣搭配粉紅色裙子，手提棕色皮包；男方戴眼鏡，穿格子短袖襯衫，肩背相機包。兩人看起來是在一處風景區或地質景點遊覽。
photos.location: Taiwan - outdoor scenic or geological site

photos.location_detail: Public transportation (bus or train) - possibly Taiwan or during travel
photos.description_en: A family of four sitting together in what appears to be a bus or train with red vinyl seats and decorative curtains. The parents are wearing warm swea
photos.description_zh: 一家四口坐在巴士或火車上，座椅是紅色皮革，還有裝飾性窗簾。父母穿著保暖毛衣，兩個小孩也穿得很暖和，看起來像是冬天出行或在較冷的地方旅行。
photos.location: Public transportation (bus or train) - possibly Taiwan or during travel

photos.location_detail: Hualien, Taiwan — in front of the Astar Hotel (亞士都飯店)
photos.description_en: A group of seven people — two couples and three children — pose in front of the Astar Hotel (亞士都飯店) in Hualien, Taiwan. The hotel sign advertises tour
photos.description_zh: 七人在花蓮亞士都飯店前合影，包括兩對夫妻與三個孩子。飯店招牌上寫著「觀光·渡假·蜜月·開會」。眾人穿著半正式服裝，看似家族旅遊或假日聚會。
photos.location: Hualien, Taiwan — in front of the Astar Hotel (亞士都飯店)

photos.location_detail: National Chung Hsing University (國立中興大學), Taichung, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A man in a grey suit and glasses poses proudly with one hand resting on a large stone monument inscribed with "中興湖" (Zhongxing Lake) at what appears t
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿灰色西裝、戴眼鏡的男士，在刻有「中興湖」三字的大石碑旁合影留念，地點應為台中的國立中興大學校園。背景可見一座造型獨特的圓形建築及其他校舍，湖畔四周新植的樹木尚未長成，顯示此區域為近期整建完成。
photos.location: National Chung Hsing University (國立中興大學), Taichung, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — park or botanical garden with labeled specimen trees
photos.description_en: A couple poses together at the base of a massive tree with dramatic exposed roots, likely a banyan or similar tropical species in a park or botanical
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在一棵巨大老樹的根部合影，樹根盤根錯節，氣勢壯觀，應為公園或植物園中的景點。女士穿著深藍上衣搭配珊瑚色長裙，坐在樹根上；男士穿著淺色襯衫和長褲，肩上掛著相機，站在她身旁。樹幹上可見一塊中文標示牌。
photos.location: Taiwan — park or botanical garden with labeled specimen trees

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home dining room
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family dinner around a round table laden with Chinese dishes. Five people are seated: a young girl on the far left, a younger wom
photos.description_zh: 一家人圍坐在圓桌旁享用豐盛的中式晚餐。桌邊共五人：最左邊是一位年幼的女孩，旁邊是穿條紋上衣的年輕女性，中間坐著穿著傳統織錦上衣的年長女性（看似家中長輩），再來是一位戴眼鏡的年長男性，最右邊則是穿碎花上衣的中年女性。場景為台灣住宅的餐廳，牆上有水晶壁燈、拱形門框鑲有裝飾玻璃，桌上擺滿佳餚。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home dining room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A smiling middle-aged woman holds a toddler in her arms inside a warmly lit home. The child, approximately 1-2 years old, wears a yellow floral top an
photos.description_zh: 一位面帶笑容的中年女性抱著一個約一到兩歲的幼兒，在溫馨的家中合影。小孩穿著黃色碎花上衣和紅色長褲，女性穿著針織毛衣。背景可見傳統台灣家庭的木製櫥櫃與玻璃展示架。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An older man, a young woman, and a toddler sit together on a sofa in a warmly-lit living room. The man wears a traditional dark Chinese jacket and smi
photos.description_zh: 一位年長男性、一位年輕女性和一個幼兒坐在客廳的沙發上合影。男性穿著深色中式外套，面帶微笑；女性將幼兒抱在膝上，小孩穿著粉紅色衣服，手中拿著疑似紅包的物品，推測可能是在農曆新年或其他節慶時拍攝的家庭照片。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hillside scenic overlook, possibly northern Taiwan
photos.description_en: A family of four poses at an outdoor scenic overlook with red metal railings and a hilly, partially developed landscape in the background. Two women a
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在戶外觀景台合影，背景可見紅色金屬欄杆和丘陵地帶的風景。中間的女性抱著一名穿紅色花衣和粉色褲子的幼兒，頭上還戴著太陽眼鏡。左邊的女性穿著格子外套，對著鏡頭揮手，右邊的男性穿著深色西裝外套，一家人笑容滿面。
photos.location: Taiwan - hillside scenic overlook, possibly northern Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: An older couple sits on a patterned sofa with a young toddler (approximately 2-3 years old) between them in what appears to be a living room in Taiwan
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦坐在花紋沙發上，中間抱著一個約兩三歲的小女孩，看起來是在台灣家中的客廳。女士穿著紅色上衣，男士穿著灰色毛衣，小女孩身穿紅色衣服，手裡抱著一顆彩色球。牆上掛著一幅傳統風格的畫作，旁邊有一台壁掛式電話。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A young woman poses in her white wedding dress inside a home, smiling at the camera. She wears a high-collared lace gown with floral embroidery, a lon
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子穿著白色婚紗在家中拍照，面帶微笑。她身穿高領蕾絲刺繡婚紗，頭戴花飾與長頭紗，佩戴珍珠項鍊。背景是一幅鹿紋裝飾壁毯，電視機上擺放著觀音瓷像等裝飾品。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A candid indoor family moment showing a young girl (around 4-6 years old) laughing joyfully in a pink striped sweater, seated at a table with a tea se
photos.description_zh: 一張溫馨的室內家庭照片，一個約四到六歲的小女孩穿著粉紅色條紋毛衣，開心地笑著，坐在擺有茶具的桌旁。她身後有一位女性背對鏡頭，旁邊坐著一位穿紅色外套、戴深色毛帽的男性。場景是一間佈置簡樸的客廳，牆上掛有電話、相框和壁燈。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - park or zoo
photos.description_en: A young East Asian woman in her 20s poses outdoors in a burgundy high-collar blouse with gathered sleeves. She stands in what appears to be a park or
photos.description_zh: 一位二十多歲的年輕女性身穿酒紅色高領泡泡袖上衣，在戶外留影。背景是一座公園或動物園，可見一隻孔雀正在開屏，周圍有草地、樹木和水泥階梯的丘陵景觀。
photos.location: Taiwan - park or zoo

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A young woman in a pastel striped sweater holds a toddler dressed in a red outfit in what appears to be a family living room. A framed Japanese-style
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著粉彩條紋毛衣的年輕女性抱著一個穿紅色衣服的幼兒，站在家中客廳裡。牆上掛著一幅日式風格的裝框畫作，身旁是鋪著鉤織桌巾的沙發。畫面右側可見另一位穿黃色上衣的人坐在餐桌旁。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: indoors - home, likely Taiwan
photos.description_en: Two women pose together indoors — an elderly woman seated wearing a dark navy wool coat, and a younger woman standing beside her with an arm around he
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在室內合影——年長的女性坐著，穿著深色羊毛外套；年輕的女性站在她身旁，手搭在她肩上，穿著粉紅色針織毛衣和同色裙子。拍攝地點看起來是一般家庭的室內環境，兩人親密的姿態顯示她們應為母女或祖孫關係。
photos.location: indoors - home, likely Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Indoors - home, likely United States or Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of six people — two couples with two young children — posed together on a couch in a living room. One woman holds a toddler in a yellow floral
photos.description_zh: 六人在客廳沙發上合照——兩對夫妻帶著兩個幼兒。一位女士抱著穿黃色花上衣和紅色花褲的小女孩，另一對夫妻抱著穿淺綠色衣服的新生嬰兒。茶几上擺著茶具，牆上掛著壁掛電話和一幅畫作。
photos.location: Indoors - home, likely United States or Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — tourist photo studio or cultural attraction
photos.description_en: A family of three poses in traditional Chinese imperial/wedding costumes at what appears to be a tourist photo studio or cultural attraction. The woma
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在觀光照相館或文化景點穿著傳統中式禮服合影。女性頭戴華麗的鳳冠花飾，男性戴眼鏡並穿戴傳統狀元帽，一名幼兒坐在兩人中間。三人坐在雕龍畫棟的華麗寶座椅上，背景是精緻的龍紋木雕屏風與大型宮燈裝飾。
photos.location: Taiwan — tourist photo studio or cultural attraction

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room
photos.description_en: A toddler (around 1-2 years old) in a pink top sits on a couch during what appears to be a birthday celebration, with a partially cut cake on the tabl
photos.description_zh: 一個約一到兩歲的小女孩穿著粉紅色上衣，坐在沙發上慶祝生日，面前的桌上有一個已切開的生日蛋糕。身後一位穿深紅色上衣的女性陪伴著她，左邊有一隻手伸過來遞東西給她，右邊還有一位家人入鏡。棕色花紋沙發和白色鉤針蕾絲桌巾，是典型八零年代台灣家庭客廳的擺設。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — mountain scenic area, likely a dam/reservoir overlook (possibly Shihmen Dam 石門水庫 or similar facility)
photos.description_en: A young woman and a toddler pose at a scenic mountain overlook, with a dam or reservoir facility visible in the valley below. The woman wears a plaid
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性抱著一個幼兒在山上的觀景台合影，背景可見山谷中的水壩或水庫設施。女性穿著格子外套搭配白色高領毛衣，肩背紅色提袋；小女孩開心地把大人的太陽眼鏡舉到臉上，笑容燦爛。拍攝地點看似台灣的山區風景區，季節為冬季或初春。
photos.location: Taiwan — mountain scenic area, likely a dam/reservoir overlook (possibly Shihmen Dam 石門水庫 or similar facility)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — scenic overlook above a river and fish ponds, possibly southern or central Taiwan
photos.description_en: A father holds his young daughter (approximately 2-3 years old) at a scenic overlook, with a river, fish ponds, and hazy lowlands stretching out behin
photos.description_zh: 一位父親抱著約兩三歲的小女兒，站在高處的觀景點。背景是一片河流、魚塘與朦朧的平原景色。父親戴著大框飛行員眼鏡，穿著花紋短袖襯衫，脖子上掛著相機背帶。松樹枝葉從畫面上方垂落，遠方霧濛濛的景色透露出溫暖潮濕的天氣。
photos.location: Taiwan — scenic overlook above a river and fish ponds, possibly southern or central Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, apartment living room
photos.description_en: An older man wearing a dark knit cap and red jacket sits on a couch with a young girl of about 3-5 years old on his lap, both smiling warmly. They are
photos.description_zh: 一位戴著深色毛線帽、穿著紅色外套的年長男性坐在沙發上，懷中抱著一個約三到五歲的小女孩，兩人笑容滿面。室內可見沙發上的鉤織桌巾、牆上掛著一幅藝術畫作及壁掛式對講機。兩人都穿著紅色衣服，可能是在過農曆新年等喜慶場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, apartment living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home living room
photos.description_en: Two older adults and a young girl sit together on a patterned couch in a living room, all wearing matching red clothing likely for a Lunar New Year ce
photos.description_zh: 兩位長輩和一個小女孩一起坐在客廳的花紋沙發上，三人都穿著紅色的衣服，看起來像是在慶祝農曆新年。小女孩大約三到五歲，笑容燦爛地坐在女長輩的腿上，開心地比手勢。牆上掛著一幅傳統畫作和一台壁掛式電話。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family portrait of five women taken indoors, likely in a home in Taiwan. An elderly woman wearing glasses and a dark jacket sits
photos.description_zh: 這是一張多代同堂的家族合照，五位女性在室內合影。一位戴眼鏡、穿深色外套的年長女性坐在中間，四位年紀較輕的女性站在她身後，年齡從中年到青年不等。照片構圖溫馨端莊，看起來像是一次家族聚會或探望長輩時所拍攝。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential home

photos.location_detail: Moon World (月世界), southern Taiwan (Kaohsiung/Tainan area)
photos.description_en: A landscape photograph showing dramatic eroded badlands ridgelines with deep gullies and sparse vegetation. Several small figures can be seen standing
photos.description_zh: 一張風景照，拍攝壯觀的惡地地形，泥岩山脊上有深刻的侵蝕溝壑，植被稀疏。數個人影站在山脊頂端，背景是晴朗的天空。這種地形酷似台灣南部著名的月世界惡地景觀。
photos.location: Moon World (月世界), southern Taiwan (Kaohsiung/Tainan area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home bathroom/kitchen
photos.description_en: A young child, approximately 2-3 years old, stands at a bathroom or kitchen sink washing hands or playing with water, while an adult (likely the mothe
photos.description_zh: 一個大約兩三歲的小女孩站在洗手台前洗手或玩水，身後一位大人（可能是媽媽或奶奶）彎腰伸手拿架子上的東西。小女孩穿著彩色背心搭配長袖上衣，好奇地直視鏡頭。場景是一個家中的洗手間或廚房，白色磁磚牆面，水槽旁放著粉色的塑膠用品。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home bathroom/kitchen

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - beach, possibly southern or eastern coast
photos.description_en: A young woman with a short bob haircut holds a toddler girl on a sandy beach. The woman wears a peach-colored blouse and carries a brown shoulder bag,
photos.description_zh: 一位留著短髮的年輕女性在沙灘上抱著一個穿著深色碎花衣服的小女孩。女性穿著粉橘色上衣、背著棕色肩背包，面帶微笑地看著懷中的孩子。背景中可見兩個人影站在海邊，遠處有一座海岬，畫面左側有一棵熱帶樹木。
photos.location: Taiwan - beach, possibly southern or eastern coast

photos.location_detail: indoors - home, likely Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: An older man in a dark navy traditional Chinese changshan sits beside a young woman holding a toddler on her lap in what appears to be a living room.
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿深藍色長衫的年長男士與一位年輕女性坐在客廳中，女性懷中抱著一個穿粉紅色衣服的幼兒。小孩手中拿著紅包，看起來可能是農曆新年期間拍攝的。背景可見陶瓷罐和鉤針編織的桌巾，營造出溫馨的居家氛圍。
photos.location: indoors - home, likely Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - rural cemetery/hillside burial ground
photos.description_en: A double-exposed photograph of a family visiting a traditional Taiwanese grave site bearing the surname 劉 (Liu). The granite tombstone reads "彰顯劉公鐵甲佳城
photos.description_zh: 一張重複曝光的照片，記錄了家人前往劉氏祖墳掃墓的情景。花崗岩墓碑上刻有「彰顯劉公鐵甲佳城」，圓形姓氏標誌上飾有仙鶴圖案。家人正在整理墓地，墓前擺放了橘子和鮮花作為供品，照片右側因重複曝光而出現了半透明的人影。
photos.location: Taiwan - rural cemetery/hillside burial ground

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — multiple mountain scenic areas including likely Taroko Gorge, Alishan, and Hehuan Mountain
photos.description_en: A scanned album page containing approximately 12-13 black-and-white photographs documenting travel to scenic mountain destinations in Taiwan. Location
photos.description_zh: 一頁掃描的相簿頁面，包含約十二至十三張黑白照片，記錄了台灣山區風景名勝的旅遊回憶。拍攝地點似乎包括太魯閣峽谷（大理石峭壁）、阿里山森林遊樂區（巨大神木與入口牌坊）以及合歡山（雪景與海拔標示牌）。多張合照中可見親友在各觀光景點、吊橋及瀑布前合影留念。
photos.location: Taiwan — multiple mountain scenic areas including likely Taroko Gorge, Alishan, and Hehuan Mountain

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: This is the back of a photograph printed on ORIENTALCOLOR photo paper. It bears a handwritten inscription reading "1985 August" along with a large cur
photos.description_zh: 這是一張沖印在ORIENTALCOLOR相紙上的照片背面。上面有手寫的「1985 August」字樣，以及一個黑色墨水的草書記號或簽名。表面有一塊修正液或塗白的痕跡。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Chinese restaurant, likely in Taiwan or a Chinese restaurant in the United States
photos.description_en: A couple sits side by side at a restaurant table with red vinyl booth seating. The woman on the left wears a dark navy top and has short permed hair;
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦並肩坐在餐廳的紅色皮革卡座內。左邊的女士穿著深藍色上衣，留著短捲髮；右邊的男士穿著淺灰色西裝外套搭配條紋襯衫。背景可見其他用餐的客人，桌上鋪著桃色桌布，擺放著摺好的餐巾和中式茶杯。
photos.location: Chinese restaurant, likely in Taiwan or a Chinese restaurant in the United States

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - private dining room in a Chinese restaurant
photos.description_en: Seven middle-aged to older men gathered around a large round dining table in what appears to be a private room at a Chinese restaurant. Four men are s
photos.description_zh: 七位中年至年長的男士圍坐在中式餐廳的大圓桌旁合影。四人坐在前排，三人站在後方。桌上擺滿了碗盤和杯子，看起來是一場正式的聚餐或老友重逢的場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - private dining room in a Chinese restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant (banquet room)
photos.description_en: A group of eleven people, mostly middle-aged and older women, gathered around a large round table at a Chinese restaurant for what appears to be a soc
photos.description_zh: 十一人聚集在中式餐廳的大圓桌旁，看似一場朋友聚餐或同學會。後排站著六位中年女性，前排坐著一位男性和四位女性。桌上擺放著茶杯、小碟和餐盤，是典型的中式宴席場景。
photos.location: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant (banquet room)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: Three people pose together at a Chinese restaurant or banquet hall. A middle-aged couple stands behind an elderly woman who is seated at a round table
photos.description_zh: 三人在中式餐廳或宴會廳合影。一對中年夫婦站在一位坐在圓桌前的年長女性身後，桌上擺有中式茶杯、小碟和一個蛋糕或糕點。餐廳裝潢包括嵌入式燈具、布面牆板和中式餐廳常見的廚房門。
photos.location: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant banquet room
photos.description_en: Five adults pose for a group photo at a restaurant dinner table set with wine glasses and plates. Three are seated in front — an older woman with glas
photos.description_zh: 五位成人在餐廳餐桌前合影，桌上擺放著酒杯和餐盤。前排坐著三人——中間是一位戴眼鏡的年長女性，左邊是穿深色外套的女性，右邊是穿條紋polo衫的男性。後排站著兩人：一位穿粉紅色上衣的女性和一位穿白色襯衫、打花領帶的男性。看起來是一場正式的餐敘聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant banquet room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A group of six people posed at a round banquet table in what appears to be a restaurant or banquet hall. Three are seated — an elderly woman with glas
photos.description_zh: 六人在餐廳或宴會廳的圓桌前合影。前排坐著三人，中間是一位戴眼鏡的年長女性，左右各坐著一位中年女性和男性；後排站著三人。桌上擺放著酒杯和花卉擺飾，看似一場家庭聚餐或慶祝活動。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - cultural park or tourist attraction
photos.description_en: Two women and a small child pose on a stone pathway at a traditional Chinese cultural park or tourist attraction in Taiwan. One woman crouches beside
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性與一名幼兒在台灣某傳統文化園區的石板步道上合影。一位女性蹲在幼兒旁邊，另一位站在一旁，背景可見涼亭、月門及傳統建築，天色陰沉。
photos.location: Taiwan - cultural park or tourist attraction

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel banquet hall
photos.description_en: A man stands on a raised platform at a formal banquet venue, placing a figurine or topper atop a large champagne glass tower pyramid. The tower sits o
photos.description_zh: 一名男子站在宴會廳的高台上，正將裝飾物放置在一座大型香檳塔的頂端。香檳塔擺放在鋪有酒紅色桌布的圓桌上，桌邊點綴著鮮花。一旁站著一位穿著白襯衫、繫紅色領結的服務生，場地為台灣典型的飯店宴會廳，牆面為木質飾板搭配鏡面與嵌入式燈具。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant
photos.description_en: Four men are seated around a round table at what appears to be a Chinese or Taiwanese restaurant, enjoying a meal or gathering. The restaurant feature
photos.description_zh: 四位男士圍坐在一間中式餐廳的圓桌旁聚餐。餐廳牆上掛有中國水墨畫，牆面為竹編裝飾，桌上擺放著茶杯和百合花插花。四人年齡從中年到年長不等，穿著半正式服裝，其中兩人手持小酒杯，氣氛輕鬆愉快。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - professional photography studio
photos.description_en: A formal studio portrait of a young couple, likely a wedding or engagement photo. The woman wears a royal blue brocade gown with a pearl brooch and ea
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫妻的正式攝影棚肖像照，可能是婚紗照或訂婚照。女方穿著寶藍色織錦禮服，配戴珍珠胸針和耳環；男方穿著深色西裝、白襯衫打蝴蝶結領帶，手持粉色和白色玫瑰花束。兩人在色彩鮮豔的花卉背景布前合影，風格為1980年代末至1990年代初典型的台灣婚紗攝影。
photos.location: Taiwan - professional photography studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoor banquet hall or restaurant
photos.description_en: An elderly couple posed together in front of a red curtain backdrop at what appears to be a formal celebration or banquet. Both wear corsages — the wo
photos.description_zh: 一對年長夫婦在紅色布幕前合影，看似出席正式慶祝宴會。兩人皆配戴胸花——女方身穿花卉圖案上衣，佩戴蘭花胸花及翡翠墜飾項鍊；男方身穿淺藍色西裝外套，胸前別著粉色花飾。從場景及穿著來看，應是結婚紀念日或壽宴等重要慶祝場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoor banquet hall or restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel banquet hall
photos.description_en: A middle-aged woman in a dark polka-dot dress poses behind a large champagne glass pyramid tower in what appears to be a hotel lobby or banquet hall.
photos.description_zh: 一位中年女士身穿深色圓點洋裝，站在飯店大廳或宴會廳的大型香檳塔後方合影。華麗的香檳塔置於鋪有酒紅色桌布的桌上，旁邊可見飯店服務人員，場景看似婚宴或正式慶祝活動。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant
photos.description_en: Five adults pose for a group photo at a formal restaurant dining table set with wine glasses, tea cups, and a floral centerpiece. Three people are sea
photos.description_zh: 五位成人在餐廳裡合影留念，餐桌上擺放著酒杯、茶杯和花卉裝飾。前排坐著兩位女士和一位男士，後排站著一位女士和一位男士。看起來是在高級中式餐廳的家庭聚餐或宴會場合。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant
photos.description_en: A teenage boy smiles at the camera while seated at a restaurant table. He wears a teal and white plaid button-up shirt and sits in a rattan chair. Beh
photos.description_zh: 一名十幾歲的男孩坐在餐廳的藤椅上，面帶微笑望向鏡頭。他穿著一件青綠色格子襯衫，背後可見其他用餐的客人及大片窗戶，餐廳光線明亮通透。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: An elderly Asian couple poses together smiling in a home living room, standing near a white cake on a table. The man wears a denim jacket over a strip
photos.description_zh: 一對年長的夫妻在家中客廳裡合影微笑，旁邊桌上放著一個白色蛋糕。先生穿著牛仔外套搭配條紋polo衫，戴著眼鏡；太太穿著花色上衣配黃色開襟衫，戴著大框眼鏡。背景可見水晶吊燈、中式山水畫和雕花木質家具，畫面邊緣還有其他人的身影。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - upscale hotel ballroom
photos.description_en: A large professional conference or seminar held in an elegant hotel ballroom. Dozens of predominantly East Asian male attendees in business suits sit
photos.description_zh: 一場在豪華飯店宴會廳舉行的大型專業會議或研討會。數十位以東亞男性為主的與會者身著西裝，坐在鋪有酒紅色桌布的長桌前，翻閱文件並做筆記。會場裝潢典雅，設有拱形窗戶、古典建築細節及壁燈，顯示這是在台灣或東亞地區的高級飯店舉辦的正式會議。
photos.location: Taiwan - upscale hotel ballroom

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall
photos.description_en: Five family members pose at a formal Chinese banquet table in a restaurant. Three are seated — an older woman on the left, an elderly woman with glass
photos.description_zh: 五位家庭成員在中式餐廳的宴席桌旁合影。前排坐著三人——左邊一位中年女性、中間一位戴眼鏡的年長女性、右邊一位中年男性——後排站著一對年輕夫婦。桌上擺放著酒杯、茶杯和花卉擺飾，看起來像是一場慶祝活動或家庭聚餐。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, private home
photos.description_en: A group of about eight adults gathered around a dining table in a home, sharing tea and oranges in what appears to be a social or family gathering. A
photos.description_zh: 約八位大人圍坐在家中餐桌旁，桌上擺著橘子和茶杯，氣氛溫馨融洽。一位穿藍色polo衫的男士站在桌旁端著小盤子，幾位不同年齡的女士圍坐聊天。桌上的橘子和泡茶的情景，顯示這是一場傳統的台灣家庭聚會或節日拜訪。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, private home

photos.location_detail: Restaurant — likely Taiwan or a Chinese restaurant in the United States
photos.description_en: A large family group of about 13 people gathers around a restaurant table for a hot pot dinner. Adults and children of varying ages pose together, wit
photos.description_zh: 約十三人的大家庭聚集在餐廳圍著火鍋用餐。大人和不同年齡的小孩一起合影，後排站立、前排就座。桌上擺著傳統火鍋及碗筷杯盤，看起來是一次溫馨的家族聚餐。
photos.location: Restaurant — likely Taiwan or a Chinese restaurant in the United States

photos.location_detail: Europe (Mediterranean region) or possibly a historic fort in Taiwan
photos.description_en: A large arched gateway or entrance built of aged red brick and stone, likely part of a historic fortification or city wall. The massive pointed arch o
photos.description_zh: 一座由老舊紅磚與石塊砌成的大型拱門入口，可能是歷史城牆或堡壘的一部分。巨大的尖拱門通向幽暗的內部，石階通往入口處，右側可見金屬欄杆。風化的磚石結構顯示出數百年的歲月痕跡。
photos.location: Europe (Mediterranean region) or possibly a historic fort in Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - conference venue or hotel ballroom
photos.description_en: Two men in dark business suits exchange a plaque or award on a stage during what appears to be a professional conference or seminar. An overhead proje
photos.description_zh: 兩位身穿深色西裝的男士在一場專業研討會或會議的舞台上交接獎牌或紀念品。兩人之間的桌上放著一台投影機，背後可見投影幕及一面寫有「1991」年份的組織橫幅。
photos.location: Taiwan - conference venue or hotel ballroom

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - amusement/theme park
photos.description_en: A young woman and two boys crouch together at what appears to be a theme park or amusement park, with a colorful cartoon character mural visible on a
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性與兩個男孩在遊樂園裡蹲在一起合照，身後柱子上有彩色的卡通人物壁畫。女性手持紅色零食盒，年幼的男孩也拿著零食。背景可見其他穿著冬裝的遊客及假山造景。
photos.location: Taiwan - amusement/theme park

photos.location_detail: Upscale restaurant or hotel — likely Taiwan or East Asia
photos.description_en: Four middle-aged adults — two couples — pose together at an upscale restaurant or hotel dining area. The elegant setting features white ornate chairs,
photos.description_zh: 四位中年人在高級餐廳或飯店餐廳合影，看起來是兩對夫妻一同聚餐。餐廳裝潢典雅，配有白色雕花椅子、酒杯和花卉擺設。兩位女士坐在中間，一位穿著色彩鮮豔的花卉上衣，另一位穿著白色外套，兩旁各坐一位穿著夏季休閒襯衫的男士。
photos.location: Upscale restaurant or hotel — likely Taiwan or East Asia

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A couple stands on a curved staircase behind a large champagne glass tower at what appears to be a wedding banquet. The man, in a dark suit, is pourin
photos.description_zh: 一對新人站在弧形樓梯上，身後是壯觀的香檳塔。男方身穿深色西裝，正將香檳倒入塔頂的杯中，女方穿著紅色上衣和白色短裙，面帶笑容。香檳塔是台灣婚宴中常見的傳統儀式，象徵幸福滿溢。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain park or scenic garden area, possibly Yangmingshan National Park or similar flower-viewing destination
photos.description_en: A middle-aged couple poses together on a garden pathway surrounded by blooming pink azaleas and moss-covered trees. They are both wearing colorful win
photos.description_zh: 一對中年夫妻在公園步道上合影，四周盛開著粉紅色的杜鵑花，樹幹上長滿青苔。兩人都穿著色彩鮮豔的風衣外套，背景是霧氣瀰漫的山區園林景色，應是春季賞花時節。步道後方可見其他遊客漫步，旁邊有色彩繽紛的矮欄杆。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain park or scenic garden area, possibly Yangmingshan National Park or similar flower-viewing destination

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain resort area, possibly Cingjing Farm (清境農場) or similar European-themed attraction in Nantou County
photos.description_en: A family of four poses for a photo in front of a large European-style resort building set against a mountainous backdrop in Taiwan. The father stands
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在台灣山區一座歐式度假建築前合影留念。父親穿著polo衫和淺色長褲站在左側，前方是穿藍色格紋襯衫的小男孩，母親穿著彩色花紋上衣，右側是穿長版外套和白色運動鞋的青少女。背景可見其他遊客和整齊的花圃，遠處群山環繞。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain resort area, possibly Cingjing Farm (清境農場) or similar European-themed attraction in Nantou County

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel conference ballroom
photos.description_en: A formal conference or professional meeting in an elegant hotel ballroom with arched windows and ornate architectural details. Rows of predominantly E
photos.description_zh: 一場在裝潢典雅的飯店宴會廳舉辦的正式會議，廳內設有拱形窗戶與精緻的建築裝飾。以東亞男性為主的與會者身穿灰色西裝，坐在鋪有紅色桌巾的長桌前，翻閱文件並佩戴名牌。場景顯示這是一場專業、學術或產業會議，可能在台灣或其他東亞地區舉行。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel conference ballroom

photos.location_detail: Japanese restaurant, likely in the United States or Taiwan
photos.description_en: A young couple poses together at a Japanese restaurant, seated at a table in front of a large decorative mural depicting geishas in traditional kimono
photos.description_zh: 一對年輕夫妻在一間日本餐廳合影，背後是一幅大型藝妓壁畫，畫中身著傳統和服的藝妓姿態優雅。男方穿著黑色V領毛衣搭配粉紅色襯衫，女方則穿著芥末黃色麻花針織毛衣，兩人親密地靠在一起微笑拍照。
photos.location: Japanese restaurant, likely in the United States or Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant
photos.description_en: A group of approximately nine people poses together at a restaurant table on Christmas Eve 1992. The table has hot pot equipment and condiments, sugge
photos.description_zh: 1992年平安夜，一家人在餐廳聚餐合影。桌上擺著火鍋器具和調味料，約九人齊聚一堂，前排坐著幾位年長女性，後排站著較年輕的家庭成員，氣氛溫馨熱鬧。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant

photos.location_detail: Presidential Office Building (總統府), Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A formal Presidential Tea Reception (總統茶會) held in the grand hall of the Presidential Office Building in Taipei, Taiwan. A speaker stands at a podium
photos.description_zh: 這是在台北總統府大廳舉行的總統茶會。一位講者站在飾有國徽的講台上致詞，兩側擺放中華民國國旗與大型花卉佈置，台下聚集了身著正式服裝的軍方將領與各界來賓。華麗的大廳鋪設紅地毯，兩側有鍍金裝飾壁板，上方懸掛古典書法匾額。
photos.location: Presidential Office Building (總統府), Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Veterans Home (榮譽之家), likely a military or veterans affairs facility
photos.description_en: A large formal group photo of approximately 30 people standing in front of a building labeled "榮譽之家" (House of Honor/Veterans Home) in Taiwan. The bui
photos.description_zh: 一張約三十人的正式團體照，拍攝於台灣「榮譽之家」（榮民之家）前方。建築物掛有紅白藍國旗色彩的裝飾，顯示為某種官方場合。團體成員看起來像是參訪代表團或會議出席者，多數人佩戴名牌，穿著正式商務服裝。
photos.location: Taiwan - Veterans Home (榮譽之家), likely a military or veterans affairs facility

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or tea house
photos.description_en: Three middle-aged Asian men are seated at a large round wooden table in what appears to be an upscale Taiwanese restaurant or tea house. The table is
photos.description_zh: 三位中年男士坐在一家台灣餐廳或茶館的大圓桌旁。桌上擺著茶杯、茶壺、啤酒杯、餐點及百合花裝飾。餐廳環境優雅，牆上掛著中國水墨畫，竹編牆面裝飾，大扇落地窗外可見綠意盎然的景色。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or tea house

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - public park or scenic garden area
photos.description_en: A family of four poses in front of a decorative rock waterfall at what appears to be a landscaped park or garden. The father stands on the left wearin
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在一座造景公園的假山瀑布前合影。父親戴著眼鏡、穿著棕色外套站在左邊，抱著一個幼兒，旁邊是一個較大的男孩和母親。前方有綠色竹節造型的欄杆，背景可見亞熱帶植物和公園設施。
photos.location: Taiwan - public park or scenic garden area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - northern mountainous area, possibly Yangmingshan National Park or northeast coast scenic area
photos.description_en: A group of approximately 12 adults poses together at a scenic hilltop viewing platform with wooden railings, overlooking lush green rolling hills and
photos.description_zh: 約十二位成年人在一個木造觀景台上合影，背景是翠綠的連綿山丘和蜿蜒的道路。這群人看起來是在進行一日遊或團體出遊，穿著夏季休閒服裝，戴著太陽眼鏡和遮陽帽。景色看似台灣北部的風景區，可能是陽明山國家公園或類似的山區景點。
photos.location: Taiwan - northern mountainous area, possibly Yangmingshan National Park or northeast coast scenic area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet venue
photos.description_en: A group of adults gather indoors at what appears to be a restaurant or social venue, with one man holding a smiling baby wearing a white hat and denim
photos.description_zh: 一群大人在一間餐廳或社交場所內聚會，其中一位男士抱著一個戴白色帽子、穿牛仔吊帶褲的嬰兒，小嬰兒面帶笑容十分可愛。場景中有傳統格子玻璃隔門和溫暖的吊燈照明，幾個人正在交談，營造出溫馨的家庭或社交聚會氛圍。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet venue

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant
photos.description_en: Three middle-aged to older East Asian men are seated at a restaurant table, sharing a meal and laughing together. The table has Chinese tea sets, glas
photos.description_zh: 三位中年至年長的男士在一間中式餐廳裡聚餐，氣氛輕鬆愉快。桌上擺著茶壺、茶杯、玻璃杯和一大盤菜餚，旁邊還有插花裝飾。牆上掛著中國水墨畫，餐廳內有竹編裝飾，看起來是一間有特色的中式餐館。
photos.location: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — traditional-style restaurant
photos.description_en: A group of seven people gathered at a traditional Asian-style restaurant, posing together around a table while holding drinks. The group includes thre
photos.description_zh: 七人在一間傳統風格的亞洲餐廳中聚餐合影。三位年長女性坐在餐桌旁，一對中年夫婦站在後方，兩名青少年（穿紅色上衣的女孩和穿格子襯衫的男孩）站在最後排。大家面帶笑容，舉杯同慶，氣氛歡樂融洽。
photos.location: Taiwan — traditional-style restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - upscale Chinese restaurant banquet room
photos.description_en: Four adults—two couples—are seated at a round banquet table in what appears to be a private dining room of a Chinese/Taiwanese restaurant. The table i
photos.description_zh: 四位成人坐在中式餐廳包廂的圓桌旁，桌上鋪著紅色桌布，擺放著杯盤和一瓶綠色汽水。兩對夫妻並排而坐，面帶微笑地望向鏡頭。背景為木質護牆板和精緻壁紙，看起來是一間頗為講究的宴會餐廳，畫面下方還可隱約看到其他賓客的身影。
photos.location: Taiwan - upscale Chinese restaurant banquet room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel banquet hall
photos.description_en: A champagne tower ceremony at a formal event in a hotel banquet hall. A man in a dark suit pours from a large champagne bottle into the top of an elab
photos.description_zh: 在飯店宴會廳舉行的香檳塔儀式。一位穿著深色西裝的男士將大瓶香檳從頂端倒入多層香檳杯塔中，杯塔擺放在鋪有酒紅色桌裙的圓桌上。飯店服務人員身穿白襯衫、打紅色領結，站在一旁待命，現場以銅製絨繩圍欄隔開展示區域。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Japanese-style restaurant
photos.description_en: A family gathering at a Japanese-style restaurant, with seven people posed around a dining table holding drinks. Four people stand in the back row — a
photos.description_zh: 一家人在日式餐廳聚餐的合照，七人圍坐在餐桌旁，手持飲料合影。後排站著一位中年男士、一位穿著紅黑花紋旗袍領上衣的女士、一位穿紅色毛衣的少女，以及一位穿藍綠格子襯衫的少年；前排坐著三位年長女士。眾人舉杯慶祝，氣氛歡樂溫馨。
photos.location: Taiwan - Japanese-style restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A group of seven adults pose together at what appears to be a restaurant or banquet hall. Five people are seated in the front row (one man in a pink p
photos.description_zh: 七位成年人在一家餐廳或宴會廳合影。前排坐著五人——一位戴眼鏡、穿粉色polo衫的男士和四位穿著各式花色上衣的女士；後排站著兩人——一位穿白色西裝外套的女士和一位穿條紋polo衫的男士。背景有花紋壁紙和白色藤椅，看起來是正式餐廳的場景。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — professional portrait studio
photos.description_en: A formal multi-generational family studio portrait featuring 14 people arranged in two rows. The elderly patriarch and matriarch are seated prominentl
photos.description_zh: 一張正式的多代家庭攝影棚合照，共有十四人分成前後兩排。年長的祖父母端坐在前排正中央，孫輩們分坐兩旁，成年子女與配偶則站立在後排。整體構圖遵循傳統華人家庭合照的慣例，長輩居中為尊。
photos.location: Taiwan — professional portrait studio

photos.location_detail: indoors - home, likely Taiwan or Taiwanese-American home
photos.description_en: Five adults gathered in a living room, with four men seated on a light-colored leather sofa and one woman seated at floor level by a coffee table. The
photos.description_zh: 五位成年人聚集在客廳中，四位男士坐在淺色皮沙發上，一位戴眼鏡的女士坐在茶几旁。茶几上擺放著中式茶壺、茶杯和一盤橘子，看起來像是親友聚會的場景。客廳裝潢溫馨，有檯燈、掛畫和花紋地毯。
photos.location: indoors - home, likely Taiwan or Taiwanese-American home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, private home
photos.description_en: A group of adults gathered in a well-furnished living room, likely during a New Year's Day visit. Two women are the main subjects: an older woman wear
photos.description_zh: 一群人在佈置精美的客廳中聚會，可能是元旦拜年。照片主要拍攝兩位女性：左邊一位年長女士戴著眼鏡，穿著紫色外套配花卉上衣；右邊一位中年女士穿著暗紅色花紋洋裝，手持茶杯。左側還可見一位男士和另一位女士的身影。客廳內有玻璃展示櫃、獎盃、盆栽植物，以及台灣家庭常見的花紋地磚。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, private home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant
photos.description_en: A group of women and at least one man are seated around a large round table at a Chinese restaurant, enjoying a meal together. The restaurant features
photos.description_zh: 一群女性與至少一位男性圍坐在中式餐廳的大圓桌旁聚餐。餐廳裝潢有傳統幾何花紋的格窗隔屏，桌上擺著合菜、柳橙汁和茶杯，眾人使用筷子用餐。這看起來是一場新年聚餐或社交聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - Chinese restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - upscale hotel restaurant
photos.description_en: A group of seven middle-aged to older adults gathered around a dining table at an upscale hotel restaurant or lounge. The table is set with coffee cup
photos.description_zh: 七位中年至年長的成人圍坐在一間高級飯店餐廳或酒廊的餐桌旁。桌上擺放著咖啡杯、甜點和餐食，右側可見香檳冰桶。背景有大型花藝裝飾和典雅的檯燈，看起來是一場聚會或社交活動。
photos.location: Taiwan - upscale hotel restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely Yangmingshan (陽明山) or similar mountain park
photos.description_en: Two people, likely a couple, pose together on rocks beside a small waterfall in a lush park or garden setting. They are surrounded by blooming pink az
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦站在公園小瀑布旁的石頭上合影，四周粉紅色的杜鵑花或櫻花盛開，古老的大樹長滿青苔，構成優美的畫面。天氣陰濕有霧，左側可見另一位撐傘的遊客。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely Yangmingshan (陽明山) or similar mountain park

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely a government or institutional building, possibly in Taipei
photos.description_en: A photo taken through a window (likely a tour bus or vehicle), showing a large neoclassical-style building with arched entryways and ornate stonework.
photos.description_zh: 透過車窗（可能是遊覽車）拍攝的照片，可見一棟新古典主義風格的大型建築，有拱形入口和精美的石雕裝飾。玻璃上隱約可見車內乘客的倒影，左側有一根現代路燈。日期印記顯示為93年8月17日。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely a government or institutional building, possibly in Taipei

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential apartment
photos.description_en: A group of four to five adults gathered around a dining table in a compact home dining area, sharing a meal and conversation. The interior features wo
photos.description_zh: 四到五位大人圍坐在家中餐桌旁，一邊用餐一邊聊天。室內裝潢有木質壁板、小型水晶吊燈、磁磚地板和壁掛式電話，是1990年代初期台灣公寓的典型風格。一位穿著黑白圓點上衣的女士對著鏡頭微笑，其他人則在交談中。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential apartment

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - family home
photos.description_en: An elderly man in a dark suit with a red pocket square sits at a round dining table, preparing to cut a fruit-decorated birthday cake in a Taiwanese h
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深色西裝、別著紅色口袋巾的年長男性，坐在台灣家中的圓桌旁，準備切一個水果裝飾的生日蛋糕。房間內有傳統中式擺設，包括雕花木製神桌及上方的神像，牆上掛著中國結。畫面右下角隱約可見一個小孩的頭。
photos.location: Taiwan - family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home dining room
photos.description_en: A family gathering around a dining table in a home, with four women seated prominently — a younger woman in a polka dot blouse, two elderly women (lik
photos.description_zh: 一場家庭聚會，四位女性圍坐在餐桌旁——一位穿著黑白圓點上衣的年輕女性、兩位年長的老奶奶，以及一位戴眼鏡的中年女性。桌上擺著橘子、糕點、碗盤和面紙盒，看起來像是家人間的日常聚會或拜訪。前景中還可見至少兩位其他家人的背影。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home dining room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: Four people seated around a round wooden dining table in a home setting, likely during a family visit. An elderly woman (possibly in her 80s-90s) sits
photos.description_zh: 四人圍坐在家中圓形木製餐桌旁，看似一次家庭聚會。一位年邁的長輩（約八九十歲）坐在中間，兩側是兩位中年女性和一位中年男性，桌上擺放著橘子、茶杯和點心。傳統中式雕花木椅和家居擺設顯示這可能是在台灣的住家中。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home dining room
photos.description_en: An elderly woman wearing glasses and a dark patterned blouse sits beside a middle-aged man in a blue polo shirt at a polished dark wood dining table.
photos.description_zh: 一位戴眼鏡的年長女性穿著深色花紋上衣，與一位穿藍色polo衫的中年男性並坐在深色木質餐桌旁。桌上擺著橘子等物品，兩人坐在雕花木椅上，神情自然放鬆，看起來像是在台灣家中的餐廳。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home dining room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, residential living room
photos.description_en: Three adults are seated in a living room with sage-green leather sofas. Two women sit together on the left sofa — a middle-aged woman in a white blous
photos.description_zh: 三位成人坐在一間擺設著灰綠色皮沙發的客廳裡。左邊沙發上坐著一位穿白色上衣的中年女性和一位白髮的年長女性，對面沙發上坐著一位穿格紋背心的中年男性。茶几上擺著一盤橘子、一個紅色禮盒和茶杯，看起來是一次輕鬆的家庭拜訪。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, residential living room

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: This is the back side of a family group photo, containing handwritten Chinese annotations in blue ink that identify each person in the photo. The text
photos.description_zh: 這是一張家族合照的背面，用藍色原子筆手寫標註照片中每個人的姓名。文字分為「後排」和「前排」兩行，每個名字旁邊以括號標示家族關係。右下角標註「約1994」，顯示照片大約攝於1994年。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - coastal beach, possibly southern or western coast
photos.description_en: A beach horseback riding scene on a wide sandy shore. Several riders are mounted on horses, with a woman prominently riding a dark horse in the center
photos.description_zh: 寬闊沙灘上的騎馬活動場景。數名騎士騎在馬上，畫面中央偏右處一名女子騎著一匹深色馬匹特別醒目。其他騎馬者和遊客散佈在海岸線旁，天空晴朗有雲，遠處左方可見建築物。
photos.location: Taiwan - coastal beach, possibly southern or western coast

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home kitchen
photos.description_en: A teenage boy smiles while presenting a decorated chocolate cake in a home kitchen. He is wearing a navy blue Quiksilver t-shirt layered over a white
photos.description_zh: 一位少年在家中廚房裡微笑著展示一個裝飾精美的巧克力蛋糕。他穿著深藍色Quiksilver短袖T恤，內搭白色長袖上衣。廚房有白色磁磚牆面、深色木質櫥櫃，身後的窗戶顯示當時是夜晚。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home kitchen

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home kitchen
photos.description_en: Two smiling teenagers pose together behind a decorated cake in a home kitchen. The boy wears a blue Quiksilver long-sleeve shirt and the girl behind h
photos.description_zh: 兩位青少年在家中廚房裡，面帶笑容地站在一個裝飾蛋糕後方合影。男孩穿著藍色Quiksilver長袖上衣，女孩穿著黑色上衣，留著一頭長黑髮。廚房流理台上可見雜誌、馬克杯等日常用品，看起來是一場溫馨的家庭生日慶祝。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home kitchen

photos.location_detail: Yangmingshan (陽明山), Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of people walk along a tree-lined path in a park or garden on a misty, rainy spring day. Cherry blossoms bloom overhead while vibrant pink aza
photos.description_zh: 一群人在細雨濛濛的春日裡，沿著公園的林蔭步道散步。頭頂上櫻花盛開，步道右側杜鵑花綻放。三人並肩走在前方，後方一人撐著彩色雨傘，構成一幅充滿春意的踏青畫面。
photos.location: Yangmingshan (陽明山), Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - cemetery/burial hillside
photos.description_en: A traditional Taiwanese grave site for a deceased matriarch named 劉陳阿春 (Liu Chen A-Chun), flanked by stone lion guardians and decorated granite panels
photos.description_zh: 一座傳統台灣墓園，墓碑上刻有「顯妣劉陳阿春」，兩側有石獅守護，墓身以花崗石建造並飾有彩繪圖案。墓前擺放鮮花、紅色塑膠袋裝的供品及一盒糕餅，應是清明節前後掃墓祭祖時所攝。墓碑刻有「民國八三年春」，即一九九四年春天立碑。
photos.location: Taiwan - cemetery/burial hillside

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home
photos.description_en: A woman in her 50s-60s wearing a bright orange blouse sits on a dark red sofa with white lace doilies, proudly holding a newborn baby dressed in a lig
photos.description_zh: 一位五六十歲的女士穿著亮橘色上衣，坐在鋪有白色蕾絲桌巾的深紅色沙發上，懷中抱著一個穿著淺藍色荷葉領衣服的新生嬰兒。室內擺設帶有典型台灣家庭的風格，女士戴著翡翠耳環、塗著口紅，面帶溫暖的笑容望向鏡頭。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, private home
photos.description_en: Six adults — three men and three women — sit together on a couch in a well-furnished living room, posing for a group photo at night. The room features
photos.description_zh: 六位成人——三男三女——在裝潢雅致的客廳沙發上合影留念，拍攝時間為夜晚。客廳擺設講究，有大型落地窗搭配白色窗簾、玻璃茶几上擺放著天鵝裝飾品。眾人穿著夏季休閒服飾，看似親友聚會的場景。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, private home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - professional photo studio
photos.description_en: A young family of four poses for a formal portrait in front of an ornate painted backdrop depicting a grand interior with chandeliers and tapestries.
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在華麗的室內背景布幕前拍攝正式全家福。父親身穿藍色西裝，抱著身穿紅白洋裝的小女孩；母親穿著淺綠色外套，懷中抱著穿黃色上衣的幼兒。拍攝地點應為台灣的專業照相館。
photos.location: Taiwan - professional photo studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - photo studio
photos.description_en: A formal studio portrait of two adults (likely grandparents) holding two young children, posed in front of an ornate painted backdrop depicting a luxu
photos.description_zh: 一張正式的攝影棚全家福照片，兩位長輩（可能是祖父母）各抱著一個幼兒，背景是繪有水晶吊燈和羅馬柱的華麗室內場景。男士穿著深藍色西裝打著花紋領帶，女士穿著色彩鮮豔的花卉印花洋裝。小男孩穿著黃藍色上衣，小女孩穿著紅白條紋碎花洋裝。
photos.location: Taiwan - photo studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - professional photo studio
photos.description_en: A couple poses together in a professional photo studio in front of a painted backdrop depicting a luxurious interior with a chandelier, elegant curtai
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在專業攝影棚中合影，背景是繪有華麗室內場景的布幕，包括水晶吊燈、典雅窗簾和沙發。女士穿著色彩繽紛的花卉洋裝，男士穿著深色西裝搭配花紋領帶。兩人看起來約四、五十歲，穿著正式，似乎是為特別場合或紀念日所拍攝的沙龍照。
photos.location: Taiwan - professional photo studio

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — nature park or tourist attraction
photos.description_en: A large group of approximately 20-25 middle-aged and elderly adults pose together on what appears to be an open-air tour tram or cart, surrounded by l
photos.description_zh: 約二十多位中老年人搭乘露天遊園車，在茂密的熱帶綠蔭中合影留念。眾人穿著輕便休閒，許多人戴著太陽眼鏡和帽子，看似一次團體旅遊或郊遊活動。照片由台灣彩虹沖印沖洗。
photos.location: Taiwan — nature park or tourist attraction

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - rural/mountainous nature area
photos.description_en: A group of adults carefully crosses a rustic bamboo log bridge in a lush, forested area. A woman in a dark navy blazer and black pants is prominently
photos.description_zh: 一群成人小心翼翼地走過一座簡易的竹木橋，周圍是茂密的熱帶森林。一位穿著深藍色西裝外套和黑色長褲的女士正踏上木橋，手扶竹欄杆。後方有數人跟隨，前方有人伸手協助。場景看似一次鄉間或山林步道的團體出遊。
photos.location: Taiwan - rural/mountainous nature area

photos.location_detail: Japanese restaurant, likely in Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of approximately seven adults seated around a table at what appears to be a Japanese-style restaurant, with a traditional shoji-style wall lan
photos.description_zh: 約七位成年人圍坐在一間日式餐廳的餐桌旁，背景可見傳統障子風格的壁燈。桌上擺滿了餐盤、小杯和碟子，看起來正在用餐中。這群中年至年長的朋友或家人正在享受一頓愉快的聚餐。
photos.location: Japanese restaurant, likely in Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - tropical forest trail, possibly a national forest recreation area
photos.description_en: A group of three people hiking along a trail through a dense tropical or subtropical forest. The woman in the foreground is smiling at the camera, wea
photos.description_zh: 三個人在茂密的熱帶或亞熱帶森林中沿著步道健行。走在最前面的女性面帶微笑望向鏡頭，身穿深藍色外套搭配淺色上衣。後方還有兩人跟隨，四周環繞著翠綠的植被和高大的樹木。
photos.location: Taiwan - tropical forest trail, possibly a national forest recreation area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indigenous village or cultural park (possibly Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village or similar site)
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man in a white short-sleeve shirt and plaid pants poses in front of a traditional thatched-roof stilt house. The structure is made of ba
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子身穿白色短袖襯衫和格子長褲，站在一棟傳統茅草屋頂高腳屋前合影。建築以竹木搭建，屋頂覆蓋棕櫚葉，屋下可見編織竹籃。背景是茂密的熱帶植被，場景似為台灣原住民部落或東南亞鄉村。
photos.location: Taiwan - indigenous village or cultural park (possibly Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village or similar site)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - tropical botanical garden or park
photos.description_en: A person walks along a narrow concrete pathway through a lush tropical garden or forest setting. The path is lined with dense vegetation including ban
photos.description_zh: 一人沿著狹窄的水泥小徑行走於茂密的熱帶花園或森林中。小徑兩旁長滿濃密的植物，包括香蕉樹、赫蕉（紅色熱帶花卉）、高大的樹木及各種熱帶植被。照片中的人背對鏡頭，穿著淺色上衣和深色褲子。
photos.location: Taiwan - tropical botanical garden or park

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - forest trail or nature park
photos.description_en: A group of approximately 10 adults hiking along a forest trail through dense tropical or subtropical vegetation. The group, mostly middle-aged women,
photos.description_zh: 一群約十位成年人沿著茂密的森林步道健行。這群人以中年女性為主，沿著被高大樹木和茂盛植被環繞的泥土小徑排成一列前行。大多數人穿著休閒外套和舒適的步行服裝，看起來像是一次有組織的團體郊遊或自然之旅。
photos.location: Taiwan - forest trail or nature park

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A close-up photograph of dense tropical foliage with glossy green leaves and clusters of red flowering blossoms, likely bougainvillea. A building or w
photos.description_zh: 一張茂密熱帶植物的近距離照片，可見光亮的綠色葉片和成簇的紅色花朵，可能是九重葛。左側綠葉後方隱約可見建築物或牆壁。照片拍攝於戶外庭院或花園。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - upscale restaurant
photos.description_en: Two couples pose together at an upscale restaurant with decorative brick walls and a large mural map in the background. The two women are seated in di
photos.description_zh: 兩對夫婦在一家裝潢精緻的餐廳合影，背景是磚牆與大型地圖壁畫。兩位女士坐在紅色扇形高背椅上，兩位男士站在她們身後。桌上擺設講究，鋪著黃色桌布，搭配茶杯、餐盤與珊瑚色餐巾。
photos.location: Taiwan - upscale restaurant

photos.location_detail: Latin American-themed restaurant, likely in Taiwan or possibly during travel
photos.description_en: Two middle-aged Asian men pose at a Latin American-themed restaurant. One is seated wearing a red jacket, while the other stands beside him in a grey
photos.description_zh: 兩位中年男子在一間拉丁美洲風格的餐廳合影。一人身穿紅色外套坐在餐桌旁，另一人穿著灰色西裝站在旁邊，頭上戴著一頂大型裝飾寬邊帽，氣氛輕鬆愉快。餐廳牆上掛有一幅色彩繽紛的地圖壁畫，可見「San Blas」及「Cuzco」等地名，搭配磚牆裝飾和精心摺疊的餐巾。
photos.location: Latin American-themed restaurant, likely in Taiwan or possibly during travel

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountainous scenic area, possibly Taroko Gorge or a similar Central Mountain Range viewpoint
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man poses at a mountain overlook with dramatic, lush green peaks and deep valleys behind him. He wears a white-and-navy striped polo shi
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子站在山頂觀景台上拍照留念，身後是壯觀的翠綠群山與深邃峽谷。他身穿白底藍條紋Polo衫、深色長褲，繫著一條賓士標誌的皮帶扣。背景中可見其他遊客，景色看似台灣的高山風景區。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountainous scenic area, possibly Taroko Gorge or a similar Central Mountain Range viewpoint

photos.location_detail: Las Vegas or entertainment venue, possibly Taiwan
photos.description_en: A stage performance photographed from the audience, showing multiple performers in elaborate sparkly costumes with dramatic wigs or headdresses under
photos.description_zh: 從觀眾席拍攝的舞台表演照片，多位表演者穿著華麗的亮片服裝，戴著誇張的假髮或頭飾，在繽紛的舞台燈光下演出。場景為大型歌舞秀或劇場表演，眾多舞者分佈在多層舞台上，紅、藍、黃、綠等色彩繽紛的聚光燈交織照射。
photos.location: Las Vegas or entertainment venue, possibly Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Volcanic site, likely Mount Aso (阿蘇山) in Kyushu, Japan, or possibly Yangmingshan/volcanic area in Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of tourists walks across a vast, dark volcanic ash plain near a mountainside, likely at the crater of an active volcano. Three people walk in
photos.description_zh: 一群遊客行走在一片廣闊的火山灰地上，背景是火山山坡。前方三人並排前行，後方還有數位遊客跟隨，有人撐著雨傘。整片景觀呈現火山地形特有的荒涼，深色火山土壤遍布，天空陰沉多雲。
photos.location: Volcanic site, likely Mount Aso (阿蘇山) in Kyushu, Japan, or possibly Yangmingshan/volcanic area in Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Volcanic crater, possibly Irazú Volcano (Costa Rica) or Yangmingshan area (Taiwan)
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man poses in front of a volcanic crater with a greenish-yellow sulfuric lake at the bottom. He is wearing a light beige jacket over a pa
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子在火山口前合影，火山口底部有一池黃綠色的硫磺湖。他穿著米色外套搭配花紋襯衫，面帶微笑。背景是壯觀的岩石火山口壁，雲霧繚繞，看起來像是中美洲或東南亞的知名火山景點。
photos.location: Volcanic crater, possibly Irazú Volcano (Costa Rica) or Yangmingshan area (Taiwan)

photos.location_detail: Volcanic crater, possibly in Taiwan (e.g., Yangmingshan) or Southeast Asia
photos.description_en: A couple poses together at the edge of what appears to be a volcanic crater. The dark, rocky terrain and barren landscape suggest they are visiting a
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦站在火山口邊緣合影。背景是深色的火山岩地形，荒涼壯觀。男士穿著淺色外套內搭條紋polo衫，女士穿著灰色花紋上衣，兩人穿著適合高地涼爽天氣的服裝，看起來是一趟旅遊行程。
photos.location: Volcanic crater, possibly in Taiwan (e.g., Yangmingshan) or Southeast Asia

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - memorial hall or museum (possibly Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall or similar monumental site)
photos.description_en: A man in a grey suit stands posing in front of a large bronze or stone relief sculpture at what appears to be a memorial hall or museum. The monumenta
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿灰色西裝的男子站在一座紀念館或博物館內的大型青銅或石雕浮雕前合影。身後的紀念性浮雕刻畫了歷史人物，鑲嵌在高大的石柱之間。照片需要旋轉90度才是正確方向。
photos.location: Taiwan - memorial hall or museum (possibly Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall or similar monumental site)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain resort hotel, possibly Alishan, Cingjing, or similar mountain area
photos.description_en: A young woman with long dark hair leans on the wooden railing of a hotel balcony, smiling at the camera. She wears a dark striped t-shirt and black pa
photos.description_zh: 一位長髮年輕女子靠在飯店陽台的木欄杆上，面帶微笑望向鏡頭。她穿著深色條紋T恤和黑色長褲。身後是一排附有陽台的飯店客房，修剪整齊的草坪與灌木叢，遠處可見雲霧繚繞的山巒，看起來是在山區度假飯店。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain resort hotel, possibly Alishan, Cingjing, or similar mountain area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan
photos.description_en: A nighttime outdoor photo that appears to have been scanned upside-down. A person wearing a white shirt and dark pants is visible (inverted) near the
photos.description_zh: 一張在夜間戶外拍攝的照片，掃描時上下顛倒。畫面上方（倒置）可見一人穿著白色上衣和深色褲子，站在灌木叢和石柱附近。場景光線昏暗，應是夜間使用閃光燈拍攝，日期印記顯示為94年12月21日。
photos.location: Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Indoors - event venue or school auditorium, likely in Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: Two young people, a teenage boy in a denim shirt and a teenage girl in a maroon t-shirt, pose together at what appears to be a holiday or year-end par
photos.description_zh: 兩位青少年在一場派對中合影，男生穿著牛仔襯衫，女生穿著暗紅色T恤，兩人靠在一起。背景是黑色布幕，掛著粉紅、藍綠、咖啡色等彩色氣球，看起來像是年終或聖誕節的聚會活動。左側還可以看到第三個人的手伸過來。
photos.location: Indoors - event venue or school auditorium, likely in Taiwan or United States
