photos.location_detail: Tropical beach resort — possibly Acapulco, Mexico or Kenting, Taiwan, based on the bay shape, hillside development, and parasailing activity
photos.description_en: A beach scene at a tropical resort with someone parasailing above the shoreline, lifted by a colorful parachute. The curved bay features green hillsid
photos.description_zh: 一張熱帶海灘度假勝地的照片，有人正在海灘上方進行拖曳傘活動。弧形海灣背景是綠色山丘，山坡上點綴著建築物和度假村。沙灘上可見遊客、船隻，海浪輕拍岸邊，呈現出熱鬧的度假氛圍。
photos.location: Tropical beach resort — possibly Acapulco, Mexico or Kenting, Taiwan, based on the bay shape, hillside development, and parasailing activity

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely a hotel lobby or department store
photos.description_en: A family of four poses together in front of a large, elaborately decorated Christmas tree on Christmas Eve 1994. The setting appears to be a hotel lob
photos.description_zh: 1994年平安夜，一家四口在一棵大型聖誕樹前合影留念。拍攝地點看似飯店大廳或商場中庭，右側可見薑餅屋裝飾。一家人穿著休閒服裝，面帶笑容地對著鏡頭合照。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely a hotel lobby or department store

photos.location_detail: Beach, likely Taiwan or Southeast Asia
photos.description_en: A couple plays together on a sandy beach at the water's edge, each holding one end of what appears to be a dark jacket or piece of clothing in a playf
photos.description_zh: 一對夫妻在海邊沙灘上嬉戲，兩人各拉著一件深色外套的兩端，擺出拔河般的有趣姿勢。背後是碧藍的海浪與晴朗的天空。左邊的女士背著肩包、穿著淡色花上衣，右邊的男士穿著條紋Polo衫和短褲。
photos.location: Beach, likely Taiwan or Southeast Asia

photos.location_detail: Kaohsiung, Taiwan — Kaohsiung City Senior Citizens Activity Center (高雄市老人活動中心)
photos.description_en: A group of approximately 20 adults poses on the front steps of the Kaohsiung City Senior Citizens Activity Center (高雄市老人活動中心) in Taiwan. The group app
photos.description_zh: 約二十位成年人在高雄市老人活動中心門前的階梯上合影留念。眾人多佩戴名牌，穿著正式，男士身穿襯衫領帶，女士則著花洋裝，看似為一場正式的參訪團或會議活動的團體照。
photos.location: Kaohsiung, Taiwan — Kaohsiung City Senior Citizens Activity Center (高雄市老人活動中心)

photos.location_detail: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan
photos.description_en: Four adults pose together in front of a striking red cable-stayed bridge at Taroko Gorge in Hualien, Taiwan. The dramatic marble canyon walls and lush
photos.description_zh: 四位成人在花蓮太魯閣峽谷的紅色斜張橋前合影留念。壯觀的大理石峽谷岩壁與翠綠的山坡植被構成美麗的背景。看起來是一家人——可能是父母與兩位成年子女——到太魯閣國家公園觀光旅遊時的合照。
photos.location: Taroko Gorge (太魯閣), Hualien, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Presidential Office Building (總統府), Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A large formal group photo taken on the steps inside the Presidential Office Building (總統府) in Taipei, Taiwan. Approximately 50 people, mostly men in
photos.description_zh: 一張在台北總統府內拍攝的大型正式團體合照。約五十人站在鋪有紅毯的階梯上，兩側有棕櫚盆栽及白色新古典主義廊柱。與會者多為身穿深色西裝、配戴名牌的男性，前排有一位穿著軍禮服的將領，中央站立者疑為主持接見的總統或高階官員，應為某次海外僑團或官方代表團的接見合影。
photos.location: Presidential Office Building (總統府), Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — government conference room, likely Ministry of the Interior or Executive Yuan building in Taipei
photos.description_en: A formal government conference in Taiwan showing the 1995 (ROC Year 84) National Construction Research Conference, Social Welfare Subgroup Meeting. Ap
photos.description_zh: 這是民國八十四年（1995年）國家建設研究會社會福利分組會議的正式會議照片。約二十多位與會者圍坐在大型圓形會議桌旁，一位講者站在講台前發言。會議室牆上掛有中華民國國旗及國父遺像，橫幅標示主辦單位為內政部。
photos.location: Taiwan — government conference room, likely Ministry of the Interior or Executive Yuan building in Taipei

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - rural hillside cemetery
photos.description_en: A large family group of approximately 10 adults gathers at a hillside grave site in Taiwan for tomb-sweeping (掃墓). Several members hold lit incense st
photos.description_zh: 一大家族約十位成員聚集在台灣山坡上的墓地掃墓祭祖。多位家人手持點燃的香站在維護良好的花崗岩墓前，墓旁有石獅、石燈籠、鮮花及供品。背景是雲霧繚繞的翠綠山巒。
photos.location: Taiwan - rural hillside cemetery

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - scenic park or garden, possibly in the mountainous area near Taipei (the lush vegetation, mountains, and traditional garden design suggest a location like Yangmingshan or a similar scenic area)
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man stands in front of a scenic ornamental pond at what appears to be a park or garden in Taiwan. He is wearing a striped polo shirt wit
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子站在台灣某公園或庭園的景觀池塘前留影。他穿著條紋polo衫，胸前別著印有中華民國國旗的識別證或名牌，搭配藍色牛仔褲和金色手錶。身後是精心設計的庭園景觀，池中小島上有一座雕塑，四周環繞著熱帶植物、柳樹，遠處可見青山。
photos.location: Taiwan - scenic park or garden, possibly in the mountainous area near Taipei (the lush vegetation, mountains, and traditional garden design suggest a location like Yangmingshan or a similar scenic area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - community or military recreation center
photos.description_en: Exterior view of a community recreation center in Taiwan, with large vertical Chinese characters on the facade reading what appears to be "X陣樂之家" (Rec
photos.description_zh: 台灣一處社區活動中心的外觀照片，建築立面上有大型直書漢字「X陣樂之家」。窗戶掛著中華民國國旗彩帶裝飾，應為國慶或重要節日期間。數人正穿過磚砌廣場走進大門，左側可見樹木與路燈。
photos.location: Taiwan - community or military recreation center

photos.location_detail: Yangmingshan National Park (陽明山), Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑) geothermal area, Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A middle-aged couple poses together on a stone walkway alongside a wooden railing at a volcanic hot springs or geothermal site, with steam rising from
photos.description_zh: 一對中年夫婦在火山地熱景區的石板步道上合影，身後是冒著白煙的岩壁山景。男士穿著條紋polo衫和藍色短褲，女士穿著碎花上衣和深色裙子，手提紫色小包。硫磺蒸氣從裸露的岩石間升起，形成壯觀的背景。
photos.location: Yangmingshan National Park (陽明山), Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑) geothermal area, Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — hillside restaurant or café, likely in or near a city
photos.description_en: A young Asian woman in her late teens or early twenties sits at a dining table in what appears to be a restaurant or café, smiling warmly at the camer
photos.description_zh: 一位年約十幾二十歲的年輕女子坐在餐廳或咖啡廳的餐桌旁，面帶微笑望向鏡頭。她穿著酒紅色長袖上衣，戴著垂墜耳環和精緻項鍊。身後的大片格窗外可見茂密的熱帶綠葉和遠處的城市景觀，看起來像是台灣山坡上的景觀餐廳。
photos.location: Taiwan — hillside restaurant or café, likely in or near a city

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely Yangmingshan (陽明山) or similar mountain park known for azaleas
photos.description_en: Three people pose together on a stone pathway in front of spectacular blooming azalea bushes with vibrant pink and white flowers. They are wearing col
photos.description_zh: 三人站在石板步道上，身後是盛開的杜鵑花叢，粉紅與白色花朵繁茂美麗。三人穿著藍、綠、紅色的風衣外套，其中一人手持收起的雨傘，看起來是春天微雨的天氣。背景是一座維護良好的公園或植物園，有長滿青苔的岩石和高大的樹木。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely Yangmingshan (陽明山) or similar mountain park known for azaleas

photos.location_detail: Public waterfront plaza, likely in East Asia (possibly Taiwan or China) given architectural style
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man in a light gray plaid blazer and striped collared shirt stands at a railing during dusk or early evening. Behind him is a large publ
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子穿著淺灰色格紋西裝外套和條紋襯衫，在黃昏時分倚靠在欄杆旁拍照。他身後是一座大型公共廣場，有噴水池、高聳的圓柱建築，以及聚集的人群。天空呈現出夕陽餘暉的粉橘色調。
photos.location: Public waterfront plaza, likely in East Asia (possibly Taiwan or China) given architectural style

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely a traditional garden or park (possibly Lin Family Mansion and Garden in Banqiao, or a similar historic garden)
photos.description_en: A scenic overlook of a traditional Chinese-style garden with a pond, taken from an elevated walkway with ornate curved balustrades. The garden feature
photos.description_zh: 從高處俯瞰一座傳統中式園林，可見池塘、茂密的綠樹及修剪整齊的灌木叢。園內有蜿蜒的磚造欄杆步道、精緻的雕花圍欄，以及右側的傳統涼亭。此處應為台灣的公園或歷史庭園，拍攝於盛夏時節，綠意盎然。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely a traditional garden or park (possibly Lin Family Mansion and Garden in Banqiao, or a similar historic garden)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, family home kitchen
photos.description_en: A family gathering in a kitchen, likely a birthday celebration. An elderly woman with glasses and gray hair stands smiling behind a counter where a sm
photos.description_zh: 一家人在廚房裡聚會，看起來是在慶祝生日。一位戴眼鏡的銀髮老太太站在吧台後方微笑著，桌上擺著一個插著蠟燭的小蛋糕。幾位家人，包括穿著鮮豔休閒服的孩子們，圍繞在吧台旁，場面溫馨自然。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, family home kitchen

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — possibly a park or public area in a city like Taipei, based on the tropical trees, style of vehicles (including a distinctive orange/yellow taxi), and urban setting
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man stands on a grassy area in what appears to be a park or open urban space, with large trees, parked cars, and a white building visibl
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子站在一片綠草地上，背景可見大樹、停放的車輛及一棟白色建築物。他穿著白色配深藍色條紋的polo衫、深色長褲和黑色皮鞋，手上戴著手錶。整體氛圍呈現出夏季潮濕悶熱的感覺，可能攝於台灣或東南亞地區。
photos.location: Taiwan — possibly a park or public area in a city like Taipei, based on the tropical trees, style of vehicles (including a distinctive orange/yellow taxi), and urban setting

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or Southeast Asia — tourist site with natural spring or water feature
photos.description_en: A group of about seven women stand along the edge of a moss-covered stone pool at what appears to be a natural spring or water feature at a tourist si
photos.description_zh: 約七名女性站在長滿青苔的石砌水池邊，看起來是某個觀光景點的天然泉水或水景設施。左邊一位女士俯身伸手觸碰從石牆水口流出的泉水。茂密的綠意和藍色鐵欄杆顯示這是一個熱帶或亞熱帶的旅遊地點，可能是夏季團體旅遊時拍攝。
photos.location: Taiwan or Southeast Asia — tourist site with natural spring or water feature

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - lakeside scenic area, possibly Sun Moon Lake (日月潭) or similar tourist destination
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man in a striped polo shirt stands by a scenic lakeside, resting his arm on a stone statue or sculpture. Behind him is a thatched-roof p
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子身穿條紋Polo衫，站在湖畔風景區，手臂靠在一座石雕上。背景可見茅草頂涼亭、平靜的湖面以及翠綠的山巒。熱帶風光與湖邊建築風格，推測可能是台灣或東南亞的觀光景點。
photos.location: Taiwan - lakeside scenic area, possibly Sun Moon Lake (日月潭) or similar tourist destination

photos.location_detail: Aquarium — possibly Taiwan or United States
photos.description_en: A photo taken through the glass of a large aquarium tank, showing dozens of fish swimming in deep blue water. The bottom of the tank is visible with a
photos.description_zh: 透過水族館玻璃拍攝的照片，可見數十條魚在深藍色的水中游動。水缸底部可見沙質或混濁的底層，水色從底部的淺色霧狀漸變為上方清澈的深藍色。照片右下角日期標記為95年7月11日。
photos.location: Aquarium — possibly Taiwan or United States

photos.location_detail: Southeast Asia - resort or hotel pool, possibly Taiwan or Thailand
photos.description_en: Two people are swimming in a large resort or hotel pool on a sunny day. A woman is leaning against the pool edge in the shallow end, smiling at the ca
photos.description_zh: 兩人在一座度假飯店的大型游泳池中戲水。一位女性靠在泳池邊緣的淺水區，面帶微笑望向鏡頭，另一人則在較深處游泳。泳池四周鋪設紅磚地面，擺放躺椅和藍白相間的遮陽傘，周圍種植棕櫚樹等熱帶植物，看起來像是東南亞的度假飯店。
photos.location: Southeast Asia - resort or hotel pool, possibly Taiwan or Thailand

photos.location_detail: Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑), Yangmingshan National Park, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of approximately 11 adults poses for a photo at a volcanic fumarole site, likely Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑) in Yangmingshan National Park, Taiwan. Thic
photos.description_zh: 約十一位成人在火山噴氣孔景點前合影，地點疑為陽明山國家公園的小油坑。背後岩壁間冒出大量硫磺蒸氣，場面壯觀。眾人穿著夏日休閒服裝，站在鋪設石板的觀景平台上，氣氛輕鬆愉快。
photos.location: Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑), Yangmingshan National Park, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑), Yangmingshan National Park, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of eleven people poses for a photo at a geothermal viewing area, likely Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑) in Yangmingshan National Park, Taiwan. Steam rises f
photos.description_zh: 十一人在台灣的地熱景觀區合影，可能是陽明山國家公園的小油坑。背後可見硫磺噴氣孔冒出的蒸氣，搭配壯觀的岩壁景觀。眾人穿著夏季休閒服裝，看起來是一次團體旅遊或家庭出遊。
photos.location: Xiaoyoukeng (小油坑), Yangmingshan National Park, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor cemetery/gravesite
photos.description_en: Five middle-aged to older women pose together in front of a family grave at a cemetery in Taiwan. The tombstone bears the name of a deceased mother wi
photos.description_zh: 五位中年至年長的女性在台灣的墓園中合影，身後是一座家族墓碑。墓碑上刻有「顯妣劉陳阿秀」等字樣，顯示過世者為母親輩，歿於民國八十三年（1994年）。這些女性看起來像是姊妹或至親，穿著夏季便服前來掃墓祭拜。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor cemetery/gravesite

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — cemetery/gravesite, likely in a rural or suburban hillside area
photos.description_en: A middle-aged couple poses in front of an ornate traditional Taiwanese grave site. The black granite headstone bears the inscription for a deceased mo
photos.description_zh: 一對中年夫婦站在一座傳統台灣墓園前合影。黑色花崗岩墓碑上刻有劉家先母的銘文，兩側刻有堂號「彭城」，墓前台階上刻有「福祿壽」三字。墓前擺放鮮花、供品及香燭，應是前來掃墓祭拜。
photos.location: Taiwan — cemetery/gravesite, likely in a rural or suburban hillside area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hillside cemetery, likely in or near Changhua (彰化) area based on tombstone inscription
photos.description_en: Four middle-aged to elderly men pose together in front of a traditional Taiwanese grave marker at a hillside cemetery. The black granite tombstone bea
photos.description_zh: 四位中老年男士在台灣山坡墓園的墓碑前合影留念。黑色花崗岩墓碑上刻有「顯妣」字樣，碑文顯示亡者於民國八十三年（1994年）過世。四人身穿夏季休閒服飾，頭戴帽子，看似兄弟或至親，前來掃墓祭拜，墓前擺放了鮮花水果等供品。
photos.location: Taiwan - hillside cemetery, likely in or near Changhua (彰化) area based on tombstone inscription

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — a city street with a temple or memorial complex entrance gate
photos.description_en: A photograph of a traditional Chinese-style ornamental gate (paifang) in Taiwan, viewed from across a wide road with yellow cross-hatched no-stopping
photos.description_zh: 一張台灣傳統中式牌坊的照片，從寬闊的馬路對面拍攝，路面上有黃色網狀禁停標線。紅白相間的三拱牌坊頂部覆蓋橙色琉璃瓦，飛簷翹角，透過拱門可見遠處一座金碧輝煌的寺廟或紀念建築。左側停有一輛白色轎車，右側則有一輛綠色軍用卡車。
photos.location: Taiwan — a city street with a temple or memorial complex entrance gate

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely a major city temple, possibly Lukang Longshan Temple (鹿港龍山寺) or similar historic temple in central/southern Taiwan based on architecture and surrounding urban context
photos.description_en: An elevated view of an ornate traditional Taiwanese temple, likely the Longshan Temple (龍山寺) or a similarly grand folk temple, photographed from a nea
photos.description_zh: 從附近建築物的高處俯瞰一座華麗的傳統台灣廟宇，可能是龍山寺或類似規模的大型民間寺廟。廟宇有精緻的多層飛簷屋頂，裝飾著傳統的燕尾脊和陶瓷雕塑。前景可見停車場停著幾輛九〇年代的汽車，旁邊有中文商業招牌，包括一間玉寶器石行，還掛著紅燈籠，呈現出廟宇周邊的日常生活景象。
photos.location: Taiwan — likely a major city temple, possibly Lukang Longshan Temple (鹿港龍山寺) or similar historic temple in central/southern Taiwan based on architecture and surrounding urban context

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — traditional garden or historic site, possibly Lin Family Mansion and Garden (林家花園) in Banqiao or similar classical Chinese garden
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man poses confidently on a wooden railing at a traditional Taiwanese garden or temple complex, wearing a striped polo shirt with a name
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子站在傳統台灣園林或寺廟建築群的木欄杆旁，自信地擺姿勢拍照，身穿條紋Polo衫，胸口別著印有中華民國國旗的名牌。身後可見石拱橋與精緻的石欄杆橫跨水面，大榕樹遮蔭其間，其他遊客和孩童正在園中遊覽。園區內可見傳統中式建築的彎曲屋簷與磚牆。
photos.location: Taiwan — traditional garden or historic site, possibly Lin Family Mansion and Garden (林家花園) in Banqiao or similar classical Chinese garden

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - traditional garden park, possibly Lin Family Mansion and Garden (林本源園邸) in Banqiao or similar historic garden
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man stands in a traditional Taiwanese garden, wearing a striped polo shirt and dark trousers. Behind him are lush green trees, decorativ
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子站在台灣傳統園林中，身穿條紋Polo衫搭配深色長褲。背景可見茂密的綠樹、裝飾性的花磚欄杆與拱橋，遠處還有公寓大樓。從茂盛的植物判斷，拍攝時應為夏季，地點為台灣某處古典園林。
photos.location: Taiwan - traditional garden park, possibly Lin Family Mansion and Garden (林本源園邸) in Banqiao or similar historic garden

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - traditional garden, likely Lin Family Mansion and Garden (林本源園邸) in Banqiao or a similar historic garden
photos.description_en: A lotus pond in full summer bloom at a traditional Chinese-style garden, with pink and purple water lilies covering the water's surface. A classical p
photos.description_zh: 夏日盛開的蓮花池，位於一座傳統中式園林內，粉紅與紫色的睡蓮佈滿水面。左側有一座綠色欄杆的古典涼亭，背景中可見幾位遊客在大樹間的步道上行走。
photos.location: Taiwan - traditional garden, likely Lin Family Mansion and Garden (林本源園邸) in Banqiao or a similar historic garden

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely a scenic park or resort area, possibly in the mountains (e.g., Sun Moon Lake, Xitou, or similar central Taiwan scenic area)
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man poses casually at the foot of a traditional Chinese-style stone arched bridge in a scenic park. He leans against the bridge railing
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子在風景優美的公園中，輕鬆地倚靠在一座傳統中式石拱橋的橋腳旁拍照留念。他身後是一座養著錦鯉的池塘，四周綠樹成蔭、柳枝低垂。他穿著短袖格紋襯衫、藍色短褲和深色皮鞋，是典型的九〇年代夏日休閒打扮。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely a scenic park or resort area, possibly in the mountains (e.g., Sun Moon Lake, Xitou, or similar central Taiwan scenic area)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel or convention center lobby
photos.description_en: Three adults pose together in the grand lobby of a hotel or upscale venue. They stand in front of a large circular marble planter overflowing with an
photos.description_zh: 三位成年人在一間飯店或高級場所的大廳合影。他們站在一個大型圓形大理石花壇前，花壇上擺滿了華麗的花藝裝飾。左邊的男士穿著藍白條紋Polo衫，中間的女士穿著淺色西裝外套並佩戴名牌，右邊的女士戴眼鏡，穿著藍色花紋上衣配白色裙子。背景中可見其他賓客入座。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel or convention center lobby

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel or banquet hall lobby
photos.description_en: A group of eight middle-aged to older adults poses together in the elegant lobby of what appears to be a hotel or banquet hall, with ornate floral arr
photos.description_zh: 八位中年至年長的成人在一間豪華飯店或宴會廳的大廳合影，背景可見精緻的花卉擺設與水晶吊燈。多人手提購物袋，看起來像是一同出遊或聚會的場合。照片日期標記為1995年7月21日。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel or banquet hall lobby

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hotel lobby or upscale lounge
photos.description_en: A group of approximately seven or eight middle-aged and older adults gathered around a table in what appears to be an upscale hotel lobby or lounge. O
photos.description_zh: 約七、八位中年及年長的成年人在一間高級飯店大廳或酒廊中圍坐在桌旁合影。一位女士站在後方，其餘人坐在白色軟墊椅子上，桌上擺著飲品。環境中有大型圓柱、裝飾植物和柔和的燈光，看起來像是一次夏季聚會或旅行中的合照。
photos.location: Taiwan - hotel lobby or upscale lounge

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain gorge/riverbed, possibly Taroko Gorge area or similar geological formation
photos.description_en: A rocky riverbed or gorge with a shallow stream flowing through eroded white/grey sedimentary rock formations. The terrain shows gravel and boulders o
photos.description_zh: 一條淺溪流經佈滿礫石與白色沉積岩的河床峽谷。上方散佈大小不一的卵石與礫石，下方可見被水流長年沖刷的光滑岩面。地形特徵類似台灣的山區峽谷地貌，可能為太魯閣或類似地質景觀。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain gorge/riverbed, possibly Taroko Gorge area or similar geological formation

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — hotel lobby or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A young woman in a floral sleeveless dress stands on a raised platform behind a large champagne glass pyramid tower at what appears to be a hotel lobb
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著碎花無袖洋裝的年輕女性站在飯店大廳或宴會廳的高台上，伸手在一座壯觀的香檳杯金字塔頂端放置或調整物品。香檳塔擺放在鋪有酒紅色桌裙的圓桌上，兩位身穿制服的服務人員站在一旁，前方以絨繩護欄圍出展示區域，地板為拋光花崗岩地面。
photos.location: Taiwan — hotel lobby or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - formal restaurant or banquet hall
photos.description_en: A young woman in a dark sleeveless top sits at a round banquet table, smiling at the camera. Behind her, a man in a dark suit and tie stands in a door
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著深色無袖上衣的年輕女子坐在圓形宴會桌旁，面帶微笑看著鏡頭。她身後有一位穿深色西裝打領帶的男子站在門口。場景看起來是一間正式的中式餐廳或宴會廳，牆上有花紋壁紙，桌上鋪著白色桌布，擺滿了多道中式菜餚。
photos.location: Taiwan - formal restaurant or banquet hall

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely a historic building, restaurant, or cultural site with traditional Japanese colonial-era architecture
photos.description_en: A group of eight adults and one infant pose together in front of what appears to be a traditional Japanese or Taiwanese-style building entrance with o
photos.description_zh: 一群八位成人與一名嬰兒在一棟傳統日式或台式風格建築的入口前合影。建築有精緻的木造結構與階梯，眾人穿著整齊，排成一列對著鏡頭微笑。右側一位男士抱著一名穿白色洋裝、頭戴蝴蝶結的小女嬰。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely a historic building, restaurant, or cultural site with traditional Japanese colonial-era architecture

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home
photos.description_en: A bride in a traditional red qipao (cheongsam) with elaborate floral embroidery stands between two older women in what appears to be a home getting-re
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿傳統紅色旗袍的新娘站在兩位年長女性之間，看起來是在婚禮前於家中準備的場景。新娘化著精緻的妝容，搭配紅色口紅、盤髮上插著紅色髮飾，佩戴金項鍊和耳環，並戴著紅色手套。右邊穿深藍色毛衣、別著胸針的女士面露微笑，左邊穿米色外套的女士則在一旁注視著。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home living room
photos.description_en: A traditional Chinese wedding tea ceremony (敬茶) taking place in a home living room. The bride, wearing an elegant red qipao with gold embroidery, carr
photos.description_zh: 一場傳統中式婚禮的敬茶儀式，在家中客廳舉行。新娘身穿華麗的紅色旗袍，端著一盤青花瓷茶杯，由一位穿深藍色衣服的長輩協助奉茶。家人圍坐在旁，沙發上一對夫婦抱著嬰兒，另一位來賓正在拍照記錄這個時刻。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home living room

photos.location_detail: Hotel lobby, likely Taiwan or East Asia
photos.description_en: Four well-dressed middle-aged Asian women pose together in front of a large, elaborate floral arrangement in what appears to be an upscale hotel lobby
photos.description_zh: 四位衣著端莊的中年女性在一間高級飯店大廳的大型花藝裝飾前合影留念。大廳可見大理石裝飾和圓柱，環境典雅。左起第二位女士佩戴名牌，顯示她們可能正在參加研討會或正式活動。四人穿著半正式服裝，包括花卉圖案外套等，應是出席特別場合。
photos.location: Hotel lobby, likely Taiwan or East Asia

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - hillside cemetery
photos.description_en: A middle-aged couple poses together in front of a traditional Taiwanese hillside grave. The black marble tombstone is inscribed with the name of the d
photos.description_zh: 一對中年夫婦在台灣山坡上的傳統墓園前合影。黑色大理石墓碑上刻有「顯妣劉陳阿春墓」，立碑時間為民國八十三年春。墓地設有傳統石獅、鮮花供品、香爐，墓前刻有「福祿壽」三字，整體布置莊嚴肅穆。
photos.location: Taiwan - hillside cemetery

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - school or educational institution
photos.description_en: A group of approximately 7-8 adults gathered in a hallway of what appears to be a Taiwanese school or educational institution, likely during an offici
photos.description_zh: 一群約七到八位成人聚集在台灣某學校或教育機構的走廊上，看似進行正式的參訪或視察活動。多位訪客手持黃色資料袋並配戴名牌，右側一位女士（可能是教師或行政人員）正在進行說明或導覽。牆上可見龍貓造型裝飾及「月份行事曆」字樣，推測此處為幼稚園或國小。
photos.location: Taiwan - school or educational institution

photos.location_detail: Coastal resort area, possibly tropical vacation destination (Taiwan coast, Hawaii, or Southeast Asia)
photos.description_en: A parasailing scene captured from below, showing a person suspended beneath a yellow-orange parachute high in the sky. The tow line extends diagonally
photos.description_zh: 從下方拍攝的拖曳傘活動照片，一個人懸掛在黃橙色的降落傘下方高高飛翔於天空中。牽引繩斜跨畫面，上面掛著彩色三角旗。天空呈現從深藍到暖色調的漸層，地平線附近隱約可見山脈輪廓，應是在海邊黃昏時分拍攝的度假照片。
photos.location: Coastal resort area, possibly tropical vacation destination (Taiwan coast, Hawaii, or Southeast Asia)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - likely Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village (九族文化村), Nantou County
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man stands posed in front of a large traditional thatched-roof structure with a towering conical roof, likely at a cultural village or t
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子站在一座高聳的傳統茅草屋頂建築前合影，該建築有著巨大的圓錐形屋頂，可能是文化村或主題園區內的展示建築。他穿著白色藍條紋polo衫和深色長褲。背景中可見纜車和熱帶植物，推測地點可能是台灣的九族文化村。
photos.location: Taiwan - likely Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village (九族文化村), Nantou County

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — traditional tea house district, possibly Jiufen or a similar heritage area
photos.description_en: A young woman poses in front of a traditional tea house called "禪園" (Zen Garden) in Taiwan. She wears a polka dot short-sleeve top and a long cream-co
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女子在台灣一間名為「禪園」的傳統茶館前留影。她身穿圓點短袖上衣搭配米色長裙，腰間繫著腰帶。茶館入口掛著紅燈籠，石板地面配上傳統建築風格，旁邊掛有「喫茶時間」的木製營業時間牌。
photos.location: Taiwan — traditional tea house district, possibly Jiufen or a similar heritage area

photos.location_detail: Boat excursion, likely in East Asia (possibly Taiwan or nearby waters)
photos.description_en: A group of adults wearing orange life jackets are seated on a tour boat on open water. A woman with short dark hair smiles on the left, a bald man gri
photos.description_zh: 一群成年人穿著橘色救生衣坐在觀光船上，背景可見海水。左邊一位短髮女士面帶微笑，中間一位禿頭男士開心地笑著，右邊一位男士正用手按住帽子以防被風吹走。後方還有多位乘客，有些戴著太陽眼鏡和帽子，大家看起來都在享受這趟船上旅程。
photos.location: Boat excursion, likely in East Asia (possibly Taiwan or nearby waters)

photos.location_detail: Hotel lobby or banquet venue, likely in Taiwan or Southeast Asia
photos.description_en: Two middle-aged Asian women pose together smiling in front of an ornate white marble fountain topped with a large, elaborate floral arrangement in wha
photos.description_zh: 兩位中年女性在一座精緻的白色大理石噴泉前合影微笑，噴泉上方擺放著一大束華麗的花藝。場景看起來像是飯店大廳或高級會場。左邊的女性穿著白色西裝外套搭配黑色套裝，胸前似乎佩戴著名牌或識別證，可能正在參加會議或正式活動。右邊的女性穿著藍金色花紋背心搭配白色裙子，背景中可見其他賓客。
photos.location: Hotel lobby or banquet venue, likely in Taiwan or Southeast Asia

photos.location_detail: Taiwan or United States - banquet hall or upscale restaurant, likely a Taiwanese community or official event
photos.description_en: Three middle-aged adults pose together at what appears to be a formal banquet or community event. A woman on the left wears a colorful floral blouse,
photos.description_zh: 三位中年人在一場正式宴會或社團活動中合影。左邊的女士穿著色彩繽紛的花卉上衣，中間的女士穿著白色西裝外套搭配深藍色上衣，胸前配戴印有中華民國國旗的名牌，右邊的男士穿著條紋Polo衫。場地是一間燈光溫暖、裝潢典雅的高級餐廳或宴會廳。
photos.location: Taiwan or United States - banquet hall or upscale restaurant, likely a Taiwanese community or official event

photos.location_detail: Tourist craft workshop, likely Taiwan or Southeast Asia
photos.description_en: A group of tourists watches a craftsman in blue work clothes performing a glassblowing or metalworking demonstration at what appears to be a heritage
photos.description_zh: 一群遊客在一處觀光工坊觀看身穿藍色工作服的師傅進行玻璃或金屬工藝示範。右側有一位戴著耳機、穿著深色上衣和牛仔褲的亞裔少年從較低位置觀看，其他遊客則聚集在台階上。左方可見工業風扇及工坊設備。
photos.location: Tourist craft workshop, likely Taiwan or Southeast Asia

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — likely the National Palace Museum (故宮博物院) in Taipei or a major temple complex, based on the traditional Chinese palatial architecture, white marble balustrades, and stone guardian lions
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man poses for a tourist photo in front of a traditional Chinese-style building, likely a major temple or cultural landmark in Taiwan. He
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子在台灣一座傳統中式建築前拍攝旅遊紀念照。他站在磚砌廣場上，身後是一座白色石獅雕像，背景中可見許多撐著陽傘的遊客聚集在華麗的建築入口附近。
photos.location: Taiwan — likely the National Palace Museum (故宮博物院) in Taipei or a major temple complex, based on the traditional Chinese palatial architecture, white marble balustrades, and stone guardian lions

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant or hotel banquet room
photos.description_en: Three middle-aged to older adults — two women and one man — sit together at a round banquet table in what appears to be a formal Chinese restaurant or
photos.description_zh: 三位中年至年長的成人——兩位女士和一位男士——坐在一間中式餐廳或飯店宴會廳的圓桌旁。桌上擺放著酒杯、餐盤，以及一個由百合花、玫瑰等鮮花組成的大型花藝擺飾，看起來像是一場家庭聚餐或慶祝活動。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant or hotel banquet room

photos.location_detail: Taroko Gorge entrance, Hualien, Taiwan
photos.description_en: Four middle-aged men pose together on a wet road in front of the traditional Chinese-style archway entrance to Taroko Gorge (East-West Cross-Island Hi
photos.description_zh: 四位中年男士在花蓮太魯閣東西橫貫公路牌樓前合影留念。背景可見峽谷的青山雲霧繚繞，地面濕潤顯示當天有雨。遠處可見黃色計程車和其他遊客。
photos.location: Taroko Gorge entrance, Hualien, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Scenic lake or gorge, likely in Taiwan or mainland China
photos.description_en: Three men sit at a table aboard a sightseeing boat on a turquoise lake surrounded by steep, densely forested mountains and exposed rock faces. An elde
photos.description_zh: 三位男士坐在觀光遊船的桌旁，背景是碧綠的湖水與陡峭的青山岩壁。左邊年長者戴眼鏡、穿菱格紋毛衣背心，對面兩位中年男士穿著西裝。桌上可見一盒人頭馬XO干邑白蘭地及食物。
photos.location: Scenic lake or gorge, likely in Taiwan or mainland China

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - mountain park, possibly Yangmingshan National Park or similar cherry blossom viewing area
photos.description_en: A middle-aged couple poses together on a park pathway surrounded by blooming cherry or plum blossoms and large mature trees. The man wears a red-and-b
photos.description_zh: 一對中年夫婦站在公園步道上合影，身後是盛開的櫻花或梅花與高大的老樹。男士穿著紅藍配色的風衣外套，女士穿著藍色風衣。霧氣瀰漫的山間景色和步道旁的彩色矮欄杆，看起來像是台灣的山區公園，應該是春天賞花季節，背景中可見其他遊客。
photos.location: Taiwan - mountain park, possibly Yangmingshan National Park or similar cherry blossom viewing area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, modern apartment/home
photos.description_en: A middle-aged woman in an orange blouse smiles warmly as she holds a newborn baby dressed in a white lace outfit and bonnet. The setting is a modern,
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿橘色上衣的中年女性面帶慈愛微笑，懷中抱著一個穿白色蕾絲衣服、戴白色小帽的新生嬰兒。背景是一間裝潢現代的住家，可見天花板的木質橫樑和擺放的照片。這溫馨的畫面看起來是祖母抱著剛出生的孫子或孫女。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, modern apartment/home

photos.location_detail: Outdoor scenic overlook, possibly coastal Taiwan or travel destination
photos.description_en: A couple poses together smiling at an outdoor scenic overlook, with a coastal or lakeside landscape and rocky terrain visible behind them. The man wea
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在戶外景觀台合照，背後可見海岸或湖邊風景及岩石地形。男士穿著灰色西裝外套搭配花紋襯衫，女士穿著深色條紋上衣並戴著手錶。這張照片掃描時上下顛倒，角落有相機日期印記。
photos.location: Outdoor scenic overlook, possibly coastal Taiwan or travel destination

photos.location_detail: Tropical forest, likely Taiwan or Southeast Asia
photos.description_en: A man in a white short-sleeve shirt and blue plaid pants stands with his back to the camera, reaching up to grasp a tree trunk or hanging vine in a de
photos.description_zh: 一名穿著白色短袖衫和藍色格子褲的男子背對鏡頭，伸手抓住熱帶雨林中的樹幹或垂掛的藤蔓。四周是茂密的綠色植被和氣根。右側背景中可見另一名戴眼鏡、穿條紋衫的男子，正站在樹叢間觀望。
photos.location: Tropical forest, likely Taiwan or Southeast Asia

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant with Asian tropical decor
photos.description_en: A family of four poses at a dimly-lit restaurant with a tropical Asian atmosphere, featuring bamboo ceilings, dark wooden beams, and a red lantern. Th
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在一間充滿亞洲熱帶風情的餐廳裡合影，餐廳有竹製天花板、深色木樑和紅色燈籠。父母分坐桌子兩側，中間是一對青少年兒子和年輕女兒，桌上擺著飲料和一個小花瓶。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant with Asian tropical decor

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, traditional family home
photos.description_en: An elderly woman wearing glasses and a dark blazer with a red corsage sits at a round dining table, preparing to cut a fruit-decorated birthday cake.
photos.description_zh: 一位戴眼鏡的年長女性穿著深色西裝外套，胸前別著紅色胸花，坐在圓形餐桌旁準備切一個水果裝飾的生日蛋糕。背景是傳統台灣家庭的客廳，身後可見雕花木製神龕及神像，牆上掛著中國結，隔壁房間有一台映像管電視機。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, traditional family home

photos.location_detail: Taipei 101, Xinyi District, Taipei, Taiwan
photos.description_en: A family group of five people poses in front of the entrance to Taipei 101's shopping mall. The group includes two older men, a middle-aged woman in a
photos.description_zh: 五位家人在台北101購物中心入口前合影。合照中有兩位年長男性、一位穿藍色外套的中年女性、一位年輕女性及一位年輕男性，眾人皆穿著冬季服裝。背景清楚可見「TAIPEI 101」招牌，照片日期印記為2004年12月26日。
photos.location: Taipei 101, Xinyi District, Taipei, Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - cemetery/burial ground, likely in a hillside or rural area
photos.description_en: Three older men stand in front of a newly constructed Liu (劉) family tomb. The ornate black and gold monument bears the inscription "祖德永流芳" (Ancestral
photos.description_zh: 三位年長男士站在新建的劉家墓園前合影。墓碑上方刻有「祖德永流芳」，碑文記載為二〇〇四年夏建，並標示「彭城」為劉氏郡望。墓前擺放鮮花，顯示這是墓園落成後不久的一次祭祖或紀念性造訪。
photos.location: Taiwan - cemetery/burial ground, likely in a hillside or rural area

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — upscale Chinese banquet restaurant
photos.description_en: Six adults are seated around a round banquet table at an upscale Chinese restaurant, posing for a group photo at what appears to be a wedding banquet
photos.description_zh: 六位成年人圍坐在高級中式餐廳的圓桌旁合影，看起來是在參加婚宴或正式慶祝活動。坐在中間偏右的女士胸前佩戴白色胸花，男士們穿著西裝或襯衫。桌上擺放著茶壺、醬料碟等傳統中式宴會餐具，還可見小型照片或活動卡片。
photos.location: Taiwan — upscale Chinese banquet restaurant

photos.location_detail: Restaurant, likely United States or Taiwan
photos.description_en: A group of five people poses together at a restaurant table during what appears to be a celebration or party. The setting features modern ambient red/
photos.description_zh: 五人在一間有現代氛圍燈光的餐廳裡合照，背景中可見其他賓客戴著派對飾品，似乎是某種慶祝活動。左邊是一位白人男性，中間是兩位年輕的亞裔成人，右邊是一對年長的亞裔夫婦，所有人都面帶笑容。
photos.location: Restaurant, likely United States or Taiwan

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — outdoor nighttime DPP political rally venue, likely in a major city (大選 indicates presidential election rally)
photos.description_en: A man in a white baseball cap and polo shirt gives an enthusiastic double thumbs-up at a nighttime political rally in Taiwan, surrounded by a large cr
photos.description_zh: 一位戴白色棒球帽、穿polo衫的男子在台灣夜間政治造勢晚會上，熱情地比出雙手大拇指。周圍人群揮舞著綠色的民進黨旗幟和布條。這張照片攝於2008年總統大選前夕（3月21日），現場是民進黨的競選造勢活動，旁邊坐著幾位同行者，包括右邊一位穿黃色polo衫的年長男子。
photos.location: Taiwan — outdoor nighttime DPP political rally venue, likely in a major city (大選 indicates presidential election rally)

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - restaurant
photos.description_en: A group of seven older men pose together at a restaurant dining table during what appears to be a reunion dinner. Four men are seated in front and thr
photos.description_zh: 七位年長男士在餐廳聚餐時合影留念。前排四人坐著，後排三人站立，大家面帶笑容。餐桌上擺滿菜餚、紅酒杯及黃色小花束，看似一場老友重聚的歡樂聚會。
photos.location: Taiwan - restaurant

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — care facility / nursing home
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family visits an elderly woman (likely in her 90s or older) seated in a wheelchair at what appears to be a care facility or nursi
photos.description_zh: 一家多代人到安養機構探望坐在輪椅上的年邁長輩，老人家看起來已九十多歲或更年長。六位家人圍繞在她身旁，面帶溫暖的笑容，旁邊桌上放著禮品袋，看得出是一次特別的探訪。房間背景可見醫療用品架和床鋪，應為長照機構的居住空間。
photos.location: Taiwan — care facility / nursing home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — nursing home or care facility
photos.description_en: An elderly woman in her 90s or older sits in a wheelchair wearing a floral nightgown, being visited by a younger woman in her 30s who leans in warmly
photos.description_zh: 一位九十多歲的老奶奶坐在輪椅上，穿著粉色花朵圖案的睡衣，一位年約三十多歲的年輕女性在旁邊親切地陪伴她。場景是台灣的一間安養中心或護理之家，房間內有醫療床、醫療用品架及牆上掛著的扇形裝飾畫。背景中另有一人戴著黑色口罩。
photos.location: Taiwan — nursing home or care facility

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoor setting, likely a care facility or assisted living residence
photos.description_en: A multi-generational family visit photo taken indoors, likely at a care facility or home. An elderly woman in a wheelchair, appearing to be in her 90s
photos.description_zh: 一張多代同堂的家庭探訪照片，拍攝於室內，可能是安養機構或住所。一位年約九十多歲的長者坐在輪椅上，身邊圍繞著不同年齡的家人——兩位成年女性、一位成年男性、一位青少年和一位幼童。旁邊可見禮品袋，顯示這是一次家庭探望的場合。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoor setting, likely a care facility or assisted living residence

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — indoor care facility or home bedroom
photos.description_en: A family visit photo showing an elderly woman seated in a wheelchair, surrounded by three younger family members posing and smiling. The setting is a
photos.description_zh: 一張家庭探訪的照片，一位年邁的長輩坐在輪椅上，三位年輕的家人圍繞著她合影微笑。場景是一間臥室或照護機構的房間，可見醫療用床及牆上掛著的扇面書畫。其中一位年輕人在長輩身後俏皮地比出剪刀手。
photos.location: Taiwan — indoor care facility or home bedroom

photos.location_detail: Taiwan — care facility / nursing home
photos.description_en: A family visit to an elderly woman in a care facility. An elderly woman (likely in her 90s+) sits in a wheelchair wearing a white floral nightgown, su
photos.description_zh: 一家人到照護機構探望年邁的長輩。一位高齡女性（看起來九十多歲以上）坐在輪椅上，穿著白底紅花的睡衣，身旁圍繞著家人：右邊站著一位三四十歲的女性，左邊是一位穿黑色T恤的青少年男孩，床上坐著一個約四五歲的小男孩正在玩平板電腦。場景為護理之家或安養機構的房間，架上可見醫療用品。
photos.location: Taiwan — care facility / nursing home

photos.location_detail: Taiwan - indoors, home or assisted living setting
photos.description_en: An elderly woman seated in a wheelchair, covered with a white and pink floral blanket, looks at a smartphone held by a younger woman leaning in beside
photos.description_zh: 一位年長女性坐在輪椅上，身上蓋著白底粉紅花卉的毯子，正在看旁邊年輕女性手中的手機。年輕女性穿著淺藍色條紋襯衫，戴著Apple Watch，面帶微笑地靠近長輩一起看手機。兩人身處家中或照護環境，牆上掛著一幅扇面裝飾畫，背後架上可見照護用品。
photos.location: Taiwan - indoors, home or assisted living setting

photos.location_detail: Assisted living or nursing care facility, likely Taiwan
photos.description_en: A family of four visits an elderly woman seated in a wheelchair in what appears to be an assisted living or nursing home room. The elderly woman, with
photos.description_zh: 一家四口前往安養機構探望坐在輪椅上的年長女性。白髮老人穿著粉紅色花卉連衣裙，身旁圍繞著一位年輕男性、一位年輕女性和兩個男孩，大家一起溫馨合影。牆上掛著一幅扇面畫，門旁可見一本日曆。
photos.location: Assisted living or nursing care facility, likely Taiwan
